premiumSeo.metaDescription: كيف يعمل {tool}، ولمن، ماذا تُدخل، وكيف تقرأ النتيجة. دعم قرار التسعير ومخاطر الهامش من SectorCalc.
premiumSeo.h1: {tool}: السعر the job and protect the margin
premiumSeo.intro: يساعدك {tool} على اختبار العمل قبل الالتزام بالسعر. يحوّل تكاليفك وكمياتك ونسبك إلى قراءة واضحة للهامش والمخاطر حتى تلاحظ العوامل الخفية التي تآكل الربح وتقرر بثقة بدلاً من التخمين.
premiumSeo.howTo: أدخل {inputs} لسيناريو {sector}. يشغّل SectorCalc معادلات حتمية مُحكَمة ويُرجع {outputs}. أضف حقولًا اختيارية لتحسين العتبات والمخاطر.
premiumSeo.method: يستخدم {tool} طبقة حوكمة المعادلات في SectorCalc: مدخلات مُتحقَّقة، خط أنابيب حتمي، وفحوص عتبات. محاكاة تقنية — وليست نصيحة مالية أو قانونية أو هندسية.
premiumSeo.mistakes: أسعار قديمة، تجاهل حقول اختيارية، خلط وحدات، وقراءة النتيجة كربح مضمون — أخطاء متكررة. {pain} تحقق من المدخلات قبل قرارات العمل.
premiumSeo.problem: Most jobs lose margin long before the invoice, when الإعداد, rework, overruns, and underالسعرd line items are never added up before the quote goes out. The {tool} makes those drivers visible so they stop surprising you.
premiumSeo.help: يطبّق محرك الحساب الحتمي في SectorCalc على مدخلاتك ثم يبرز العوامل الأكثر تأثيراً على النتيجة. تحصل على قراءة منظمة يمكنك الدفاع عنها — وليس رقماً في صندوق أسود.
premiumSeo.who: Oلكلators, estimators, owners, and managers who السعر work, review bids, or need a consistent baseline across a team will get the most from the {tool}.

homeAbout.title: من نحن
homeAbout.paragraph1: غالباً ما يتسرب الربح من الشركات عبر تكاليف غير ملحوظة وليس عبر المبيعات. التسعير الخاطئ وأخطاء الحساب والهدر وفقدان الكفاءة وضعف انضباط العروض يآكل الهامش بصمت مع الوقت.
homeAbout.paragraph2: صُمم SectorCalc لجعل هذه الخسائر غير المرئية قابلة للقياس. يرفع قرارات التكلفة والعروض والكفاءة والمخاطر إلى أساس أسرع وأكثر شفافية وموثوقية.
homeAbout.beliefSubtitle: الدقة في الحساب هي أساس الأداء الموثوق.
homeAbout.highlightSecondary: وتحويل الحساب إلى دعم قرار موثوق.
homeAbout.ctaAria: اقرأ صفحة من نحن في SectorCalc

aboutPage.seoTitle: حول SectorCalc | الحساب الصناعي ودعم القرار
aboutPage.seoDescription: يساعد SectorCalc الشركات على كشف الخسائر المخفية وقياس المخاطر التشغيلية وتحويل الحسابات الصناعية إلى دعم قرار موثوق.

hero.title: نحوّل الحساب إلى قرارات يمكن الوثوق بها.
hero.lead: SectorCalc منصة عالمية للحساب الصناعي ودعم القرار تساعد الشركات على كشف الخسائر المخفية والتصرف بثقة.

why.title: لماذا وُجد SectorCalc
why.body: معظم الخسائر التشغيلية لا تظهر على الفاتورة. تختبئ في التسعير والهدر وزمن الإعداد وانخفاض الكفاءة وضعف انضباط العروض، وتآكل الهوامش بهدوء لسنوات.

what.title: ما هو SectorCalc
what.body: مجموعة مركزة من الحاسبات القطاعية وتقارير القرار تحوّل المدخلات التشغيلية الخام إلى أرقام واضحة قابلة للدفاع — ليست جدولاً إضافياً ولا ERP ثقيلاً.

problem.title: المشكلة التي نحلها
problem.body: تتخذ الفرق قرارات التكلفة والعروض والمخاطر بمعلومات ناقصة. يجعل SectorCalc غير المرئي قابلاً للقياس حتى تستند القرارات إلى أدلة لا إلى التخمين.

how.title: كيف يعمل نظامنا
how.body: تقدّم المدخلات التي تعرفها؛ يحدد النظام ما هو مطلوب ويشغّل حسابات حتمية خاضعة للحوكمة ويتحقق من كل نتيجة مقابل الثوابت والمعايير قبل عرضها.

different.title: ما يميزنا
different.body: كل نتيجة تحمل ملخص حساب شفافاً ومعايير إقليمية استرشادية وافتراضات موثقة يمكن لفريقك مراجعتها قبل اتخاذ القرار.

who.title: لمن صُمم
who.body: أصحاب الأعمال والمقدّرون وفرق الميدان والاستشاريون الذين يحتاجون إجابات سريعة وموثوقة دون فريق تسعير كامل أو برنامج مؤسسي معقد.

building.title: ما نبنيه
building.body: معيار عالمي لذكاء الحساب القطاعي يتوسع عبر الصناعات مع إبقاء كل صيغة خاضعة للحوكمة والتدقيق والثقة.

manifesto.secondary: وتحويل الحساب إلى دعم قرار موثوق.

premiumSchemaPage.bullet3: PDF وCSV جاهزان للتصدير في الخطط المدفوعة
premiumSchemaPage.legalQuestion: هل هذه نصيحة مالية أو هندسية؟
premiumSchemaPage.legalAnswer: لا. حاسبات SectorCalc المميزة أدوات دعم قرار بافتراضات شفافة. لا تحل محل المشورة المالية أو القانونية أو الهندسية المهنية.

length.label: الطول
length.helper: الطول من concrete slab or structure in meters. Based on ISO 9001 measurement standards.

width.label: العرض
width.helper: العرض من concrete element in meters. Typical for industrial floors and foundations.

depth.label: العمق / السماكة
depth.helper: السماكة من concrete pour in meters. Common range for slabs: 0.1–0.3 m.

shape.label: Shape
shape.helper: Geometric shape من pour المساحة. Affects الحجم calculation and الهدر factors.

wastefactor.label: الهدر Factor
wastefactor.helper: Expected المادة الهدر due to spillage, over-excavation, or formwork leakage. Lean الهدف < 3%.

compressionstrength.label: Compression Strength Class
compressionstrength.helper: Concrete strength class لكل EN 206. Higher strength increases التكلفة and reduces الحجم yield slightly.

reinforcementratio.label: Reinforcement Ratio
reinforcementratio.helper: Steel reinforcement as لكلcentage of concrete الحجم. Typical range 0.5–3% for structural slabs.

laborrate.label: Labor المعدل
laborrate.helper: Hourly labor التكلفة for concrete placement and finishing. Based on regional wage data.

materialcostperm3.label: المادة التكلفة لكل m³
materialcostperm3.helper: التكلفة of ready-mix concrete delivered to site. Includes additives if specified.

usepump.label: Use Concrete Pump
usepump.helper: Indicates if a concrete pump is required for placement. Adds التكلفة and reduces الهدر.

loan_amount.label: Loan المبلغ
loan_amount.helper: Total رأس المال borrowed, typically 80% of proلكلty القيمة.

down_payment_percent.label: Down Payment لكلcentage
down_payment_percent.helper: لكلcentage of proلكلty السعر paid upfront. Affects PMI and LTV ratio.

annual_interest_rate.label: Annual Interest المعدل
annual_interest_rate.helper: Nominal المعدل السنوي, fixed or variable. المستخدم for monthly compounding.

loan_term_years.label: Loan المدة (السنوات)
loan_term_years.helper: المدة من mortgage in السنوات. Standard المدةs: 15, 20, 30.

property_tax_rate.label: Proلكلty Tax المعدل
property_tax_rate.helper: Annual proلكلty tax as لكلcentage of proلكلty القيمة. Varies by jurisdiction.

insurance_rate.label: Home Insurance المعدل
insurance_rate.helper: Annual homeowner's insurance as لكلcentage of proلكلty القيمة.

monthly_hoa.label: Monthly HOA Fee
monthly_hoa.helper: Monthly homeowners association fees, if applicable.

annual_income.label: Annual Gross Income
annual_income.helper: Total annual household income before taxes. المستخدم for DTI calculation.

monthly_debt.label: Monthly Existing Debt Payments
monthly_debt.helper: Recurring monthly debt obligations (car loans, student loans, credit cards).

payment_frequency.label: Payment Frequency
payment_frequency.helper: How often payments are made. Acceleالمعدلd biweekly results in 13 full payments لكل year.

principal.label: رأس المال المبلغ
principal.helper: Initial investment or loan المبلغ in base currency.

annualinterestrate.label: Annual Interest المعدل
annualinterestrate.helper: Nominal annual interest المعدل as a لكلcentage.

compoundingfrequency.label: Compounding Frequency
compoundingfrequency.helper: Number of compounding لكلiods لكل year (e.g., 1=annual, 12=monthly, 365=daily).

timeperiod.label: الوقت لكلiod
timeperiod.helper: Total المدة of investment or loan in السنوات.

additionalcontribution.label: Additional Contribution لكل لكلiod
additionalcontribution.helper: Fixed المبلغ added at the end of each compounding لكلiod.

inflationrate.label: Inflation المعدل
inflationrate.helper: Expected annual inflation المعدل for real القيمة Adjustment.

taxrate.label: Tax المعدل on Interest
taxrate.helper: لكلcentage of interest earnings taxed annually.

list_price.label: List السعر (لكل unit)
list_price.helper: Standard Selling السعر before any discount, as defined in ISO 9001 التكلفة accounting procedures.

discount_percent.label: Discount لكلcentage
discount_percent.helper: Negotiated or promotional discount off list السعر, typical in Lean pricing stالمعدلgies.

quantity.label: Order الكمية
quantity.helper: Number of units in the transaction, المستخدم for الحجم-based discount analysis لكل WERC DC metrics.

variable_cost_per_unit.label: Variable التكلفة لكل Unit
variable_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct المادة, labor, and variable overhead لكل unit (ISO 14051 MFCA standard).

fixed_cost_allocation.label: Fixed التكلفة Allocation (total)
fixed_cost_allocation.helper: Allocated Fixed التكلفةs for the order batch (e.g., الإعداد, engineering, admin) لكل Lean التكلفة deployment.

discount_type.label: Discount Type
discount_type.helper: Method of discount application: لكلcentage off list or fixed dollar المبلغ لكل unit.

apply_to_all_units.label: Apply Discount to All Units
apply_to_all_units.placeholder: أدخل Apply Discount to All Units
apply_to_all_units.helper: If true, discount applies to entire الكمية; if false, only to incremental units (tiered pricing).

total_units.label: Total Units Produced
total_units.helper: Total number of units produced in the reporting لكلiod (ISO 9001:2015 clause 9.1.3).

defective_units.label: Defective Units
defective_units.helper: Number of units failing quality inspection (Six Sigma DPMO metric).

rework_units.label: Rework Units
rework_units.helper: Units that required rework to meet specifications (Lean الهدر reduction).

scrap_units.label: Scrap Units
scrap_units.helper: Units that are scrapped and cannot be reworked (المادة yield loss).

target_yield.label: الهدف Yield (%)
target_yield.helper: Desired first-pass yield لكلcentage (Six Sigma الهدف ≥ 99.99966% for 6σ).

process_type.label: Process Type
process_type.helper: Type of process for contextual benchmarking (WERC DC metrics, ISO 9001).

include_scrap_in_defect.label: Include Scrap in Defect Count
include_scrap_in_defect.placeholder: أدخل Include Scrap in Defect Count
include_scrap_in_defect.helper: If true, scrap units are counted as defective for defect المعدل calculation.

fixed_costs.label: Total Fixed التكلفةs (لكل لكلiod)
fixed_costs.helper: Sum of all Fixed التكلفةs (إيجار, salaries, insurance, depreciation) for the لكلiod. ISO 9001:2015 clause 7.1.4.

variable_cost_per_unit.label: Variable التكلفة لكل Unit
variable_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct المادة, direct labor, and variable overhead لكل unit. Lean manufacturing standard التكلفة approach.

selling_price_per_unit.label: Selling السعر لكل Unit
selling_price_per_unit.helper: صافي Selling السعر after discounts and returns. WERC DC Metrics benchmark.

defect_rate.label: Defect المعدل (ppm)
defect_rate.helper: Parts لكل million defective. Six Sigma DMAIC metric. Typical baseline 5000 ppm (3.8 sigma).

rework_cost_per_unit.label: Rework التكلفة لكل Defective Unit
rework_cost_per_unit.placeholder: أدخل Rework التكلفة لكل Defective Unit
rework_cost_per_unit.helper: التكلفة to rework or scrap a defective unit. Includes labor, المادة, and overhead.

production_volume.label: Actual Production الحجم (units)
production_volume.helper: Total units produced in the لكلiod. المستخدم for actual vs. break-even comparison.

cost_allocation_method.label: التكلفة Allocation Method
cost_allocation_method.helper: Traditional uses single overhead المعدل; activity-based uses multiple التكلفة drivers. ABC is recommended for ISO 9001:2015 clause 9.1.3.

annual_revenue.label: Annual Revenue (USD)
annual_revenue.helper: Total annual revenue من facility or business unit.

operating_margin.label: Oلكلating Margin (%)
operating_margin.helper: التيار oلكلating profit margin as a لكلcentage of revenue.

total_inventory_value.label: Total Inventory القيمة (USD)
total_inventory_value.helper: التيار القيمة of all inventory held (raw المادةs, WIP, finished goods).

inventory_carrying_cost_percent.label: Inventory Carrying التكلفة (% of inventory القيمة)
inventory_carrying_cost_percent.placeholder: أدخل Inventory Carrying التكلفة (% of inventory القيمة)
inventory_carrying_cost_percent.helper: Annual التكلفة to hold inventory (storage, insurance, obsolescence, capital التكلفة). Typical range 20-30%.

annual_labor_cost.label: Annual Direct Labor التكلفة (USD)
annual_labor_cost.helper: Total annual التكلفة of direct labor in the oلكلation.

defect_rate_percent.label: Defect المعدل (%)
defect_rate_percent.helper: لكلcentage of products that do not meet quality standards (Six Sigma metric).

cost_per_defect.label: التكلفة لكل Defect (USD)
cost_per_defect.helper: Average التكلفة incurred لكل defective unit (rework, scrap, warranty).

annual_energy_cost.label: Annual الطاقة التكلفة (USD)
annual_energy_cost.helper: Total annual الطاقة expenditure for the facility.

lean_implementation_cost.label: Lean Implementation التكلفة (USD)
lean_implementation_cost.helper: One-الوقت التكلفة for implementing Lean/Six Sigma improvements (training, tools, consulting).

expected_improvement_factor.label: Expected Improvement Factor (0-1)
expected_improvement_factor.helper: Expected fractional improvement from Lean initiatives (e.g., 0.15 = 15% reduction in الهدر).

industry_type.label: Industry Type
industry_type.helper: Type of industrial oلكلation for benchmarking and standard adjustments.

iso_certified.label: ISO 9001 Certified
iso_certified.helper: Indicates if the facility is ISO 9001 certified, affecting quality التكلفة baselines.

direct_labor_hours.label: Direct Labor الساعات لكل Unit
direct_labor_hours.placeholder: أدخل Direct Labor الساعات لكل Unit
direct_labor_hours.helper: Standard الوقت لكل unit from الوقت studies (ISO 9001 clause 7.1.4).

hourly_wage.label: Average Hourly Wage
hourly_wage.helper: الوزنed average of direct labor wages including shift diffeإيجارials.

overhead_rate.label: Overhead المعدل
overhead_rate.helper: Includes facility, utilities, indirect labor, and depreciation (WERC DC Measures).

tooling_cost_per_unit.label: Tooling التكلفة لكل Unit
tooling_cost_per_unit.helper: Amortized التكلفة of jigs, fixtures, and لكلishable tools (Lean TPM).

quality_cost_per_unit.label: Quality التكلفة لكل Unit
quality_cost_per_unit.helper: التكلفة of inspection, rework, scrap, and warranty (Six Sigma COPQ).

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.helper: Number of units produced لكل الإعداد (Lean SMED).

setup_time_hours.label: الإعداد الوقت لكل Batch
setup_time_hours.helper: الوقت to change over equipment between batches (Lean SMED).

profit_margin.label: الهدف Profit Margin
profit_margin.helper: Desired markup over Total التكلفة (stالمعدلgic pricing).

currency.label: Currency
currency.helper: ISO 4217 currency code for financial reporting.

include_setup.label: Include الإعداد التكلفة in المعدل
include_setup.placeholder: أدخل Include الإعداد التكلفة in المعدل
include_setup.helper: If true, الإعداد الوقت is amortized across batch size.

avg_days_receivable.label: Average الأيام Receivable (DSO)
avg_days_receivable.helper: Average number of الأيام to collect payment after a sale. High DSO indicates potential cash التدفق issues.

avg_days_payable.label: Average الأيام Payable (DPO)
avg_days_payable.helper: Average number of الأيام to pay suppliers. Higher DPO can improve cash التدفق but may strain supplier relationships.

inventory_days.label: Inventory الأيام (DII)
inventory_days.helper: Average number of الأيام inventory is held before sale. High DII ties up cash and increases holding التكلفةs.

operating_expenses_daily.label: Daily Oلكلating Expenses
operating_expenses_daily.helper: Total daily oلكلating التكلفةs including labor, المادةs, overhead. المستخدم to compute cash gap in moصافيary المدةs.

revenue_daily.label: Daily Revenue
revenue_daily.helper: Average daily revenue from sales. المستخدم to compute cash conversion cycle and gap.

payment_terms_suppliers.label: Supplier Payment المدةs
payment_terms_suppliers.helper: Standard payment المدةs offered by suppliers. Affects DPO and cash gap.

customer_payment_behavior.label: Customer Payment Behavior
customer_payment_behavior.helper: Historical customer payment behavior. Adjusts effective DSO.

lean_inventory_flag.label: Lean Inventory Practices Active
lean_inventory_flag.helper: Indicates if Lean inventory methods (e.g., JIT) are in place to reduce inventory الأيام.

six_sigma_quality_level.label: Six Sigma Quality Level (Sigma)
six_sigma_quality_level.helper: التيار process sigma level. Higher sigma indicates fewer defects and less cash tied up in rework/scrap.

cutting_length.label: Cutting الطول
cutting_length.helper: Total الطول من tool path in contact with the workpiece. Derived from CAM or drawing.

feed_rate.label: Feed المعدل
feed_rate.helper: Linear feed speed من cutting tool. Based on المادة and tool specifications.

spindle_speed.label: Spindle Speed
spindle_speed.helper: Rotational speed من spindle. Affects cutting speed and surface finish.

number_of_passes.label: Number of Passes
number_of_passes.helper: Number of cutting passes required to achieve final geometry.

rapid_traverse_distance.label: Rapid Traverse المسافة
rapid_traverse_distance.helper: Total المسافة traveled at rapid traverse (non-cutting moves).

rapid_traverse_rate.label: Rapid Traverse المعدل
rapid_traverse_rate.helper: Maximum speed من machine during rapid moves.

tool_change_time.label: Tool Change الوقت
tool_change_time.helper: Average الوقت to change a tool, including turret indexing.

number_of_tool_changes.label: Number of Tool Changes
number_of_tool_changes.helper: Total tool changes required for the oلكلation.

material_hardness_factor.label: المادة Hardness Factor
material_hardness_factor.helper: Adjusts cutting الوقت based on المادة machinability. Refer to ISO 3685.

tool_wear_factor.label: Tool Wear Factor
tool_wear_factor.helper: Multiplier for tool wear. 1.0 = new tool, >1.0 = worn tool. Based on tool life data.

machine_efficiency.label: Machine Efficiency
machine_efficiency.helper: الفعالية الإجمالية للمعدات (OEE) factor. Accounts for downtime, speed loss, and quality loss.

part_loading_time.label: Part Loading/Unloading الوقت
part_loading_time.helper: الوقت to load and unload the workpiece from the machine.

coolant_on_time.label: Coolant On الوقت
coolant_on_time.helper: الوقت for coolant to activate and stabilize before cutting.

measurement_time.label: In-Process Measurement الوقت
measurement_time.helper: الوقت for probing or manual measurement during the cycle.

energy_consumption_kwh.label: الطاقة الاستهلاك (kWh)
energy_consumption_kwh.helper: Total metered kilowatt-الساعات for the billing لكلiod. المستخدم as primary driver for الطاقة التكلفة.

peak_demand_kw.label: Peak Demand (kW)
peak_demand_kw.helper: Highest 15-minute average demand in the لكلiod. Drives demand charges لكل utility tariff.

energy_rate_per_kwh.label: الطاقة المعدل ($/kWh)
energy_rate_per_kwh.helper: Blended الطاقة charge from utility bill, including generation and transmission.

demand_rate_per_kw.label: Demand المعدل ($/kW)
demand_rate_per_kw.helper: Monthly demand charge لكل kW of peak demand, varies by utility and region.

power_factor.label: القدرة Factor
power_factor.helper: Ratio of real القدرة to appaإيجار القدرة. Low PF incurs penalties لكل utility tariff.

pf_penalty_threshold.label: PF Penalty Threshold
pf_penalty_threshold.helper: Minimum القدرة factor before penalty applies, typically 0.9 لكل utility standards.

pf_penalty_rate.label: PF Penalty المعدل ($/kvar)
pf_penalty_rate.helper: التكلفة لكل reactive القدرة (kvar) when PF below threshold.

system_efficiency.label: System Efficiency (%)
system_efficiency.helper: Overall electrical system efficiency including transformers, cables, and motors. المستخدم for loss adjustment.

operating_hours.label: Oلكلating الساعات لكل Month
operating_hours.helper: Total الساعات the facility opeالمعدلs in the billing لكلiod. المستخدم for معامل الحمل calculation.

tariff_type.label: Tariff Type
tariff_type.helper: Utility المعدل structure. Affects how الطاقة and demand charges are calculated.

include_demand_charge.label: Include Demand Charge
include_demand_charge.helper: Toggle to include or exclude demand charges from Total التكلفة.

compressor_power_rating.label: Compressor Motor القدرة Rating
compressor_power_rating.helper: Nameplate القدرة من compressor motor. Typically from 5 kW to 5000 kW for industrial units.

motor_efficiency.label: Motor Efficiency
motor_efficiency.helper: Efficiency من electric motor driving the compressor. Premium efficiency motors (IE3/IE4) are >90%.

compressor_type.label: Compressor Type
compressor_type.helper: Diffeإيجار compressor types have diffeإيجار specific القدرة curves and maintenance profiles.

operating_hours_per_year.label: Oلكلating الساعات لكل Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Total annual oلكلating الساعات. Typical industrial: 8000 الساعات (2 shifts, 5 الأيام).

load_factor.label: معامل الحمل (Average % of Full Load)
load_factor.placeholder: أدخل معامل الحمل (Average % of Full Load)
load_factor.helper: Average لكلcentage of full load capacity at which the compressor opeالمعدلs. Includes part-load and unloaded لكلiods.

electricity_cost_per_kwh.label: Electricity التكلفة
electricity_cost_per_kwh.helper: Blended average التكلفة لكل kWh including demand charges. Typical range $0.05-$0.30.

leakage_percentage.label: Estimated System Leakage
leakage_percentage.helper: لكلcentage of compressed air lost through leaks. Typical industrial systems: 20-30%.

pressure_setpoint.label: System الضغط Setpoint
pressure_setpoint.helper: Oلكلating الضغط at the compressor discharge. Higher الضغط increases الطاقة الاستهلاك by ~1% لكل 0.1 bar.

ambient_temperature.label: Average Ambient Temلكلature
ambient_temperature.helper: Average ambient temلكلature at compressor intake. Higher temلكلature reduces air الكثافة and increases القدرة.

has_vsd.label: Variable Speed Drive (VSD) Installed
has_vsd.helper: VSD can reduce الطاقة الاستهلاك by 15-35% under part-load conditions.

maintenance_quality.label: Maintenance Quality Level
maintenance_quality.helper: Maintenance quality affects efficiency, leakage, and الضغط drop. Poor maintenance can increase الطاقة use by 10-20%.

length_cm.label: الطول (cm)
length_cm.helper: Physical الطول من package in centimeters. ISO 1:2016 standard for geometric product specifications.

width_cm.label: العرض (cm)
width_cm.helper: Physical العرض من package in centimeters.

height_cm.label: الارتفاع (cm)
height_cm.helper: Physical الارتفاع من package in centimeters.

actual_weight_kg.label: Actual الوزن (kg)
actual_weight_kg.helper: Gross الوزن من package including packaging. لكل ISO 80000-4:2006.

carrier_factor.label: Carrier DIM Factor
carrier_factor.helper: الحجمtric المقسوم المستخدم by carrier (e.g., FedEx/UPS: 5000, DHL: 5000, Air freight: 6000). WERC standard.

package_type.label: Package Type
package_type.helper: Type of packaging influences dimensional stability and handling. Lean packaging standard.

is_stackable.label: Stackable
is_stackable.helper: Indicates if package can be stacked. Affects storage الكثافة and handling التكلفة. Six Sigma المادة التدفق optimization.

hazardous_material.label: Hazardous المادة
hazardous_material.helper: Indicates if contents are hazardous (IMO/ADR/IATA). Affects surcharges and handling restrictions.

distance_km.label: Route المسافة (km)
distance_km.helper: Total one-way المسافة من route. المستخدم as primary driver for الوقود, labor, and maintenance التكلفةs.

fuel_consumption_l_per_100km.label: الوقود الاستهلاك (L/100km)
fuel_consumption_l_per_100km.helper: Average الوقود الاستهلاك من vehicle. Based on manufacturer data or telematics.

fuel_price_per_l.label: الوقود السعر (لكل liter)
fuel_price_per_l.helper: التيار market السعر of diesel or gasoline. Updated weekly.

driver_wage_per_hour.label: Driver Wage (€/hour)
driver_wage_per_hour.helper: Gross hourly wage including social charges. Based on collective labor agreements.

average_speed_kmh.label: Average Speed (km/h)
average_speed_kmh.helper: Expected average speed including traffic and stops. يُستخدم لحساب travel الوقت.

maintenance_cost_per_km.label: Maintenance التكلفة (€/km)
maintenance_cost_per_km.helper: Average maintenance التكلفة لكل kilometer including tires, oil, and repairs. Based on fleet data.

toll_cost_total.label: Total Toll التكلفة (€)
toll_cost_total.helper: Sum of all الرسوم on the route. Can be obtained from route planning software.

load_weight_tonnes.label: Load الوزن (tonnes)
load_weight_tonnes.helper: Total الوزن of cargo. Affects الوقود الاستهلاك and wear.

route_type.label: Route Type
route_type.helper: Characterizes the terrain and traffic conditions. Influences الوقود الاستهلاك and speed.

is_return_trip.label: Return Trip Included
is_return_trip.helper: If true, المسافة and التكلفةs are doubled (round trip).

distance_km.label: المسافة (km)
distance_km.helper: Total route المسافة from origin to destination, المستخدم for الوقود and الوقت التكلفة calculations.

fuel_cost_per_liter.label: الوقود التكلفة لكل Liter
fuel_cost_per_liter.helper: التيار average الوقود السعر لكل liter, directly impacts variable النقل التكلفة.

fuel_efficiency_kmpl.label: الوقود Efficiency (km/L)
fuel_efficiency_kmpl.helper: Vehicle الوقود الاستهلاك المعدل in kilometers لكل liter, key for الوقود التكلفة estimation.

driver_wage_per_hour.label: Driver Wage لكل Hour
driver_wage_per_hour.helper: Hourly wage من driver, including benefits and overtime provisions.

average_speed_kmph.label: Average Speed (km/h)
average_speed_kmph.helper: Expected average travel speed including traffic and stops, المستخدم to compute travel الوقت.

load_weight_kg.label: Load الوزن (kg)
load_weight_kg.helper: Total الوزن of cargo, affects الوقود الاستهلاك and handling التكلفةs.

handling_cost_per_kg.label: Handling التكلفة لكل kg
handling_cost_per_kg.helper: التكلفة for loading/unloading and warehouse handling لكل kilogram of cargo.

vehicle_maintenance_per_km.label: Vehicle Maintenance لكل km
vehicle_maintenance_per_km.helper: Average maintenance التكلفة لكل kilometer, including tires, oil, and repairs.

toll_cost.label: Toll التكلفة
toll_cost.helper: Total toll charges along the route, if applicable.

insurance_rate_per_kg.label: Insurance المعدل لكل kg
insurance_rate_per_kg.helper: Insurance premium لكل kilogram of cargo القيمة, covering risk during transit.

overhead_percentage.label: Overhead لكلcentage
overhead_percentage.helper: Indirect التكلفةs (administration, IT, facilities) as a لكلcentage of direct التكلفةs.

is_express_delivery.label: Express Delivery
is_express_delivery.helper: If true, applies a premium multiplier to reflect expedited service التكلفةs.

delivery_zone.label: Delivery Zone
delivery_zone.helper: Geographic zone classification affecting last-mile complexity and التكلفة multipliers.

shipment_weight_kg.label: Shipment الوزن (kg)
shipment_weight_kg.helper: Total الوزن من shipment, including packaging. المستخدم for المعدل base and dimensional الوزن calculations.

shipment_volume_cbm.label: Shipment الحجم (cbm)
shipment_volume_cbm.helper: Total cubic meters من shipment. المستخدم for dimensional الوزن factor and space utilization analysis.

distance_km.label: المسافة (km)
distance_km.helper: Total النقل المسافة from origin to destination. Influences الوقود surcharge and الوقت-based التكلفةs.

transport_mode.label: النقل Mode
transport_mode.helper: Mode of النقل. Each mode has distinct التكلفة structures, risk profiles, and carbon impact.

fuel_surcharge_percent.label: الوقود Surcharge (%)
fuel_surcharge_percent.helper: لكلcentage applied to base freight المعدل to account for الوقود السعر variability. Typically indexed to DOE or IATA.

accessorial_charges_usd.label: Accessorial Charges (USD)
accessorial_charges_usd.helper: Additional fees for liftgate, residential delivery, inside delivery, detention, etc.

density_factor.label: الكثافة Factor (kg/cbm)
density_factor.helper: Actual الكثافة من shipment. المستخدم to compare against breakpoints for LTL class or airfreight chargeable الوزن.

is_hazardous.label: Hazardous المادة
is_hazardous.helper: Indicates if shipment contains dangerous goods. Triggers additional compliance and handling fees.

is_expedited.label: Expedited Service
is_expedited.helper: If true, applies a premium multiplier for الوقت-definite delivery.

purchase_price.label: Purchase السعر (USD)
purchase_price.helper: Initial acquisition التكلفة من vehicle, including taxes and fees.

residual_value.label: Residual القيمة (USD)
residual_value.helper: Estimated market القيمة من vehicle at the end من holding لكلiod.

holding_period_years.label: Holding لكلiod (السنوات)
holding_period_years.helper: Expected number of السنوات the vehicle will be owned and المستخدم.

annual_mileage.label: Annual Mileage (miles)
annual_mileage.helper: Average miles driven لكل year, directly impacts wear and depreciation.

depreciation_method.label: Depreciation Method
depreciation_method.helper: Accounting method المستخدم to allocate depreciation expense over the holding لكلiod.

maintenance_cost_per_year.label: Annual Maintenance التكلفة (USD)
maintenance_cost_per_year.helper: Average yearly expenditure on repairs, tires, and routine servicing.

fuel_efficiency_mpg.label: الوقود Efficiency (MPG)
fuel_efficiency_mpg.helper: Miles لكل gallon, المستخدم to estimate الوقود التكلفة and Total التكلفة of ownership.

fuel_price_per_gallon.label: الوقود السعر لكل Gallon (USD)
fuel_price_per_gallon.helper: التيار or projected average الوقود السعر for the vehicle's الوقود type.

insurance_cost_per_year.label: Annual Insurance التكلفة (USD)
insurance_cost_per_year.helper: Yearly premium for comprehensive and liability coverage.

discount_rate.label: Discount المعدل (%)
discount_rate.helper: Annual discount المعدل المستخدم for صافي present القيمة calculations (التكلفة of capital).

vehicle_type.label: Vehicle Type
vehicle_type.helper: Category of vehicle, influences depreciation curves and maintenance patterns.

crop_type.label: Crop Type
crop_type.helper: Deالمدةines the nitrogen (N), phosphorus (P), and potassium (K) uptake coefficients from agronomic tables.

target_yield.label: الهدف Yield
target_yield.helper: Expected harvest لكل hectare, يُستخدم لحساب total nutrient demand.

soil_nitrogen.label: Soil Nitrogen (N) Content
soil_nitrogen.helper: Measured from soil test; influences the المبلغ of N fertilizer needed.

soil_phosphorus.label: Soil Phosphorus (P) Content
soil_phosphorus.helper: Measured from soil test; influences the المبلغ of P fertilizer needed.

soil_potassium.label: Soil Potassium (K) Content
soil_potassium.helper: Measured from soil test; influences the المبلغ of K fertilizer needed.

application_efficiency.label: Application Efficiency Factor
application_efficiency.helper: لكلcentage of applied fertilizer that is actually taken up by the crop; affected by method, timing, and weather.

fertilizer_type_n.label: Nitrogen Fertilizer Type
fertilizer_type_n.helper: Diffeإيجار sources have diffeإيجار N concentration and loss characteristics.

fertilizer_type_p.label: Phosphorus Fertilizer Type
fertilizer_type_p.helper: Diffeإيجار sources have diffeإيجار P concentration and solubility.

fertilizer_type_k.label: Potassium Fertilizer Type
fertilizer_type_k.helper: Diffeإيجار sources have diffeإيجار K concentration and salt index.

soil_moisture.label: Soil Moisture Content
soil_moisture.helper: Affects nutrient التوفر and leaching risk; المستخدم in loss adjustment.

rainfall_forecast.label: Rainfall Forecast (next 7 الأيام)
rainfall_forecast.helper: Expected precipitation; high rainfall increases N loss via leaching and denitrification.

organic_matter.label: Soil Organic Matter
organic_matter.helper: Contributes to nutrient supply; higher OM reduces fertilizer requirement.

target_population.label: الهدف Plant Population (plants/ha)
target_population.helper: Desired final stand count لكل hectare based on agronomic recommendations and yield goals.

germination_rate.label: Germination المعدل (%)
germination_rate.helper: لكلcentage of seeds expected to germinate under optimal conditions, typically from seed lot analysis.

field_emergence_factor.label: Field Emergence Factor (%)
field_emergence_factor.helper: Expected لكلcentage of germinated seeds that emerge as healthy seedlings, accounting for soil conditions, pests, and weather.

seed_weight.label: Seed الوزن (g لكل 1000 seeds)
seed_weight.helper: Thousand kernel الوزن (TKW) from seed supplier or lab test, المستخدم to convert seed count to mass.

row_spacing.label: Row Spacing (cm)
row_spacing.helper: المسافة between planting rows, typically set by planter configuration and crop type.

planter_efficiency.label: Planter Efficiency (%)
planter_efficiency.helper: Oلكلational efficiency من planter accounting for skips, doubles, and mechanical losses (Lean OEE metric).

seed_cost_per_unit.label: Seed التكلفة لكل Unit ($/kg)
seed_cost_per_unit.helper: Purchase السعر of seed لكل kilogram, المستخدم for economic analysis.

expected_yield_value.label: Expected Yield القيمة ($/tonne)
expected_yield_value.helper: Market السعر لكل tonne of harvested crop, المستخدم for ROI calculations.

soil_type.label: Soil Type
soil_type.helper: Soil texture classification affecting emergence factor and recommended seeding العمق.

irrigation_available.label: Irrigation Available
irrigation_available.helper: Indicates if supplemental irrigation is المستخدم, influencing emergence and الهدف population.

water_volume.label: Annual water الحجم المستخدم
water_volume.helper: Total الحجم of water withdrawn for irrigation لكل year.

water_cost_per_m3.label: Water التكلفة لكل m³
water_cost_per_m3.helper: Unit التكلفة of water including extraction, treatment, and delivery.

energy_cost_per_kwh.label: الطاقة التكلفة لكل kWh
energy_cost_per_kwh.helper: Average electricity التكلفة for pumping and distribution.

pump_efficiency.label: Pump system efficiency
pump_efficiency.helper: Overall efficiency of pump and motor system (ISO 9906).

distribution_losses.label: Distribution losses
distribution_losses.helper: لكلcentage of water lost due to leaks, evaporation, and runoff.

labor_hours_per_year.label: Annual Labor الساعات for irrigation
labor_hours_per_year.placeholder: أدخل Annual Labor الساعات for irrigation
labor_hours_per_year.helper: Total Labor الساعات dedicated to irrigation oلكلation and maintenance.

maintenance_cost.label: Annual maintenance التكلفة
maintenance_cost.helper: Total annual التكلفة for repairs, parts, and servicing.

crop_value_per_ha.label: Crop القيمة لكل hectare
crop_value_per_ha.helper: Average revenue geneالمعدلd لكل hectare from irrigated crops.

system_type.label: Irrigation system type
system_type.helper: Type of irrigation system affecting efficiency and التكلفة structure.

water_source.label: Water source
water_source.helper: Source of water influencing التكلفة and sustainability.

has_automation.label: Automation system installed
has_automation.helper: Indicates presence of automated scheduling or sensor-based control.

feed_intake_kg.label: Daily feed intake لكل animal (kg)
feed_intake_kg.placeholder: أدخل Daily feed intake لكل animal (kg)
feed_intake_kg.helper: Average daily feed الاستهلاك لكل animal, based on species and growth stage.

raw_material_cost_per_kg.label: Raw المادة التكلفة لكل kg
raw_material_cost_per_kg.placeholder: أدخل Raw المادة التكلفة لكل kg
raw_material_cost_per_kg.helper: التكلفة of primary feed ingredients (corn, soybean meal, etc.) لكل kilogram.

processing_loss_percent.label: Processing loss (%)
processing_loss_percent.helper: لكلcentage of raw المادة lost during milling, mixing, pelleting, or storage.

moisture_adjustment_factor.label: Moisture adjustment factor
moisture_adjustment_factor.helper: Correction factor for moisture content variation in raw المادةs (1.0 = standard).

quality_grade.label: Quality grade
quality_grade.helper: Grade of feed based on nutrient الكثافة and consistency (premium, standard, economy).

include_transport_cost.label: Include النقل التكلفة?
include_transport_cost.helper: If true, adds a fixed النقل surcharge لكل kg of feed.

material_cost_per_kg.label: المادة التكلفة لكل kg
material_cost_per_kg.helper: Direct المادة التكلفة لكل kilogram من primary ingredient, sourced from supplier contracts or market index.

recipe_yield_percent.label: Recipe Yield (%)
recipe_yield_percent.helper: لكلcentage of usable output after processing losses (e.g., evaporation, trimming). Based on historical process data.

labor_rate_per_hour.label: Labor المعدل لكل Hour
labor_rate_per_hour.helper: Fully burdened labor التكلفة لكل oلكلator hour, including wages, benefits, and overhead.

batch_size_kg.label: Batch Size (kg)
batch_size_kg.helper: Total إدخال الوزن من recipe batch before processing.

processing_time_minutes.label: Processing الوقت (minutes)
processing_time_minutes.helper: Total cycle الوقت from start to finish for one batch, including mixing, heating, cooling, and packaging.

energy_cost_per_kwh.label: الطاقة التكلفة لكل kWh
energy_cost_per_kwh.helper: Average التكلفة of electricity or thermal الطاقة لكل kilowatt-hour, based on utility المعدلs.

energy_consumption_kwh.label: الطاقة الاستهلاك (kWh)
energy_consumption_kwh.helper: Total الطاقة المستخدمة لكل batch, measured by submeters or equipment nameplate ratings.

overhead_rate_percent.label: Overhead المعدل (%)
overhead_rate_percent.helper: Allocated manufacturing overhead as a لكلcentage of direct labor and المادة التكلفةs, following standard التكلفة accounting.

waste_disposal_cost_per_kg.label: الهدر Disposal التكلفة لكل kg

body_fat_percent.helper: المستخدم for lean body mass estimation (DEXA or skinfold لكل ISAK standards). If null, default estimation is applied.

activity_factor.label: Activity Factor (PAL)
activity_factor.helper: Physical Activity Level لكل WHO/FAO/UNU exلكلt consultation (2004). المستخدم for total الطاقة expenditure estimation.

measurement_confidence.label: Measurement Confidence Level
measurement_confidence.helper: Subjective assessment of إدخال data quality (e.g., calibالمعدلd equipment, self-reported vs. lab). Influences dataConfidenceAdjusted output.

gender.label: Gender
gender.helper: Biological sex المستخدم in anthropometric regression models (ISO 7250-1).

age.label: Age
age.helper: Age affects body composition and metabolic المعدل (Six Sigma DMAIC phase: Measure).

height.label: الارتفاع
height.helper: Stature measurement لكل ISO 7250-1 for normalization.

weight.label: الوزن
weight.helper: Body mass for BMI and fat mass calculations.

neckcircumference.label: Neck Circumference
neckcircumference.helper: Key إدخال for body الكثافة estimation (Navy method, Lean Six Sigma MSA).

waistcircumference.label: Waist Circumference
waistcircumference.helper: Abdominal girth for visceral fat risk (WERC ergonomic guidelines).

hipcircumference.label: Hip Circumference
hipcircumference.helper: Required for female body fat calculation (ISO 20685).

activitylevel.label: Activity Level
activitylevel.helper: Physical activity multiplier for الطاقة expenditure (Lean Kaizen continuous improvement).

bolt_grade.label: Bolt Grade / Proلكلty Class
bolt_grade.helper: Defines yield and tensile strength لكل ISO 898-1.

thread_pitch.label: Thread Pitch (P)
thread_pitch.helper: المسافة between thread crests. Coarse or fine.

friction_coefficient_thread.label: Friction Coefficient (Thread)
friction_coefficient_thread.helper: µ_th: affects torque-preload relationship. Typical range 0.08-0.20 for lubricated steel.

friction_coefficient_head.label: Friction Coefficient (Head/Nut face)
friction_coefficient_head.helper: µ_h: underhead or nut face friction. Higher القيمةs reduce preload efficiency.

preload_percentage.label: الهدف Preload (% of Yield)
preload_percentage.helper: Typical assembly preload الهدف. ISO 898 recommends 70-80% for static joints.

lubrication_condition.label: Lubrication Condition
lubrication_condition.helper: Affects friction coefficients and torque scatter.

temperature.label: Oلكلating Temلكلature
temperature.helper: High temلكلature reduces yield strength and alters friction.

use_washers.label: Use Washers (Under Head & Nut)
use_washers.helper: Washers reduce embedment and distribute load.

bottleneck_utilization.label: Bottleneck Utilization (%)
bottleneck_utilization.helper: التيار utilization المعدل من primary bottleneck resource, measured over a representative لكلiod (e.g., last 4 weeks).

demand_rate.label: Average Demand المعدل (units/hour)
demand_rate.helper: Average customer demand المعدل for the product family التدفقing through the bottleneck.

bottleneck_capacity.label: Bottleneck Capacity (units/hour)
bottleneck_capacity.helper: Maximum theoretical output المعدل من bottleneck resource under ideal conditions.

investment_cost.label: Proposed Investment التكلفة ($)
investment_cost.helper: Total capital expenditure required for the bottleneck improvement (e.g., new equipment, tooling, automation).

expected_capacity_increase.label: Expected Capacity Increase (%)
expected_capacity_increase.helper: Expected لكلcentage increase in bottleneck capacity after the investment.

operating_hours_per_year.label: Oلكلating الساعات لكل Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Total planned oلكلating الساعات من bottleneck resource لكل year.

profit_margin_per_unit.label: Profit Margin لكل Unit ($)
profit_margin_per_unit.helper: Contribution margin (revenue minus Variable التكلفة) لكل unit of product التدفقing through the bottleneck.

quality_yield.label: Quality Yield at Bottleneck (%)
quality_yield.helper: First-pass yield (لكلcentage of وحدات جيدة) at the bottleneck oلكلation.

maintenance_downtime_percent.label: Planned Maintenance Downtime (%)
maintenance_downtime_percent.helper: لكلcentage of total oلكلating الوقت allocated to planned maintenance for the bottleneck.

risk_factor.label: Implementation Risk Factor
risk_factor.helper: Qualitative assessment من risk that the investment will not achieve the expected capacity increase.

fixedcosts.label: Total Fixed التكلفةs
fixedcosts.helper: Sum of all fixed expenses (إيجار, salaries, insurance) لكل لكلiod.

variablecostperunit.label: Variable التكلفة لكل Unit
variablecostperunit.helper: Direct المادة, labor, and overhead لكل unit.

actualsalesvolume.label: Actual Sales الحجم
actualsalesvolume.helper: Number of units actually sold in the لكلiod.

capacityvolume.label: Maximum Capacity الحجم
capacityvolume.helper: Theoretical maximum output under normal oلكلating conditions.

demanduncertainty.label: Demand Uncertainty Factor
demanduncertainty.helper: Expected لكلcentage variation in demand (coefficient of variation).

costescalationrate.label: التكلفة Escalation المعدل
costescalationrate.helper: Annual expected increase in Variable التكلفةs (inflation, supplier pricing).

includetax.label: Include Tax Effect
includetax.helper: If true, tax المعدل إدخال is required and after-tax break-even is calculated.

taxrate.label: Tax المعدل
taxrate.helper: Effective corpoالمعدل tax المعدل, المستخدم only when includeTax is true.

calibration_interval_days.label: Calibration Interval (الأيام)
calibration_interval_days.helper: Standard calibration frequency لكل ISO 17025 or manufacturer recommendation.

days_since_last_calibration.label: الأيام Since Last Calibration
days_since_last_calibration.helper: Actual elapsed الوقت since the most recent calibration event.

measurement_tolerance_pct.label: Measurement Tolerance (%)
measurement_tolerance_pct.helper: Maximum allowable deviation from nominal القيمة, typically defined by process specs or Six Sigma limits.

observed_drift_pct.label: Observed Drift (%)
observed_drift_pct.helper: Measured deviation from nominal at last verification, expressed as لكلcentage of full scale.

environmental_stress_factor.label: Environmental Stress Factor
environmental_stress_factor.helper: Qualitative assessment of temلكلature, humidity, vibration, and contamination effects on drift المعدل.

criticality_level.label: Criticality Level
criticality_level.helper: Impact of measurement error on product quality, safety, or regulatory compliance (لكل ISO 9001 risk-based thinking).

historical_failure_rate.label: Historical Failure المعدل (لكل 100 calibrations)
historical_failure_rate.helper: Number of times the instrument exceeded tolerance in the last 100 calibration events, المستخدم for reliability trending.

data_confidence_score.label: Data Confidence Score (0-100)
data_confidence_score.helper: Subjective or calculated measure of data quality based on measurement system analysis (MSA) لكل AIAG MSA manual.

age.label: Age
age.helper: Age affects basal metabolic المعدل (BMR) due to changes in lean body mass and hormonal factors.

gender.label: Gender
gender.helper: Gender influences BMR through الفرقs in body composition and hormonal profiles.

weight.label: الوزن
weight.helper: Body الوزن is a primary driver of الطاقة expenditure and calorie needs.

height.label: الارتفاع
height.helper: الارتفاع is المستخدم in BMR equations to estimate lean body mass and metabolic المعدل.

activitylevel.label: Activity Level
activitylevel.helper: Physical activity multiplier adjusts TDEE based on occupational and exercise habits.

goalrate.label: الوزن Loss المعدل
goalrate.helper: Desired weekly الوزن loss المعدل deالمدةines the daily calorie deficit الهدف.

bodyfatpercent.label: Body Fat لكلcentage
bodyfatpercent.helper: Optional إدخال for more accuالمعدل BMR estimation using the Katch-McArdle formula.

ispregnant.label: Pregnant
ispregnant.helper: Pregnancy increases الطاقة requirements; deficit is not recommended during pregnancy.

islactating.label: Lactating
islactating.helper: Lactation adds ~500 kcal/day to الطاقة needs; deficit must be adjusted.

electricity_kwh.label: Electricity الاستهلاك
electricity_kwh.helper: Annual electricity usage from utility bills or submeters. Scope 2 emission source.

natural_gas_therms.label: Natural Gas الاستهلاك
natural_gas_therms.helper: Annual natural gas usage from utility bills. Scope 1 emission source.

fuel_diesel_liters.label: Diesel الوقود الاستهلاك (Fleet)
fuel_diesel_liters.helper: Annual diesel الاستهلاك for owned fleet vehicles. Scope 1 emission source.

fuel_gasoline_liters.label: Gasoline الوقود الاستهلاك (Fleet)
fuel_gasoline_liters.helper: Annual gasoline الاستهلاك for owned fleet vehicles. Scope 1 emission source.

waste_tonnes.label: الهدر Geneالمعدلd
waste_tonnes.helper: Total الهدر sent to landfill or incineration. Scope 3 emission source.

business_travel_km.label: Business Travel (Air & Rail)
business_travel_km.helper: Annual المسافة traveled by الموظفون for business purposes (air, rail). Scope 3 emission source.

region.label: Oلكلational Region
region.helper: Geographic region deالمدةines emission factors for electricity grid and الوقود standards.

data_quality_score.label: Data Quality Score (1-5)
data_quality_score.helper: Subjective score of إدخال data reliability: 1=estimated, 3=measured, 5=audited. المستخدم for confidence adjustment.

energy_consumption.label: Total الطاقة الاستهلاك
energy_consumption.helper: Annual electrical الطاقة المستخدمة by the facility (ISO 50001).

energy_source.label: Primary الطاقة Source
energy_source.helper: The dominant source of electricity (grid mix, solar, wind, natural gas).

fuel_consumption.label: Fossil الوقود الاستهلاك (Fleet & Heating)
fuel_consumption.helper: Total diesel, gasoline, or heating oil المستخدم annually (Scope 1 emissions).

waste_generated.label: Total الهدر Geneالمعدلd
waste_generated.helper: Annual الهدر sent to landfill or incineration (WERC guidelines).

recycling_rate.label: Recycling المعدل
recycling_rate.helper: لكلcentage of الهدر that is recycled or composted (Lean green metrics).

production_volume.label: Annual Production الحجم
production_volume.helper: Total units produced لكل year (for intensity-based benchmarking).

transport_distance.label: Average النقل المسافة لكل Unit
transport_distance.placeholder: أدخل Average النقل المسافة لكل Unit
transport_distance.helper: Average المسافة raw المادةs or finished goods travel (logistics carbon).

has_carbon_offset_program.label: Active Carbon Offset Program
has_carbon_offset_program.helper: Indicates if the organization purchases verified carbon credits.

total_imported_tonnes.label: Total Imported Tonnes (steel/aluminum/cement/fertilizer/hydrogen)
total_imported_tonnes.helper: Total mass of CBAM-covered goods imported in the reporting لكلiod.

embedded_emissions_per_tonne.label: Embedded Emissions لكل Tonne
embedded_emissions_per_tonne.helper: Direct and indirect GHG emissions embedded in the imported goods (scope 1+2).

carbon_price_origin.label: سعر الكربون Paid in Country of Origin
carbon_price_origin.placeholder: أدخل سعر الكربون Paid in Country of Origin
carbon_price_origin.helper: Effective سعر الكربون already paid in the exporting country (e.g., EU ETS equivalent).

cbam_certificate_price.label: CBAM Certificate السعر (التيار auction)
cbam_certificate_price.helper: Latest weekly average auction السعر of CBAM certificates.

free_allocation_factor.label: Free Allocation Factor for Sector
free_allocation_factor.placeholder: أدخل Free Allocation Factor for Sector
free_allocation_factor.helper: Proportion of emissions covered by free allowances in the EU ETS for the product sector.

verification_status.label: Verification Status of Embedded Emissions
verification_status.placeholder: أدخل Verification Status of Embedded Emissions
verification_status.helper: Whether the embedded emissions data has been independently verified by an accredited body.

compliance_deadline_met.label: Compliance Deadline Met (quarterly report submitted)
compliance_deadline_met.placeholder: أدخل Compliance Deadline Met (quarterly report submitted)
compliance_deadline_met.helper: Indicates if the importer submitted the required CBAM report before the quarterly deadline.

annual_production_volume.label: Annual Production الحجم
annual_production_volume.helper: Total output من primary product (e.g., steel, cement, aluminum) in metric tons لكل year.

carbon_intensity.label: Carbon Intensity
carbon_intensity.helper: Direct and indirect greenhouse gas emissions لكل ton of product, based on ISO 14064 or GHG Protocol.

cbam_carbon_price.label: CBAM سعر الكربون
cbam_carbon_price.helper: Expected or التيار EU ETS allowance السعر المستخدم for CBAM certificate calculation.

free_allocation_percentage.label: Free Allocation لكلcentage
free_allocation_percentage.helper: لكلcentage of emissions covered by free allowances under CBAM transitional rules.

production_efficiency_index.label: Production Efficiency Index
production_efficiency_index.helper: الفعالية الإجمالية للمعدات (OEE) or similar lean metric; higher القيمةs reduce الهدر and emissions.

compliance_readiness_score.label: Compliance Readiness Score
compliance_readiness_score.helper: Assessment of data collection, reporting systems, and verification readiness لكل CBAM requirements.

industry_benchmark_intensity.label: Industry Benchmark Intensity
industry_benchmark_intensity.helper: Best available technology (BAT) or sector average carbon intensity for benchmarking (ISO 50001).

emission_scope.label: Emission Scope
emission_scope.helper: Defines which emission scopes are included in the carbon intensity calculation.

use_verified_data.label: Use Verified Data Only
use_verified_data.helper: If true, only data from verified sources (e.g., accredited verifier) is المستخدم; otherwise estimated data may be included.

celsius_input.label: Temلكلature in Celsius
celsius_input.helper: Process temلكلature reading from sensor or manual measurement. Must be above absolute zero.

sensor_accuracy.label: Sensor Accuracy (±°C)
sensor_accuracy.helper: Manufacturer-specified accuracy من temلكلature sensor (ISO 17025 calibration standard).

calibration_offset.label: Calibration Offset
calibration_offset.helper: Field calibration adjustment to align sensor with reference standard (NIST traceable).

unit_system.label: الهدف Unit System
unit_system.helper: اختر output temلكلature scale for downstream process or reporting (ISO 80000-5).

enable_alerts.label: Enable Process Alerts
enable_alerts.helper: Toggle threshold-based alerts for out-of-spec temلكلature conditions (Six Sigma control limits).

changeover_time_matrix.label: Changeover الوقت Matrix (minutes)
changeover_time_matrix.helper: Average الوقت to switch from one product to another within the same production line. Based on SMED (Single-Minute Exchange of Die) standards.

number_of_changeovers_per_month.label: Number of Changeovers لكل Month
number_of_changeovers_per_month.placeholder: أدخل Number of Changeovers لكل Month
number_of_changeovers_per_month.helper: Total changeovers لكلformed monthly across all shifts. يُستخدم لحساب total changeover downtime.

setup_external_time.label: External الإعداد الوقت لكل Changeover (minutes)
setup_external_time.placeholder: أدخل External الإعداد الوقت لكل Changeover (minutes)
setup_external_time.helper: الإعداد activities that can be لكلformed while the machine is running (e.g., tool preparation). الهدف for SMED optimization.

setup_internal_time.label: Internal الإعداد الوقت لكل Changeover (minutes)
setup_internal_time.placeholder: أدخل Internal الإعداد الوقت لكل Changeover (minutes)
setup_internal_time.helper: الإعداد activities that require the machine to be stopped. Primary الهدف for reduction via SMED.

product_family_count.label: Number of Product Families
product_family_count.helper: Distinct product groups processed on the line. Higher counts increase changeover complexity.

standard_deviation_changeover_time.label: Standard Deviation of Changeover الوقت (minutes)
standard_deviation_changeover_time.placeholder: أدخل Standard Deviation of Changeover الوقت (minutes)
standard_deviation_changeover_time.helper: Measure of variability in changeover times. المستخدم for Six Sigma process capability analysis.

shift_pattern.label: Shift Pattern
shift_pattern.helper: Oلكلating schedule affecting available production الوقت and changeover frequency.

lean_smed_implemented.label: SMED Implementation Status
lean_smed_implemented.helper: Indicates whether Single-Minute Exchange of Die principles have been formally applied.

target_changeover_time.label: الهدف Changeover الوقت (minutes)
target_changeover_time.helper: SMED الهدف for changeover الوقت reduction. Typically <10 minutes for world-class الأداء.

cutting_speed.label: Cutting Speed (Vc)
cutting_speed.helper: ISO 8688-1: Surface speed من cutting tool relative to workpiece.

tool_overhang.label: Tool Overhang (L)
tool_overhang.helper: ISO 3685: Free الطول of tool holder; affects stiffness.

tool_diameter.label: Tool القطر (D)
tool_diameter.helper: ISO 3685: Cutter القطر for milling or turning insert القطر.

workpiece_material_hardness.label: Workpiece المادة Hardness
workpiece_material_hardness.helper: ISO 18265: Brinell hardness; affects cutting force and chatter.

machine_spindle_power.label: Machine Spindle القدرة (P_m)
machine_spindle_power.helper: ISO 841: المعدلd القدرة من spindle motor.

machine_damping_ratio.label: Machine Damping Ratio (ζ)
machine_damping_ratio.helper: ISO 10816: Structural damping; 0.02-0.08 typical for machine tools.

tool_material.label: Tool المادة
tool_material.helper: ISO 513: Tool substالمعدل affects wear and stiffness.

coolant_application.label: Coolant Application
coolant_application.helper: ISO 13743: Flood coolant reduces thermal effects and can alter chatter.

total_sq_ft.label: Total المساحة (sq ft)
total_sq_ft.helper: Total cleanable مساحة الأرضية in أقدام مربعة. Basis for all labor and المادة calculations.

cleaning_frequency.label: Cleaning Frequency لكل Week
cleaning_frequency.helper: Number of times the facility is cleaned لكل week. Affects labor and consumable usage.

labor_rate_per_hour.label: Labor المعدل ($/hour)
labor_rate_per_hour.helper: Hourly wage for cleaning staff. Includes base pay, not burden.

labor_burden_percent.label: Labor Burden (%)
labor_burden_percent.helper: لكلcentage added to Labor المعدل for taxes, insurance, benefits. Typical range 15-35%.

productivity_sqft_per_hour.label: Productivity المعدل (sq ft/hour)
productivity_sqft_per_hour.helper: Average المساحة cleaned لكل لكلson لكل hour. Based on industry benchmarks (ISSA, BSCAI).

material_cost_per_sqft.label: المادة التكلفة ($/sq ft)
material_cost_per_sqft.helper: التكلفة of cleaning chemicals, paلكل, and مستهلكات لكل square foot لكل cleaning.

equipment_cost_per_sqft.label: Equipment التكلفة ($/sq ft)
equipment_cost_per_sqft.helper: Amortized equipment التكلفة (mops, vacuums, buffers) لكل square foot لكل cleaning.

overhead_percent.label: Overhead (%)
overhead_percent.helper: Indirect التكلفةs (management, office, insurance) as لكلcentage of direct التكلفةs.

desired_margin_percent.label: Desired Profit Margin (%)
desired_margin_percent.helper: الهدف صافي profit margin on the bid.

waste_factor_percent.label: الهدر Factor (%)
waste_factor_percent.helper: Allowance for المادة الهدر, rework, and inefficiency (Lean Six Sigma الهدر reduction).

quality_level.label: Quality Level
quality_level.helper: Service quality tier. Affects labor productivity and المادة usage. Healthcare adds 15% to labor.

use_lean_methods.label: Use Lean Methods (5S, Standard Work)
use_lean_methods.placeholder: أدخل Use Lean Methods (5S, Standard Work)
use_lean_methods.helper: If true, applies 10% productivity improvement via Lean techniques.

api_call_volume.label: Monthly API Call الحجم
api_call_volume.helper: Total number of API calls made لكل month, including successful and overrun calls.

overrun_rate.label: Overrun المعدل
overrun_rate.helper: لكلcentage of API calls that exceed the agreed response الوقت threshold (e.g., >200ms).

avg_overrun_duration.label: Average Overrun المدة
avg_overrun_duration.helper: Average extra الوقت beyond the SLA threshold for overrun calls.

cost_per_call.label: التكلفة لكل API Call
cost_per_call.helper: Direct التكلفة لكل API call (compute, صافيwork, storage).

retry_cost_per_call.label: Retry التكلفة لكل Call
retry_cost_per_call.helper: Additional التكلفة incurred when a call is retried due to timeout or error.

retry_rate.label: Retry المعدل
retry_rate.helper: لكلcentage of overrun calls that trigger a retry.

data_egress_gb.label: Monthly Data Egress
data_egress_gb.helper: Total data transferred out من cloud لكل month.

egress_cost_per_gb.label: Egress التكلفة لكل GB
egress_cost_per_gb.helper: التكلفة لكل GB of data egress (varies by provider and region).

sla_penalty_percentage.label: SLA Penalty لكلcentage
sla_penalty_percentage.helper: لكلcentage of monthly service fee credited as penalty if SLA is breached.

monthly_service_fee.label: Monthly Service Fee
monthly_service_fee.helper: Base monthly fee paid to the cloud provider.

overrun_threshold_ms.label: Overrun Threshold (SLA)
overrun_threshold_ms.helper: Maximum acceptable response الوقت لكل the SLA.

region.label: Cloud Region
region.helper: Geographic region من cloud service, affects egress التكلفةs and latency.

include_hidden_costs.label: Include Hidden التكلفةs (e.g., opportunity loss)
include_hidden_costs.placeholder: أدخل Include Hidden التكلفةs (e.g., opportunity loss)
include_hidden_costs.helper: If true, adds estimated hidden التكلفةs like customer churn and brand impact.

total_cloud_spend.label: Total Cloud Spend (Monthly)
total_cloud_spend.helper: Total monthly cloud infrastructure التكلفة across all services.

compute_utilization_rate.label: Average Compute Utilization المعدل
compute_utilization_rate.helper: Average CPU/memory utilization across all compute instances.

storage_waste_percentage.label: Storage الهدر لكلcentage
storage_waste_percentage.helper: Estimated لكلcentage of storage that is orphaned, unالمستخدم, or over-provisioned.

idle_resource_count.label: Idle Resource Count
idle_resource_count.helper: Number of compute instances that have been idle for more than 7 الأيام.

data_transfer_out_gb.label: Monthly Data Transfer Out
data_transfer_out_gb.helper: Total outbound data transfer الحجم لكل month.

reserved_instance_coverage.label: Reserved Instance Coverage
reserved_instance_coverage.helper: لكلcentage of compute spend covered by reserved or savings plans.

rightsizing_opportunity_score.label: Rightsizing Opportunity Score
rightsizing_opportunity_score.helper: Aggregate score (0-100) indicating potential savings from instance type adjustments.

cloud_provider.label: Cloud Provider
cloud_provider.helper: Primary cloud provider for التكلفة analysis.

include_network_waste.label: Include صافيwork الهدر Analysis
include_network_waste.helper: Toggle to include صافيwork-related الهدر (e.g., data transfer, load balancer inefficiencies).

avg_order_value.label: Average Order القيمة (AOV)
avg_order_value.helper: Mean revenue لكل transaction. المستخدم in CLV calculation. Typical range: $20-$200 for B2C, $500-$5000 for B2B.

purchase_frequency.label: Purchase Frequency لكل Year
purchase_frequency.helper: Number of purchases لكل customer لكل year. Derived from historical data or cohort analysis.

customer_lifetime_years.label: Customer Lifetime (السنوات)
customer_lifetime_years.helper: Average retention لكلiod. For subscription models, use 1/churn المعدل.

gross_margin_pct.label: Gross Margin (%)
gross_margin_pct.helper: Profit margin after COGS. Typical range: 30-70% for product businesses, 60-90% for SaaS.

cac_total.label: Total Customer Acquisition التكلفة (CAC)
cac_total.helper: Sum of all marketing and sales التكلفةs divided by number of new customers. Includes ad spend, salaries, tools.

retention_rate.label: Annual Retention المعدل
retention_rate.helper: لكلcentage of customers retained year over year. المستخدم for churn adjustment. Industry benchmark: 60-90%.

discount_rate.label: Discount المعدل (Annual)
discount_rate.helper: التكلفة of capital or required المعدل of return. Typical range: 8-15%.

data_confidence.label: Data Confidence Level
data_confidence.helper: Subjective assessment of إدخال data reliability. Low = estimates, High = audited data.

include_churn_adjustment.label: Include Churn Adjustment
include_churn_adjustment.helper: If true, uses retention المعدل to adjust CLV for churn. Recommended for subscription models.

length_cm.label: الطول in Centimeters
length_cm.helper: Measured الطول in centimeters, typically from caliلكلs, rulers, or CAD models.

measurement_uncertainty.label: Measurement Uncertainty
measurement_uncertainty.helper: Estimated uncertainty من measurement (e.g., ±0.05 cm for standard caliلكلs).

conversion_precision.label: Conversion Precision
conversion_precision.helper: اختر conversion factor precision based on industry standard (ISO 80000-1, NIST).

tolerance_class.label: Tolerance Class
tolerance_class.helper: Tolerance class for dimensional inspection لكل ISO 2768. Affects alert thresholds.

unit_cost_per_inch.label: Unit التكلفة لكل Inch
unit_cost_per_inch.helper: التكلفة لكل inch of المادة or product, المستخدم for التكلفة estimation in Lean/Six Sigma projects.

batch_quantity.label: Batch الكمية
batch_quantity.helper: Number of units in the batch for Total التكلفة and الهدر calculations.

material_type.label: المادة Type
material_type.helper: المادة selection directly impacts tool wear, cutting speed, and التكلفة لكل part.

part_weight_kg.label: Part الوزن (kg)
part_weight_kg.helper: الوزن من finished part, يُستخدم لحساب raw المادة التكلفة and scrap.

stock_volume_cm3.label: Stock الحجم (cm³)
stock_volume_cm3.helper: الحجم of raw المادة block before machining, deالمدةines المادة usage.

machining_time_min.label: Machining الوقت (minutes)
machining_time_min.helper: Total cycle الوقت لكل part including cutting, tool changes, and rapid moves.

setup_time_min.label: الإعداد الوقت (minutes)
setup_time_min.helper: الوقت to fixture, align, and program the machine for the batch.

batch_size.label: Batch Size (parts)
batch_size.helper: Number of identical parts produced in one production run.

machine_hourly_rate_usd.label: Machine Hourly المعدل ($/hr)
machine_hourly_rate_usd.helper: Fully burdened machine التكلفة including depreciation, maintenance, and الطاقة.

labor_hourly_rate_usd.label: Labor Hourly المعدل ($/hr)
labor_hourly_rate_usd.helper: Oلكلator wage including overhead and benefits.

tooling_cost_per_part_usd.label: Tooling التكلفة لكل Part ($)
tooling_cost_per_part_usd.helper: Consumable tooling التكلفة allocated لكل part (inserts, drills, end mills).

overhead_percentage.label: Overhead لكلcentage (%)
overhead_percentage.helper: Facility, quality, and administrative overhead as a لكلcentage of direct التكلفةs.

scrap_rate_percent.label: Scrap المعدل (%)
scrap_rate_percent.helper: لكلcentage of parts that fail inspection and are scrapped.

material_cost_per_kg_usd.label: المادة التكلفة لكل kg ($/kg)
material_cost_per_kg_usd.helper: السعر of raw المادة لكل kilogram, varies by المادة type.

density_g_per_cm3.label: الكثافة (g/cm³)
density_g_per_cm3.helper: المادة الكثافة المستخدم to convert الحجم to الوزن.

annual_manual_labor_cost.label: Annual Manual Labor التكلفة (لكل FTE)
annual_manual_labor_cost.placeholder: أدخل Annual Manual Labor التكلفة (لكل FTE)
annual_manual_labor_cost.helper: Total annual التكلفة لكل full-الوقت equivalent worker including wages, benefits, and overhead.

number_of_workers.label: Number of Workers Replaced
number_of_workers.helper: Number of manual workers that could be replaced or augmented by one cobot.

cobot_purchase_price.label: Cobot Purchase السعر
cobot_purchase_price.helper: Initial capital expenditure for the cobot including end-effector and controller.

cobot_annual_maintenance.label: Cobot Annual Maintenance التكلفة
cobot_annual_maintenance.helper: Annual service contract, spare parts, and software updates.

cobot_lifespan_years.label: Cobot Lifespan
cobot_lifespan_years.helper: Expected oلكلational life before major overhaul or replacement.

discount_rate.label: Discount المعدل (WACC)
discount_rate.helper: الوزنed average التكلفة of capital for NPV calculation.

labor_productivity_factor.label: Manual Labor Productivity Factor
labor_productivity_factor.helper: Efficiency factor for manual labor (1.0 = 100% productive, 0.85 = typical with breaks/errors).

cobot_uptime_percent.label: Cobot Uptime
cobot_uptime_percent.helper: لكلcentage of scheduled الوقت the cobot is oلكلational (excluding planned maintenance).

shift_type.label: Shift Type
shift_type.helper: Number of shifts لكل day the cobot will opeالمعدل (manual labor typically single shift).

include_training_cost.label: Include Cobot Training التكلفة
include_training_cost.helper: Whether to include initial training and integration التكلفةs.

training_cost.label: Cobot Training & Integration التكلفة
training_cost.helper: One-الوقت التكلفة for programming, safety validation, and oلكلator training.

system_pressure.label: System الضغط
system_pressure.helper: Oلكلating الضغط من compressed air system; higher الضغط increases leak التدفق المعدل.

leak_diameter.label: Equivalent Leak القطر
leak_diameter.helper: القطر of a round orifice representing the average leak size. Common sizes: 1/8", 1/4", 1/2".

number_of_leaks.label: Number of Leaks
number_of_leaks.helper: Total number of identified or estimated leaks in the system.

operating_hours.label: Annual Oلكلating الساعات
operating_hours.helper: Total الساعات the compressor runs لكل year. Continuous oلكلation = 8760 h.

electricity_cost.label: Electricity التكلفة
electricity_cost.helper: Average blended التكلفة of electricity لكل kilowatt-hour.

compressor_efficiency.label: Compressor Efficiency
compressor_efficiency.helper: Overall efficiency من compressor system (motor + drive + compressor). Typical range 70-85%.

leak_type.label: Leak Type
leak_type.helper: Geometry من leak affects discharge coefficient. Round orifice is most common.

include_maintenance_cost.label: Include Maintenance التكلفة
include_maintenance_cost.helper: If true, adds estimated labor and المادة التكلفة for leak repair.

compressorflowrate.label: تدفق الضاغط المعدل
compressorflowrate.helper: المعدلd free air delivery من compressor at standard conditions.

demandflowrate.label: Average Demand التدفق المعدل
demandflowrate.helper: Average compressed air الاستهلاك من system.

systempressure.label: System Oلكلating الضغط
systempressure.helper: Nominal الضغط at which the system opeالمعدلs.

pressuredifferential.label: Allowable الضغط Diffeإيجارial
pressuredifferential.helper: Maximum acceptable الضغط drop during peak event.

compressorcontroltype.label: Compressor Control Type
compressorcontroltype.helper: Type of compressor capacity control, affects tank sizing factor.

ambienttemperature.label: Ambient Temلكلature
ambienttemperature.helper: Average ambient temلكلature at compressor location.

altitude.label: Altitude Above Sea Level
altitude.helper: Site elevation for air الكثافة correction.

systemleakagepercent.label: System Leakage Estimate
systemleakagepercent.helper: Estimated لكلcentage of compressed air lost to leaks.

applicationtype.label: Application Type
applicationtype.helper: Primary use case, influences safety factor.

container_type.label: Container Type
container_type.helper: اختر container type to define internal الحجم and dimensional constraints لكل ISO 668.

cargo_length_cm.label: Cargo الطول (cm)
cargo_length_cm.helper: الطول من primary cargo unit (pallet or box). Must align with container internal الطول.

cargo_width_cm.label: Cargo العرض (cm)
cargo_width_cm.helper: العرض من cargo unit. Affects lateral stacking and aisle space.

cargo_height_cm.label: Cargo الارتفاع (cm)
cargo_height_cm.helper: الارتفاع من cargo unit. Must respect container door الارتفاع and internal الارتفاع.

cargo_weight_kg.label: Cargo الوزن لكل Unit (kg)
cargo_weight_kg.helper: الوزن لكل cargo unit. Critical for gross الوزن limit and axle load distribution.

stacking_factor.label: Stacking Factor
stacking_factor.helper: Number of cargo units that can be stacked vertically, considering crush resistance and stability.

load_secure_method.label: Load Securing Method
load_secure_method.helper: Method المستخدم to secure cargo. Affects usable الحجم and الوزن distribution لكل CTU Code.

use_pallet.label: Use Pallet
use_pallet.helper: Indicates if cargo is palletized. Pallet dimensions add to base footprint and reduce usable الارتفاع.

pallet_height_cm.label: Pallet الارتفاع (cm)
pallet_height_cm.helper: الارتفاع من pallet (if المستخدم). Added to cargo الارتفاع for total unit الارتفاع.

actual_throughput.label: Actual Throughput (units)
actual_throughput.helper: Total units produced or delivered in the measurement لكلiod.

defect_rate.label: Defect المعدل (ppm)
defect_rate.helper: Parts لكل million defective, measured لكل Six Sigma standards.

on_time_delivery_percent.label: On-الوقت Delivery (%)
on_time_delivery_percent.helper: لكلcentage of orders delivered on or before the promised date.

cost_per_unit.label: التكلفة لكل Unit ($)
cost_per_unit.helper: Total manufacturing التكلفة لكل unit, including المادةs, labor, overhead.

target_cost_per_unit.label: الهدف التكلفة لكل Unit ($)
target_cost_per_unit.helper: Contractually agreed التكلفة الهدف لكل unit.

incentive_base_rate.label: Incentive Base المعدل ($/unit)
incentive_base_rate.helper: Base incentive المبلغ لكل unit, subject to الأداء multipliers.

quality_threshold_ppm.label: Quality Threshold (ppm)
quality_threshold_ppm.helper: Maximum defect المعدل to qualify for any incentive.

delivery_threshold_percent.label: Delivery Threshold (%)
delivery_threshold_percent.helper: Minimum on-الوقت delivery لكلcentage to qualify for incentive.

cost_reduction_sharing_percent.label: التكلفة Reduction Sharing (%)
cost_reduction_sharing_percent.helper: لكلcentage of التكلفة savings shared as additional incentive.

contract_type.label: Contract Type
contract_type.helper: Type of contract governing the incentive structure.

lean_certification_active.label: Lean Certification Active
lean_certification_active.helper: Indicates if the supplier holds an active Lean certification (e.g., ISO 18404).

cpk.label: Process Capability Index (Cpk)
cpk.helper: Cpk is a standard Six Sigma metric indicating how well a process meets specification limits, accounting for centering. Typical الهدفs: 1.33 (minimum acceptable), 1.67 (good), 2.0 (excellent).

sigmashift.label: Sigma Shift (long-المدة drift)
sigmashift.helper: Accounts for long-المدة process drift. Standard Six Sigma assumption is 1.5 sigma shift. Adjust based on historical data or industry norms (e.g., automotive often uses 1.5).

distributiontype.label: Distribution Type
distributiontype.helper: اختر distribution based on sample size and data characteristics. Normal for large samples (n>30), t-distribution for small samples (n<30) to account for uncertainty.

samplesize.label: Sample Size (n)
samplesize.helper: Number of observations المستخدم to estimate Cpk. Larger samples improve confidence. Required for t-distribution adjustment.

confidencelevel.label: Confidence Level
confidencelevel.helper: Confidence level for the confidence interval من PPM estimate. Higher levels provide more conservative (wider) intervals.

useconfidenceinterval.label: Use Confidence Interval
useconfidenceinterval.helper: If enabled, the tool calculates lower and upلكل bounds for PPM based on the confidence level. Useful for risk assessment.

planned_duration_days.label: Planned المدة (الأيام)
planned_duration_days.helper: Total planned المدة من project from start to finish, as لكل CPM schedule baseline.

actual_duration_days.label: Actual المدة (الأيام)
actual_duration_days.helper: Actual elapsed المدة from project start to التيار date or completion.

daily_penalty_rate.label: Daily Penalty المعدل (Currency)
daily_penalty_rate.helper: Contractual liquidated damages or penalty لكل day of delay beyond the planned المدة.

critical_path_float_total.label: Total Float on Critical Path (الأيام)
critical_path_float_total.placeholder: أدخل Total Float on Critical Path (الأيام)
critical_path_float_total.helper: Sum of total float for all activities on the critical path. Zero or negative indicates schedule compression.

productivity_factor.label: Productivity Factor (0-1)
productivity_factor.helper: Lean metric: ratio of actual output to standard output. القيمةs below 0.8 indicate significant الهدر.

rework_percentage.label: Rework لكلcentage (%)
rework_percentage.helper: لكلcentage of completed work requiring rework, a key Six Sigma quality metric.

delay_type.label: Delay Type
delay_type.helper: Classification لكل standard construction delay analysis (AACE, SCL protocols).

use_earned_schedule.label: Use Earned Schedule Method
use_earned_schedule.helper: If true, applies earned schedule (ES) metrics for more accuالمعدل delay impact assessment.

expected_yield.label: Expected Yield (kg/ha)
expected_yield.helper: Theoretical maximum yield based on seed geصافيics and local potential.

actual_yield.label: Actual Yield (kg/ha)
actual_yield.helper: Measured yield at harvest, المستخدم as baseline for loss calculation.

harvest_loss_pct.label: Harvest Loss (%)
harvest_loss_pct.helper: لكلcentage of crop lost during harvesting oلكلations (shattering, header loss, etc.).

post_harvest_loss_pct.label: Post-Harvest Loss (%)
post_harvest_loss_pct.helper: Losses during handling, storage, and النقل after harvest.

field_condition.label: Field Condition
field_condition.helper: Overall field condition affecting crop uniformity and loss potential.

irrigation_type.label: Irrigation Type
irrigation_type.helper: Irrigation method influences water stress and yield consistency.

pest_pressure.label: Pest الضغط (0-10)
pest_pressure.helper: Subjective rating of pest infestation level (0 = none, 10 = severe).

disease_index.label: Disease Index (0-10)
disease_index.helper: Subjective rating of disease severity (0 = none, 10 = total loss).

weed_cover_pct.label: Weed Cover (%)
weed_cover_pct.helper: لكلcentage of Field المساحة covered by weeds, competing for resources.

soil_quality_score.label: Soil Quality Score (0-100)
soil_quality_score.helper: Aggregate soil health metric (organic matter, pH, structure, etc.).

labor_efficiency.label: Labor Efficiency (0-100)
labor_efficiency.helper: Rating of labor productivity and skill level in field oلكلations.

equipment_reliability.label: Equipment Reliability (0-100)
equipment_reliability.helper: لكلcentage of الوقت equipment opeالمعدلs without breakdown during critical لكلiods.

exposure_amount.label: Exposure المبلغ (in base currency)
exposure_amount.helper: Total القيمة of foreign currency receivables or payables subject to exchange المعدل fluctuation.

volatility_annual.label: Annualized Volatility of Exchange المعدل
volatility_annual.placeholder: أدخل Annualized Volatility of Exchange المعدل
volatility_annual.helper: Historical or implied standard deviation of daily log returns annualized (ISO 31000 risk metric).

confidence_level.label: Confidence Level for VaR Calculation
confidence_level.placeholder: أدخل Confidence Level for VaR Calculation
confidence_level.helper: Statistical confidence level المستخدم in القيمة At Risk (VaR) estimation, typical القيمةs 90%, 95%, 99%.

hedge_ratio.label: Hedge Ratio
hedge_ratio.helper: لكلcentage of exposure covered by hedging instruments (forwards, options). Lean metric for الهدر reduction.

time_horizon_days.label: الوقت Horizon (الأيام)
time_horizon_days.helper: Risk assessment لكلiod aligned with business planning cycles (WERC supply chain standard).

enable_lean_adjustment.label: Enable Lean Volatility Adjustment
enable_lean_adjustment.helper: Applies a Six Sigma-based correction factor to account for process variation in hedging execution.

cutvolume.label: Cut الحجم
cutvolume.helper: Total الحجم of المادة to be excavated from cut المساحةs, measured in bank cubic meters (BCM).

fillvolume.label: Fill الحجم
fillvolume.helper: Total الحجم of المادة required for fill/embankment المساحةs, measured in compacted cubic meters (CCM).

swellfactor.label: Swell Factor
swellfactor.helper: Factor accounting for الحجم increase when المادة is excavated (loose state vs. bank state). Typical range 1.1–1.4.

shrinkagefactor.label: Shrinkage Factor
shrinkagefactor.helper: Factor accounting for الحجم decrease when المادة is compacted (compacted state vs. bank state). Typical range 0.75–0.95.

hauldistance.label: Average Haul المسافة
hauldistance.helper: Average one-way المسافة from cut to fill المساحةs, المستخدم for التكلفة and الوقود calculations.

unithaulcost.label: Unit Haul التكلفة
unithaulcost.helper: التكلفة لكل cubic meter لكل kilometer of hauling المادة, including الوقود, labor, and equipment depreciation.

wastedisposalcost.label: الهدر Disposal التكلفة
wastedisposalcost.helper: التكلفة لكل cubic meter for disposing excess المادة at a designated الهدر site.

borrowcost.label: Borrow المادة التكلفة
borrowcost.helper: التكلفة لكل cubic meter to import المادة from a borrow pit to meet fill deficit.

materialtype.label: المادة Type
materialtype.helper: Type of المادة being moved, affects swell/shrinkage factors and handling difficulty.

useoptimizedhaulroutes.label: Use Optimized Haul Routes
useoptimizedhaulroutes.helper: If enabled, the tool applies lean logistics principles to minimize haul المسافة and idle الوقت.

cutting_speed.label: Cutting Speed
cutting_speed.helper: Surface speed من workpiece relative to the cutting tool, based on ISO 3685.

feed_rate.label: Feed المعدل
feed_rate.helper: Linear المسافة the tool advances لكل revolution, affects chip load and tool wear.

depth_of_cut.label: العمق of Cut
depth_of_cut.helper: Radial or axial engagement من tool, influences cutting forces and heat generation.

tool_material.label: Tool المادة
tool_material.helper: المادة من cutting tool, affects wear resistance and optimal cutting parameters.

workpiece_material.label: Workpiece المادة
workpiece_material.helper: المادة being machined, deالمدةines machinability rating and recommended speeds.

coolant_used.label: Coolant المستخدم
coolant_used.helper: Indicates if coolant is applied, reduces thermal stress and extends tool life.

machine_stability_factor.label: Machine Stability Factor
