machine_stability_factor.helper: Factor representing machine rigidity and vibration damping, based on condition monitoring data.

milk_volume_liters.label: Milk الحجم (Liters لكل day)
milk_volume_liters.helper: Total raw milk received daily from suppliers or own herd.

fat_percentage.label: Fat Content (%)
fat_percentage.helper: Average butterfat content of incoming milk, critical for yield calculations.

protein_percentage.label: Protein Content (%)
protein_percentage.helper: Average protein content, affects cheese and powder yields.

selling_price_per_liter.label: Selling السعر (لكل Liter)
selling_price_per_liter.helper: Average revenue لكل liter of raw milk sold to processor or retail.

production_cost_per_liter.label: Production التكلفة (لكل Liter)
production_cost_per_liter.helper: Includes feed, labor, utilities, veterinary, and overhead لكل liter.

waste_percentage.label: الهدر / Shrinkage (%)
waste_percentage.helper: Milk lost due to spoilage, spillage, or quality rejection.

labor_hours_per_day.label: Labor الساعات لكل Day
labor_hours_per_day.helper: Total direct Labor الساعات المستخدم in milk production and handling.

energy_cost_per_day.label: الطاقة التكلفة (لكل Day)
energy_cost_per_day.helper: Daily electricity, الوقود, and cooling التكلفةs.

other_variable_cost_per_liter.label: Other Variable التكلفة (لكل Liter)
other_variable_cost_per_liter.helper: Supplies, additives, packaging, and miscellaneous Variable التكلفةs.

fixed_cost_per_day.label: Fixed التكلفة (لكل Day)
fixed_cost_per_day.helper: Depreciation, إيجار, insurance, and other fixed overhead.

quality_grade.label: Quality Grade
quality_grade.helper: Milk quality grade based on somatic cell count and bacteria (A, B, C).

historical_demand_mean.label: Historical Demand Mean (units/لكلiod)
historical_demand_mean.helper: Average demand observed over the past 12 لكلiods (ISO 9001:2015 data collection).

demand_std_dev.label: Demand Standard Deviation (units)
demand_std_dev.helper: Standard deviation of demand, المستخدم for safety stock calculation (Lean Six Sigma DMAIC).

lead_time_days.label: Lead الوقت (الأيام)
lead_time_days.helper: Average replenishment lead الوقت from supplier (WERC DC Metrics).

service_level.label: الهدف Service Level
service_level.helper: Probability of not stocking out during lead الوقت (Six Sigma DPMO الهدف).

unit_cost.label: Unit التكلفة ($)
unit_cost.helper: Purchase التكلفة لكل unit (ISO 14051 المادة التدفق التكلفة accounting).

holding_cost_rate.label: Annual Holding التكلفة المعدل (%)
holding_cost_rate.helper: لكلcentage of unit التكلفة لكل year (WERC DC Measures, typical 20-30%).

ordering_cost.label: Ordering التكلفة ($/order)
ordering_cost.helper: Fixed التكلفة لكل purchase order (Lean transactional التكلفة reduction).

stockout_cost_per_unit.label: Stockout التكلفة لكل Unit ($)
stockout_cost_per_unit.helper: Lost profit + penalty لكل unit of unmet demand (Six Sigma التكلفة of poor quality).

periods_per_year.label: لكلiods لكل Year
periods_per_year.helper: Number of demand لكلiods in a year (e.g., 12 for monthly, 52 for weekly).

use_abc_classification.label: Use ABC Classification
use_abc_classification.helper: If true, applies ABC analysis to adjust service level (Pareto principle in inventory management).

twin_scope.label: Digital Twin Scope
twin_scope.helper: اختر scope من digital twin: asset, process, system, or enterprise. Influences complexity and التكلفة multipliers.

asset_count.label: Number of Assets/Entities
asset_count.helper: Total number of physical assets or entities to be modeled in the digital twin.

sensor_density.label: Sensor الكثافة (sensors لكل asset)
sensor_density.helper: Average number of IoT sensors لكل asset. Higher الكثافة increases data acquisition and processing التكلفةs.

data_frequency.label: Data Acquisition Frequency
data_frequency.helper: Frequency of data collection: 0.1 (every 10s), 1 (لكل second), 10 (10 Hz), 100 (100 Hz). Higher frequency increases data الحجم and التكلفة.

integration_complexity.label: Integration Complexity
integration_complexity.helper: Complexity of integrating with existing systems (ERP, MES, CMMS). Low, medium, high. Affects labor and software التكلفةs.

data_quality_index.label: Data Quality Index (DQI)
data_quality_index.helper: لكلcentage of data that is accuالمعدل, complete, and timely. Based on ISO 8000 data quality standards.

labor_rate.label: Average Labor المعدل (USD/hour)
labor_rate.helper: Blended hourly المعدل for engineering and IT staff involved in digital twin development and maintenance.

expected_lifespan.label: Expected Lifespan (السنوات)
expected_lifespan.helper: Expected oلكلational lifespan من digital twin system. المستخدم for amortization and Total التكلفة of ownership calculations.

lean_six_sigma_level.label: Lean Six Sigma Maturity Level
lean_six_sigma_level.placeholder: أدخل Lean Six Sigma Maturity Level
lean_six_sigma_level.helper: Organizational maturity in Lean Six Sigma: level1 (initial), level2 (managed), level3 (defined), level4 (quantitatively managed), level5 (optimizing). Affects efficiency and الهدر reduction.

werc_benchmark.label: WERC DC Benchmark (التكلفة لكل order)
werc_benchmark.placeholder: أدخل WERC DC Benchmark (التكلفة لكل order)
werc_benchmark.helper: Warehouse Education and Research Council (WERC) benchmark for average التكلفة لكل order in distribution centers.

planned_production_rate.label: Planned Production المعدل
planned_production_rate.helper: The standard output المعدل لكل hour under normal oلكلating conditions (ISO 22400).

downtime_duration.label: Downالمدة الزمنية
downtime_duration.helper: Total المدة من unplanned downtime event.

revenue_per_unit.label: Revenue لكل Unit
revenue_per_unit.helper: Selling السعر or standard التكلفة لكل unit of output.

direct_labor_cost_per_hour.label: Direct Labor التكلفة لكل Hour
direct_labor_cost_per_hour.placeholder: أدخل Direct Labor التكلفة لكل Hour
direct_labor_cost_per_hour.helper: Average hourly wage including benefits for oلكلators affected by downtime.

energy_cost_per_hour.label: الطاقة التكلفة لكل Hour
energy_cost_per_hour.helper: Average التكلفة of electricity, gas, or other الطاقة consumed during production.

scrap_rate_during_downtime.label: Scrap المعدل During Downtime
scrap_rate_during_downtime.helper: لكلcentage of المادة الهدرd due to restart or instability after downtime (Six Sigma defect المعدل).

recovery_time_factor.label: Recovery الوقت Factor
recovery_time_factor.helper: Multiplier for additional الوقت needed to return to steady-state production (Lean Takt الوقت recovery).

shift_type.label: Shift Type
shift_type.helper: Shift during which downtime occurred; affects labor التكلفة multipliers (night/weekend premiums).

include_quality_loss.label: Include Quality Loss
include_quality_loss.helper: If true, adds التكلفة of scrap and rework caالمستخدم by the downtime event.

dye_volume_l.label: Dye bath الحجم (liters)
dye_volume_l.helper: Total الحجم of dye liquor in the batch.

dye_concentration_gpl.label: Dye concentration (g/L)
dye_concentration_gpl.helper: Grams of dye powder لكل liter of bath.

chemicals_per_liter.label: Auxiliary chemicals التكلفة (USD/L)
chemicals_per_liter.helper: التكلفة of salts, acids, bases, etc., لكل liter of bath.

energy_cost_per_batch.label: الطاقة التكلفة لكل batch (USD)
energy_cost_per_batch.helper: Electricity, steam, or gas التكلفة for heating and running the dyeing machine.

batch_time_hours.label: Batch cycle الوقت (الساعات)
batch_time_hours.helper: Total الوقت from loading to unloading.

waste_percentage.label: الهدر / rework المعدل (%)
waste_percentage.helper: لكلcentage of batches that require re-dyeing or are scrapped.

water_cost_per_m3.label: Water التكلفة (USD/m³)
water_cost_per_m3.helper: التكلفة of fresh water and الهدرwater treatment.

water_usage_l_per_kg.label: استخدام الماء (L/kg fabric)
water_usage_l_per_kg.helper: Typical water الاستهلاك لكل kg of fabric processed.

fabric_weight_kg.label: Fabric الوزن (kg)
fabric_weight_kg.helper: الوزن of fabric in the batch.

dye_type.label: Dye class
dye_type.helper: Chemical class of dye, affects fixation efficiency and التكلفة.

use_lean_optimization.label: Enable Lean optimization (reduce الهدر)
use_lean_optimization.helper: If true, applies lean principles to reduce الهدر and rework.

total_energy_kwh.label: Total الطاقة الاستهلاك (kWh)
total_energy_kwh.helper: Total electrical الطاقة consumed by the facility over the reporting لكلiod (e.g., monthly).

peak_demand_kw.label: Peak Demand (kW)
peak_demand_kw.helper: Highest recorded القدرة demand during the لكلiod; المستخدم for demand charge calculation.

tariff_rate_per_kwh.label: الطاقة المعدل ($/kWh)
tariff_rate_per_kwh.helper: Average التكلفة لكل kWh from utility bill (blended المعدل).

demand_charge_per_kw.label: Demand Charge ($/kW)
demand_charge_per_kw.helper: Utility demand charge لكل kW of peak demand.

production_units.label: Total Production Units
production_units.helper: Number of units produced in the لكلiod (e.g., pieces, kg, liters).

facility_type.label: Facility Type
facility_type.helper: Type of facility for benchmarking and normalization.

include_renewable_offset.label: Include Renewable الطاقة Offset
include_renewable_offset.helper: If true, subtracts renewable generation from total الاستهلاك for صافي التكلفة calculation.

renewable_kwh.label: Renewable الطاقة Geneالمعدلd (kWh)
renewable_kwh.helper: On-site renewable generation (solar, wind) during the لكلiod.

co2_emission_factor.label: CO2 Emission Factor (kg CO2/kWh)
co2_emission_factor.helper: Grid average emission factor for the region (ISO 14064).

waste_type.label: الهدر Type
waste_type.helper: اختر category of الهدر to apply appropriate التكلفة factors and regulatory thresholds.

waste_volume_kg.label: الهدر الحجم (kg)
waste_volume_kg.helper: Total mass of الهدر geneالمعدلd in the reporting لكلiod.

disposal_cost_per_kg.label: Disposal التكلفة لكل kg
disposal_cost_per_kg.helper: Average التكلفة paid to الهدر management vendor لكل kilogram.

transport_distance_km.label: النقل المسافة (km)
transport_distance_km.helper: One-way المسافة from facility to disposal or recycling site.

transport_cost_per_km.label: النقل التكلفة لكل كم
transport_cost_per_km.helper: التكلفة لكل kilometer for الهدر النقل, including الوقود and labor.

labor_hours_per_ton.label: Labor الساعات لكل Ton
labor_hours_per_ton.helper: Direct Labor الساعات required to handle, sort, and prepare one ton of الهدر.

labor_rate_per_hour.label: Labor المعدل لكل Hour
labor_rate_per_hour.helper: Hourly wage including overhead for الهدر handling لكلsonnel.

recycling_revenue_per_kg.label: Recycling Revenue لكل kg
recycling_revenue_per_kg.helper: Revenue received from selling recyclable المادةs لكل kilogram.

recycling_rate.label: Recycling المعدل (%)
recycling_rate.helper: لكلcentage of total الهدر that is diverted to recycling.

carbon_cost_per_kg_co2.label: Carbon التكلفة لكل kg CO2e
carbon_cost_per_kg_co2.placeholder: أدخل Carbon التكلفة لكل kg CO2e
carbon_cost_per_kg_co2.helper: Internal or regulatory التكلفة assigned to each kg of CO2 equivalent emissions.

emission_factor_kg_co2_per_kg_waste.label: Emission Factor (kg CO2e/kg الهدر)
emission_factor_kg_co2_per_kg_waste.helper: Average greenhouse gas emissions لكل kilogram of الهدر based on الهدر type and disposal method.

compliance_penalty_per_kg.label: Compliance Penalty لكل kg
compliance_penalty_per_kg.helper: Potential regulatory fines or penalties لكل kilogram if الهدر exceeds لكلmitted limits.

waste_volume_limit_kg.label: الهدر الحجم Limit (kg)
waste_volume_limit_kg.helper: Regulatory or internal threshold for الهدر الحجم before penalties apply.

annual_demand.label: Annual Demand (units)
annual_demand.helper: Total forecasted demand for the item over one year. يُستخدم لحساب order frequency and total cycle stock.

ordering_cost.label: Ordering التكلفة لكل Order
ordering_cost.helper: Fixed التكلفة incurred لكل purchase order (e.g., administrative, inspection, النقلation الإعداد).

holding_cost_per_unit.label: Holding التكلفة لكل Unit لكل Year
holding_cost_per_unit.placeholder: أدخل Holding التكلفة لكل Unit لكل Year
holding_cost_per_unit.helper: التكلفة to hold one unit in inventory for one year, including storage, insurance, obsolescence, and capital التكلفة.

unit_cost.label: Unit التكلفة (Purchase السعر)
unit_cost.helper: Purchase السعر لكل unit from supplier. يُستخدم لحساب total annual purchase التكلفة and capital tied up.

lead_time_days.label: Lead الوقت (الأيام)
lead_time_days.helper: Average الوقت from order placement to receipt. Critical for safety stock and reorder point calculations.

demand_variability.label: Demand Variability (Std Dev of Daily Demand)
demand_variability.placeholder: أدخل Demand Variability (Std Dev of Daily Demand)
demand_variability.helper: Standard deviation of daily demand. يُستخدم لحساب safety stock under uncertainty (Six Sigma approach).

service_level.label: Desired Service Level
service_level.helper: الهدف probability of not stocking out during lead الوقت. Higher service levels increase safety stock.

backorder_cost.label: Backorder التكلفة لكل Unit
backorder_cost.helper: التكلفة incurred لكل unit when demand cannot be met from stock (lost sales, penalty, expediting).

warehouse_capacity.label: Warehouse Capacity (units)
warehouse_capacity.helper: Maximum storage capacity available for this item. المستخدم to constrain order الكمية if EOQ exceeds capacity.

storage_cost_per_sqft.label: Storage التكلفة لكل sq ft لكل Year
storage_cost_per_sqft.placeholder: أدخل Storage التكلفة لكل sq ft لكل Year
storage_cost_per_sqft.helper: التكلفة لكل square foot of warehouse space لكل year. المستخدم for space-based holding التكلفة adjustments.

item_footprint.label: Item Footprint (sq ft لكل unit)
item_footprint.placeholder: أدخل Item Footprint (sq ft لكل unit)
item_footprint.helper: Average floor space required لكل unit of inventory. المستخدم to compute space التكلفة component.

bac.label: Budget at Completion
bac.helper: Total authorized budget for the work scope (PMBOK).

ev.label: Earned القيمة
ev.helper: القيمة of work actually لكلformed, measured in budgeted التكلفة.

ac.label: Actual التكلفة
ac.helper: Total التكلفة incurred for the work لكلformed.

pv.label: Planned القيمة
pv.helper: Authorized budget for the work scheduled to be completed.

percentcomplete.label: لكلcent Complete (physical)
percentcomplete.helper: Objective physical progress estimate (e.g., via earned القيمة rules).

cpi.label: التكلفة الأداء Index (override)
cpi.helper: If provided, overrides calculated CPI. CPI = EV/AC.

spi.label: Schedule الأداء Index (override)
spi.helper: If provided, overrides calculated SPI. SPI = EV/PV.

useweightedmethod.label: Use الوزنed CPI/SPI for EAC
useweightedmethod.placeholder: أدخل Use الوزنed CPI/SPI for EAC
useweightedmethod.helper: If true, applies 0.8*CPI + 0.2*SPI الوزنing for EAC (industry practice).

managementreserve.label: Management Reserve
managementreserve.helper: Reserve held for unforeseen scope changes (not part of BAC).

fabric_width.label: Fabric العرض (cm)
fabric_width.helper: Standard industrial fabric roll العرض, typically 150-320 cm for apparel and upholstery.

fabric_length.label: Fabric الطول (m)
fabric_length.helper: Total الطول of fabric roll or batch, المستخدم to compute total المساحة.

pattern_length.label: Pattern الطول (cm)
pattern_length.helper: الطول of one garment or component pattern piece along the grain.

pattern_width.label: Pattern العرض (cm)
pattern_width.helper: العرض of one pattern piece لكلpendicular to the grain.

quantity.label: الكمية to Cut
quantity.helper: Number of identical pieces to be cut from the fabric.

cutting_method.label: Cutting Method
cutting_method.helper: Method affects المادة utilization and labor التكلفة. Single-ply is manual; multi-ply is automated.

material_cost_per_m2.label: المادة التكلفة لكل م²
material_cost_per_m2.helper: التكلفة of fabric لكل square meter, المستخدم for financial loss calculations.

labor_rate_per_hour.label: Labor المعدل لكل Hour
labor_rate_per_hour.helper: Hourly wage of cutting oلكلator, المستخدم for labor التكلفة estimation.

allowance_percentage.label: Allowance لكلcentage (%)
allowance_percentage.helper: Extra fabric allowance for seam, shrinkage, or alignment tolerances لكل ISO 4915.

use_nesting.label: Enable Nesting Optimization
use_nesting.helper: If true, the optimizer will attempt to nest patterns to reduce الهدر.

num_departments.label: Number of Departments
num_departments.helper: Total distinct production or storage المساحةs in the facility.

flow_intensity_matrix.label: التدفق Intensity Matrix (triangular, comma-sepaالمعدلd لكل row)
flow_intensity_matrix.placeholder: أدخل التدفق Intensity Matrix (triangular, comma-sepaالمعدلd لكل row)
flow_intensity_matrix.helper: Number of المادة movements between each pair of departments لكل day.

distance_matrix.label: المسافة Matrix (triangular, comma-sepaالمعدلd لكل row)
distance_matrix.placeholder: أدخل المسافة Matrix (triangular, comma-sepaالمعدلd لكل row)
distance_matrix.helper: التيار or proposed travel المسافةs between department centroids.

path_efficiency_factor.label: Path Efficiency Factor
path_efficiency_factor.helper: Ratio of straight-line المسافة to actual travel path (1.0 = لكلfect straight line).

layout_type.label: Layout Type
layout_type.helper: Classification من facility layout according to standard industrial engineering taxonomy.

use_weighted_distance.label: Use الوزنed المسافة (التدفق × المسافة)
use_weighted_distance.helper: If true, the primary النتيجة is the sum of التدفق × المسافة; otherwise raw المسافة sum.

recycling_machine_cost.label: Recycling Machine Purchase التكلفة
recycling_machine_cost.helper: Capital expenditure for the recycling extruder/pelletizer system.

machine_life_years.label: Machine العمر الإنتاجي
machine_life_years.helper: Expected oلكلational life before major overhaul or replacement.

annual_maintenance_cost.label: Annual Maintenance التكلفة
annual_maintenance_cost.helper: Routine maintenance, spare parts, and service contracts.

recycling_energy_consumption.label: Recycling الطاقة الاستهلاك
recycling_energy_consumption.helper: الطاقة required لكل kg of recycled filament produced.

labor_rate.label: Labor المعدل
labor_rate.helper: Hourly wage including benefits for oلكلator.

labor_hours_per_kg.label: Labor الساعات لكل kg
labor_hours_per_kg.helper: Direct labor الوقت to process one kg of recycled filament.

waste_collection_cost.label: الهدر Collection التكلفة
waste_collection_cost.helper: التكلفة to collect and النقل scrap plastic to recycling facility.

virgin_filament_price.label: Virgin Filament Market السعر
virgin_filament_price.helper: التيار market السعر for virgin PLA/ABS/PETG filament.

recycling_yield.label: Recycling Yield
recycling_yield.helper: لكلcentage of إدخال الهدر that becomes usable filament (losses due to contamination, degradation).

quality_factor.label: Quality Factor (vs Virgin)
quality_factor.helper: Relative mechanical/print quality of recycled filament compared to virgin (e.g., 90% means 10% more المادة needed for same strength).

annual_production_volume.label: Annual Production الحجم
annual_production_volume.helper: Total kg of recycled filament produced لكل year.

waste_type.label: الهدر Type
waste_type.helper: Type of plastic الهدر being recycled; affects processing parameters and yield.

include_carbon_cost.label: Include Carbon التكلفة
include_carbon_cost.helper: If true, adds a carbon penalty التكلفة based on estimated emissions.

carbon_price.label: سعر الكربون
carbon_price.helper: Social التكلفة of carbon or carbon tax لكل metric ton of CO2 equivalent.

static_pressure.label: Static الضغط
static_pressure.helper: Measured at hydrant outlet with no التدفق. المستخدم to deالمدةine available system الضغط لكل NFPA 291.

residual_pressure.label: Residual الضغط
residual_pressure.helper: الضغط measured while hydrant is التدفقing at test المعدل. Indicates system capacity under demand.

flow_rate_test.label: Test التدفق المعدل
flow_rate_test.helper: التدفق المعدل measured during hydrant التدفق test using pitot gauge or التدفق meter.

pipe_diameter.label: Supply Pipe القطر
pipe_diameter.helper: Nominal القطر من main supply pipe feeding the hydrant. Affects friction loss.

pipe_length.label: Supply Pipe الطول
pipe_length.helper: المسافة from water main to hydrant. المستخدم in friction loss calculations.

hazen_williams_coefficient.label: Hazen-Williams C Factor
hazen_williams_coefficient.helper: Pipe roughness coefficient. 140 for new steel, 100 for old cast iron. لكل ISO 10803 and NFPA 13.

elevation_difference.label: Elevation الفرق
elevation_difference.helper: الارتفاع الفرق between water source and hydrant. Positive if hydrant is above source.

number_of_hydrants.label: Number of Hydrants in Test
number_of_hydrants.placeholder: أدخل Number of Hydrants in Test
number_of_hydrants.helper: Number of hydrants التدفقing simultaneously during test. Affects total demand.

hydrant_type.label: Hydrant Type
hydrant_type.helper: Type of hydrant لكل NFPA 291. Dry barrel common in cold climates.

flow_condition.label: التدفق Condition
flow_condition.helper: Steady for normal tests, Transient for surge analysis لكل ISO 4126.

is_test_standard.label: NFPA 291 Compliant Test
is_test_standard.helper: Indicates if التدفق test was لكلformed لكل NFPA 291 standard procedures.

annual_production_volume.label: Annual Production الحجم
annual_production_volume.helper: Total number of units produced لكل year across all product variants.

avg_batch_size.label: Average Batch Size
avg_batch_size.helper: Average number of units produced لكل production run before changeover.

current_setup_time.label: التيار الإعداد الوقت لكل Changeover
current_setup_time.placeholder: أدخل التيار الإعداد الوقت لكل Changeover
current_setup_time.helper: الوقت required to change from one product to another in the التيار system.

target_setup_time.label: الهدف الإعداد الوقت لكل Changeover (after FMS)
target_setup_time.placeholder: أدخل الهدف الإعداد الوقت لكل Changeover (after FMS)
target_setup_time.helper: Expected الإعداد الوقت after implementing flexible manufacturing system (e.g., SMED).

hourly_operating_cost.label: Hourly Oلكلating التكلفة (labor + overhead)
hourly_operating_cost.helper: Fully burdened hourly التكلفة of production labor and overhead.

changeover_cost_per_hour.label: Changeover التكلفة لكل Hour (downtime + labor)
changeover_cost_per_hour.placeholder: أدخل Changeover التكلفة لكل Hour (downtime + labor)
changeover_cost_per_hour.helper: Total التكلفة incurred لكل hour of changeover, including lost production and labor.

inventory_holding_cost_rate.label: Inventory Holding التكلفة المعدل
inventory_holding_cost_rate.helper: Annual التكلفة to hold inventory as a لكلcentage of inventory القيمة (includes storage, insurance, obsolescence).

avg_inventory_value.label: Average Inventory القيمة (التيار)
avg_inventory_value.helper: التيار average القيمة of raw المادةs, WIP, and finished goods inventory.

fms_investment.label: Total FMS Investment
fms_investment.helper: Total capital expenditure for flexible manufacturing system (equipment, software, training, integration).

fms_useful_life.label: FMS العمر الإنتاجي
fms_useful_life.helper: Expected oلكلational life من flexible manufacturing system for depreciation purposes.

discount_rate.label: Discount المعدل (WACC)
discount_rate.helper: الوزنed average التكلفة of capital المستخدم for صافي present القيمة calculation.

product_variants.label: Number of Product Variants
product_variants.helper: Total number of distinct product variants produced annually.

quality_defect_rate.label: التيار Quality Defect المعدل
quality_defect_rate.helper: لكلcentage of units that are defective and require rework or scrap.

fms_quality_improvement.label: Expected Quality Improvement from FMS
fms_quality_improvement.placeholder: أدخل Expected Quality Improvement from FMS
fms_quality_improvement.helper: Expected لكلcentage reduction in defect المعدل after implementing FMS.

cost_per_defect.label: التكلفة لكل Defect (rework + scrap)
cost_per_defect.helper: Average التكلفة to rework or scrap a defective unit.

labor_productivity_gain.label: Labor Productivity Gain from FMS
labor_productivity_gain.placeholder: أدخل Labor Productivity Gain from FMS
labor_productivity_gain.helper: Expected لكلcentage increase in labor productivity due to automation and reduced manual handling.

floor_space_reduction.label: Floor Space Reduction
floor_space_reduction.helper: Expected لكلcentage reduction in manufacturing floor space due to compact FMS layout.

annual_floor_space_cost.label: Annual Floor Space التكلفة لكل sq ft
annual_floor_space_cost.placeholder: أدخل Annual Floor Space التكلفة لكل sq ft
annual_floor_space_cost.helper: Annual التكلفة لكل square foot of manufacturing space (إيجار, utilities, maintenance).

current_floor_space.label: التيار Floor Space
current_floor_space.helper: Total manufacturing floor space التيارly occupied.

energy_cost_reduction.label: الطاقة التكلفة Reduction from FMS
energy_cost_reduction.placeholder: أدخل الطاقة التكلفة Reduction from FMS
energy_cost_reduction.helper: Expected لكلcentage reduction in الطاقة التكلفةs due to more efficient equipment and reduced idle الوقت.

annual_energy_cost.label: Annual الطاقة التكلفة
annual_energy_cost.helper: Total annual الطاقة التكلفة for the manufacturing facility.

maintenance_cost_increase.label: Maintenance التكلفة Increase from FMS
maintenance_cost_increase.placeholder: أدخل Maintenance التكلفة Increase from FMS
maintenance_cost_increase.helper: Expected لكلcentage increase in maintenance التكلفةs due to more complex equipment.

annual_maintenance_cost.label: Annual Maintenance التكلفة (التيار)
annual_maintenance_cost.helper: التيار annual maintenance التكلفة for existing equipment.

training_cost.label: Training التكلفة for FMS
training_cost.helper: One-الوقت التكلفة for training oلكلators and maintenance staff on the new FMS.

implementation_time.label: Implementation الوقت
implementation_time.helper: الوقت required to fully implement the flexible manufacturing system.

production_days_per_year.label: Production الأيام لكل Year
production_days_per_year.helper: Number of الأيام the facility opeالمعدلs لكل year.

shifts_per_day.label: Shifts لكل Day
shifts_per_day.helper: Number of production shifts لكل day.

total_production_kg.label: Total Production (kg)
total_production_kg.helper: Total الوزن of finished goods produced in the reporting لكلiod (ISO 14051 المادة التدفق).

waste_kg.label: الهدر (kg)
waste_kg.helper: Total الوزن of الغذاء الهدر geneالمعدلd (including trim, spoilage, overproduction, and expired product).

selling_price_per_kg.label: Selling السعر لكل kg
selling_price_per_kg.helper: Average revenue لكل kg of finished product sold (صافي of discounts).

cost_per_kg.label: التكلفة لكل kg
cost_per_kg.helper: Total Variable التكلفة لكل kg (raw المادةs, labor, الطاقة, packaging).

waste_disposal_cost_per_kg.label: الهدر Disposal التكلفة لكل kg
waste_disposal_cost_per_kg.placeholder: أدخل الهدر Disposal التكلفة لكل kg
waste_disposal_cost_per_kg.helper: التكلفة to dispose of الهدر (landfill, composting, incineration).

rework_percentage.label: Rework لكلcentage
rework_percentage.helper: لكلcentage of production that requires rework (Lean Six Sigma defect المعدل).

labor_hourly_rate.label: Labor Hourly المعدل
labor_hourly_rate.helper: Average fully loaded labor التكلفة لكل hour (including benefits).

rework_hours_per_kg.label: Rework الساعات لكل kg
rework_hours_per_kg.helper: Average Labor الساعات required to rework one kg of product.

storage_cost_per_kg_per_day.label: Storage التكلفة لكل kg لكل Day
storage_cost_per_kg_per_day.placeholder: أدخل Storage التكلفة لكل kg لكل Day
storage_cost_per_kg_per_day.helper: التكلفة to store one kg of product لكل day (WERC warehousing metrics).

average_storage_days.label: Average Storage الأيام
average_storage_days.helper: Average number of الأيام الهدر is held before disposal or rework.

waste_type.label: الهدر Type
waste_type.helper: Primary category of الهدر (ISO 14051 الهدر classification).

include_hidden_costs.label: Include Hidden التكلفةs (الطاقة, Water, Overhead)
include_hidden_costs.placeholder: أدخل Include Hidden التكلفةs (الطاقة, Water, Overhead)
include_hidden_costs.helper: If true, allocates a portion of fixed overhead to الهدر (activity-based التكلفةing).

numerator.label: Numerator
numerator.helper: The top part من fraction (dividend). For mixed numbers, use the fractional part only.

denominator.label: Denominator
denominator.helper: The bottom part من fraction (المقسوم). Must be non-zero.

wholenumber.label: Whole Number (for mixed fractions)
wholenumber.helper: Integer part of a mixed number (e.g., 3 in 3 1/4). Set to 0 for proلكل fractions.

decimalplaces.label: Decimal Places (precision)
decimalplaces.helper: Number of decimal places for the النتيجة. Follows ISO 80000-1 rounding rules.

roundingmethod.label: Rounding Method
roundingmethod.helper: Rounding rule لكل ISO 80000-1 (half_even recommended for statistical work).

uncertaintyinput.label: Measurement Uncertainty (±)
uncertaintyinput.helper: Absolute uncertainty in the numerator (e.g., from measurement tolerance). المستخدم for Six Sigma uncertainty propagation.

planned_distance_km.label: Planned Route المسافة
planned_distance_km.helper: Total المسافة من planned route as لكل logistics plan.

actual_distance_km.label: Actual Route المسافة
actual_distance_km.helper: Total المسافة actually driven, including deviations.

fuel_consumption_rate.label: Average الوقود الاستهلاك المعدل
fuel_consumption_rate.helper: Vehicle الوقود الاستهلاك المعدل under standard conditions (ISO 14040).

fuel_price_per_liter.label: الوقود السعر لكل Liter
fuel_price_per_liter.helper: التيار market السعر of diesel or gasoline لكل liter.

load_weight_tonnes.label: Load الوزن
load_weight_tonnes.helper: Total الوزن of cargo carried, affects الوقود الاستهلاك.

terrain_factor.label: Terrain Type
terrain_factor.helper: Terrain classification affecting الوقود efficiency (WERC guidelines).

traffic_condition.label: Traffic Condition
traffic_condition.helper: Traffic الكثافة impact on الوقود الاستهلاك and route drift.

driver_behavior_score.label: Driver Behavior Score
driver_behavior_score.helper: Eco-driving score based on acceleration, braking, idling (Lean Six Sigma metric).

vehicle_age_years.label: Vehicle Age
vehicle_age_years.helper: Age من vehicle, المستخدم for efficiency degradation factor.

include_hidden_losses.label: Include Hidden Loss Drivers
include_hidden_losses.helper: Toggle to include secondary loss factors like tire الضغط, engine wear, etc.

defect_rate.label: Defect المعدل (ppm)
defect_rate.helper: Parts لكل million defective – Six Sigma quality metric. Lower is better.

throughput.label: Throughput (units/hour)
throughput.helper: Actual production المعدل لكل hour. يُستخدم لحساب OEE and capacity utilization.

planned_throughput.label: Planned Throughput (units/hour)
planned_throughput.helper: الهدف production المعدل لكل hour. Must be >0 to avoid division by zero.

cost_per_unit.label: التكلفة لكل Unit ($)
cost_per_unit.helper: Direct manufacturing التكلفة لكل unit. Includes المادة, labor, overhead.

target_cost_per_unit.label: الهدف التكلفة لكل Unit ($)
target_cost_per_unit.helper: Budgeted or standard التكلفة لكل unit. Must be >0.

safety_incidents.label: Safety Incidents (last 12 months)
safety_incidents.helper: Total recordable incidents لكل year. Lower is better (ISO 45001).

on_time_delivery_pct.label: On-الوقت Delivery (%)
on_time_delivery_pct.helper: لكلcentage of orders delivered on or before promised date. WERC metric.

shift_type.label: Shift Type
shift_type.helper: Shift pattern affects fatigue and error المعدلs. المستخدم in safety adjustment.

oee_override.label: Override OEE Calculation?
oee_override.helper: If true, user can manually enter OEE instead of computing from throughput.

manual_oee.label: Manual OEE (%)
manual_oee.helper: الفعالية الإجمالية للمعدات if override is enabled.

deviation_type.label: Deviation Type
deviation_type.helper: اختر category of HACCP deviation to apply appropriate التكلفة multipliers and regulatory thresholds.

affected_batch_kg.label: Affected Batch الوزن (kg)
affected_batch_kg.helper: Total mass of product that was exposed to the deviation. يُستخدم لحساب المادة loss and rework التكلفةs.

unit_cost_per_kg.label: Unit التكلفة لكل kg ($)
unit_cost_per_kg.helper: Standard التكلفة of raw المادةs لكل kilogram, including ingredients and packaging.

rework_percentage.label: Rework لكلcentage (%)
rework_percentage.helper: Estimated fraction من affected batch that can be reworked (e.g., reprocessed, repackaged) instead of being scrapped.

rework_cost_per_kg.label: Rework التكلفة لكل kg ($)
rework_cost_per_kg.helper: Additional التكلفة لكل kilogram for rework activities (labor, الطاقة, extra المادةs).

downtime_hours.label: Downtime (الساعات)
downtime_hours.helper: Total production downtime caالمستخدم by the deviation, including investigation, cleaning, and corrective actions.

hourly_overhead_rate.label: Hourly Overhead المعدل ($/hr)
hourly_overhead_rate.helper: Burdened overhead التكلفة لكل hour of production downtime (includes labor, utilities, facility التكلفةs).

regulatory_penalty_flag.label: Regulatory Penalty Applicable?
regulatory_penalty_flag.helper: Indicates if the deviation is likely to trigger a regulatory fine or citation (e.g., FDA, USDA).

base_penalty_amount.label: Base Penalty المبلغ ($)
base_penalty_amount.helper: Estimated base fine or penalty if regulatory action is taken. المستخدم only when regulatory_penalty_flag is true.

recall_cost_flag.label: Recall التكلفة Included?
recall_cost_flag.helper: Check if the deviation requires a product recall, adding logistics, testing, and brand damage التكلفةs.

recall_fixed_cost.label: Recall Fixed التكلفة ($)
recall_fixed_cost.helper: Fixed التكلفة associated with initiating a recall (notification, logistics, testing).

recall_variable_per_kg.label: Recall Variable التكلفة لكل kg ($/kg)
recall_variable_per_kg.placeholder: أدخل Recall Variable التكلفة لكل kg ($/kg)
recall_variable_per_kg.helper: لكل-kilogram التكلفة for recall handling (النقل, disposal, replacement).

data_confidence.label: Data Confidence (0-1)
data_confidence.helper: Subjective confidence in the accuracy of إدخال data (0 = low, 1 = high). المستخدم to adjust the final التكلفة estimate.

design_ua.label: Design Overall Heat Transfer Coefficient × المساحة (UA_design)
design_ua.placeholder: أدخل Design Overall Heat Transfer Coefficient × المساحة (UA_design)
design_ua.helper: Clean design UA from manufacturer datasheet or initial commissioning test (ISO 50001:2018, Annex B).

actual_ua.label: Actual Overall Heat Transfer Coefficient × المساحة (UA_actual)
actual_ua.placeholder: أدخل Actual Overall Heat Transfer Coefficient × المساحة (UA_actual)
actual_ua.helper: التيار measured UA from process data (temلكلature, التدفق) using heat balance. Indicates fouling severity.

hot_inlet_temp.label: Hot Fluid Inlet Temلكلature
hot_inlet_temp.helper: Temلكلature of hot process stream entering the heat exchanger.

cold_inlet_temp.label: Cold Fluid Inlet Temلكلature
cold_inlet_temp.helper: Temلكلature of cooling or heating utility entering the exchanger.

hot_flow_rate.label: Hot Fluid Mass التدفق المعدل
hot_flow_rate.placeholder: أدخل Hot Fluid Mass التدفق المعدل
hot_flow_rate.helper: Mass التدفق المعدل من hot process stream.

hot_specific_heat.label: Hot Fluid Specific Heat Capacity
hot_specific_heat.placeholder: أدخل Hot Fluid Specific Heat Capacity
hot_specific_heat.helper: Average specific heat of hot fluid over oلكلating temلكلature range.

energy_cost.label: الطاقة التكلفة
energy_cost.helper: التكلفة of thermal الطاقة (steam, hot water, or electricity for pumping).

operating_hours_per_year.label: Oلكلating الساعات لكل Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Annual oلكلating الساعات من heat exchanger.

production_loss_factor.label: Production Loss Factor
production_loss_factor.helper: لكلcentage of production capacity lost due to reduced heat transfer (e.g., slower throughput).

revenue_per_unit_product.label: Revenue لكل Unit Product
revenue_per_unit_product.helper: Revenue geneالمعدلd لكل kg of product processed through the exchanger.

exchanger_type.label: Heat Exchanger Type
exchanger_type.helper: Type of heat exchanger; affects fouling factors and cleaning intervals.

fouling_factor_known.label: Fouling Factor Known?
fouling_factor_known.helper: If true, user provides measured fouling factor directly; otherwise calculated from UA ratio.

measured_fouling_factor.label: Measured Fouling Factor (R_f)
measured_fouling_factor.helper: Directly measured fouling resistance from test or literature (TEMA standards).

horsepower.label: Horseالقدرة (HP)
horsepower.helper: Mechanical القدرة rating of motor or engine. Typical range for industrial motors: 0.5–5000 hp.

hp_type.label: Horseالقدرة Type
hp_type.helper: Diffeإيجار horseالقدرة definitions affect conversion factor. Mechanical HP = 745.7 W, Metric HP = 735.5 W, Electrical HP = 746 W.

motor_efficiency.label: Motor Efficiency
motor_efficiency.helper: Efficiency من motor at المعدلd load. Typical IE3 motors: 90–95%, IE4: 95–97%.

load_factor.label: معامل الحمل
load_factor.helper: لكلcentage of المعدلd load at which the motor opeالمعدلs. Underloaded motors reduce efficiency.

power_factor.label: القدرة Factor
power_factor.helper: Ratio of real القدرة to appaإيجار القدرة. Typical industrial motors: 0.8–0.95 lagging.

operating_hours_per_year.label: Oلكلating الساعات لكل Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Annual وقت التشغيل for الطاقة التكلفة calculations. Common القيمةs: 2000 (single shift), 4000 (two shifts), 8000 (continuous).

electricity_cost_per_kwh.label: Electricity التكلفة
electricity_cost_per_kwh.helper: Average industrial electricity المعدل. Range: $0.05–$0.30 in most regions.

cooling_load.label: Cooling Load
cooling_load.helper: Total sensible and latent heat load from building, equipment, and occupants (ISO 52000).

heating_load.label: Heating Load
heating_load.helper: Total فقد الحرارة from building envelope and ventilation (ASHRAE Handbook).

system_type.label: System Type
system_type.helper: HVAC system configuration affecting capacity and efficiency curves.

ambient_temperature.label: Ambient Temلكلature
ambient_temperature.helper: Outdoor dry-bulb temلكلature for design conditions (ISO 15927).

relative_humidity.label: Relative Humidity
relative_humidity.helper: Indoor relative humidity setpoint, impacts latent load and coil الأداء.

efficiency_ratio.label: Efficiency Ratio (EER/COP)
efficiency_ratio.helper: التيار system efficiency; baseline for improvement (ANSI/AHRI 210/240).

airflow_rate.label: Airالتدفق المعدل
airflow_rate.helper: Supply air الحجم, critical for capacity and distribution (WERC DC guidelines).

duct_leakage_factor.label: Duct Leakage Factor
duct_leakage_factor.helper: Estimated leakage as لكلcentage of total airالتدفق; affects effective capacity.

occupancy_density.label: Occupancy الكثافة
occupancy_density.helper: People لكل square meter, impacts internal heat gain (ASHRAE 62.1).

is_preventive_maintenance_active.label: Preventive Maintenance Active
is_preventive_maintenance_active.helper: Indicates if PM schedule is followed; affects degradation factor.

flow_rate.label: التدفق المعدل
flow_rate.helper: الحجمtric التدفق المعدل of hydraulic fluid through the system. Typical range for industrial systems: 10-500 L/min.

pressure_drop_total.label: Total الضغط Drop
pressure_drop_total.helper: Sum of all الضغط losses across components (pipes, valves, fittings). ISO 4409 recommends measurement at steady state.

fluid_density.label: Fluid الكثافة
fluid_density.helper: الكثافة of hydraulic fluid at oلكلating temلكلature. Typical mineral oil: 850-900 kg/m³.

kinematic_viscosity.label: Kinematic Viscosity
kinematic_viscosity.helper: Fluid viscosity at oلكلating temلكلature. ISO VG 46 is common for industrial hydraulics.

pipe_length.label: Total Pipe الطول
pipe_length.helper: Total الطول of hydraulic piping in the system. Longer runs increase friction losses.

pipe_diameter.label: Pipe Inner القطر
pipe_diameter.helper: Inner القطر من main hydraulic pipe. Affects التدفق velocity and Reynolds number.

valve_count.label: Number of Valves
valve_count.helper: Total number of directional, الضغط, and التدفق control valves in the system.

fitting_count.label: Number of Fittings
fitting_count.helper: Total number of elbows, tees, reducers, and other fittings.

system_type.label: System Type
system_type.helper: Application type influences typical loss factors and maintenance intervals.

is_new_system.label: New System (less than 1 year in service)
is_new_system.placeholder: أدخل New System (less than 1 year in service)
is_new_system.helper: New systems may have diffeإيجار loss characteristics due to break-in لكلiod.

base_cost.label: Base التكلفة (التيار لكلiod)
base_cost.helper: Total التكلفة of goods or services at the start من analysis لكلiod.

inflation_rate.label: Annual Inflation المعدل
inflation_rate.helper: Expected annual inflation المعدل for the التكلفة category (e.g., CPI, PPI).

period_years.label: Analysis لكلiod (السنوات)
period_years.helper: Number of السنوات over which inflation escalation is calculated.

escalation_method.label: Escalation Method
escalation_method.helper: Method to apply inflation: compound (annual compounding), simple (linear), or stepwise (discrete annual steps).

include_energy.label: Include الطاقة التكلفة Escalation
include_energy.helper: If true, applies a sepaالمعدل الطاقة escalation factor (typically higher than general inflation).

energy_escalation_rate.label: الطاقة Escalation المعدل
energy_escalation_rate.helper: Annual escalation المعدل for الطاقة التكلفةs, often based on EIA forecasts.

labor_productivity_gain.label: Labor Productivity Gain
labor_productivity_gain.helper: Annual productivity improvement that offsets labor التكلفة inflation (Lean / Six Sigma metric).

material_volatility_index.label: المادة Volatility Index
material_volatility_index.helper: Multiplier to adjust المادة inflation based on commodity volatility (e.g., copلكل, steel).

current_rate.label: التيار Interest المعدل (%)
current_rate.helper: The prevailing market interest المعدل for the reference لكلiod.

rate_change.label: Expected المعدل Change (bps)
rate_change.helper: Anticipated shift in interest المعدل in basis points (1 bps = 0.01%).

portfolio_value.label: Portfolio القيمة (USD)
portfolio_value.helper: Total notional القيمة من fixed-income portfolio.

duration.label: Modified المدة (السنوات)
duration.helper: Sensitivity of bond السعر to yield changes, adjusted for yield.

convexity.label: Convexity
convexity.helper: Second-order measure of curvature in السعر-yield relationship.

hedge_ratio.label: Hedge Ratio (%)
hedge_ratio.helper: لكلcentage of portfolio hedged using derivatives or swaps.

confidence_level.label: Confidence Level
confidence_level.helper: Statistical confidence for VaR and tail risk estimation.

volatility_regime.label: Volatility Regime
volatility_regime.helper: Market volatility environment for stress testing.

avg_inventory_value.label: Average Inventory القيمة (USD)
avg_inventory_value.helper: Total average القيمة of inventory over the لكلiod (e.g., monthly average of COGS-based inventory).

cogs_annual.label: Annual التكلفة of Goods Sold (USD)
cogs_annual.placeholder: أدخل Annual التكلفة of Goods Sold (USD)
cogs_annual.helper: Total التكلفة of goods sold over the last 12 months.

demand_variability_coefficient.label: Demand Variability Coefficient (CV)
demand_variability_coefficient.helper: Coefficient of variation of monthly demand (standard deviation / mean). Higher القيمةs indicate greater unpredictability.

obsolescence_rate.label: Obsolescence المعدل (% لكل year)
obsolescence_rate.helper: Annual لكلcentage of inventory القيمة that becomes obsolete or expired.

carrying_cost_rate.label: Inventory Carrying التكلفة المعدل (% لكل year)
carrying_cost_rate.placeholder: أدخل Inventory Carrying التكلفة المعدل (% لكل year)
carrying_cost_rate.helper: Annual التكلفة to hold inventory (storage, insurance, capital, etc.) as a لكلcentage of inventory القيمة.

lead_time_days.label: Average Lead الوقت (الأيام)
lead_time_days.helper: Average replenishment lead الوقت from order placement to receipt.

service_level_target.label: Service Level الهدف (%)
service_level_target.helper: الهدف fill المعدل or cycle service level (e.g., 95% = 0.95).

inventory_accuracy_pct.label: Inventory Record Accuracy (%)
inventory_accuracy_pct.helper: لكلcentage of inventory records matching physical counts (cycle count accuracy).

industry_benchmark_turnover.label: Industry Benchmark Turnover (turns/year)
industry_benchmark_turnover.helper: Expected turnover المعدل for the industry (e.g., WERC benchmark).

initial_investment.label: Initial Investment
initial_investment.helper: Total upfront capital expenditure (CapEx) for the project or asset.

annual_cash_inflow.label: Annual Cash Inالتدفق
annual_cash_inflow.helper: Expected صافي cash inالتدفق لكل year (revenue minus oلكلating التكلفةs).

project_life_years.label: Project Life (السنوات)
project_life_years.helper: المدة over which cash التدفقs are projected.

discount_rate.label: Discount المعدل (WACC)
discount_rate.helper: الوزنed average التكلفة of capital or required المعدل of return.

terminal_value.label: المدةinal القيمة
terminal_value.helper: Residual القيمة At end of project life (e.g., salvage, resale).

cash_flow_variability.label: Cash التدفق Variability
cash_flow_variability.helper: Risk level affecting confidence in cash التدفق estimates (low = ±5%, medium = ±15%, high = ±30%).

lean_six_sigma_adjustment.label: Lean Six Sigma Adjustment
lean_six_sigma_adjustment.helper: If enabled, applies a 2% reduction to cash التدفقs to account for process الهدر and variation (Lean Six Sigma standard).

total_energy_consumption.label: Total الطاقة الاستهلاك
total_energy_consumption.helper: Total الطاقة consumed by the organization in the baseline لكلiod (e.g., one year).

production_volume.label: Production الحجم
production_volume.helper: Total production output in the baseline لكلiod (e.g., number of products, tons, or other relevant unit).

heating_degree_days.label: Heating Degree الأيام (HDD)
heating_degree_days.helper: Annual heating degree الأيام for the facility location, المستخدم to normalize weather-related الطاقة use.

cooling_degree_days.label: Cooling Degree الأيام (CDD)
cooling_degree_days.helper: Annual cooling degree الأيام for the facility location, المستخدم to normalize weather-related الطاقة use.

operating_hours.label: Oلكلating الساعات
operating_hours.helper: Total الساعات the facility opeالمعدلd during the baseline لكلiod.

energy_source_mix.label: الطاقة Source Mix
energy_source_mix.helper: Primary الطاقة sources المستخدم, affecting emission factors and normalization.

baseline_type.label: Baseline Type
baseline_type.helper: Type of baseline لكل ISO 50001:2018 clause 6.3.

use_weather_normalization.label: Apply Weather Normalization
use_weather_normalization.helper: If true, adjusts الطاقة الاستهلاك for heating and cooling degree الأيام.

use_production_normalization.label: Apply Production Normalization
use_production_normalization.helper: If true, adjusts الطاقة الاستهلاك for production الحجم.

labor_rate.label: Labor المعدل (لكل hour)
labor_rate.helper: Average fully loaded labor التكلفة لكل oلكلator hour, including wages, benefits, and overhead. Based on industry benchmarks (BLS, ISO 9001:2015 clause 7.1.6).

operators_affected.label: Number of Oلكلators Affected
operators_affected.helper: Number of direct oلكلators whose work is impacted by the Kaizen event. يُستخدم لحساب labor savings.

time_saved_per_operator.label: الوقت Saved لكل Oلكلator لكل Shift
time_saved_per_operator.placeholder: أدخل الوقت Saved لكل Oلكلator لكل Shift
time_saved_per_operator.helper: Reduction in cycle الوقت or non-القيمة-added الوقت لكل oلكلator لكل shift, measured via الوقت studies (Lean standard work, ISO 22400).

shifts_per_day.label: Shifts لكل Day
shifts_per_day.helper: Number of production shifts لكل day. Typical in manufacturing (WERC DC Measures).

operating_days_per_year.label: Oلكلating الأيام لكل Year
operating_days_per_year.helper: Annual oلكلating الأيام, excluding weekends and holiالأيام. Standard for industrial planning (ISO 9001).

defect_rate_before.label: Defect المعدل Before Kaizen
defect_rate_before.helper: لكلcentage of defective units before improvement. Six Sigma DMAIC baseline (DPMO conversion).

defect_rate_after.label: Defect المعدل After Kaizen
defect_rate_after.helper: لكلcentage of defective units after improvement. Must be <= defect_المعدل_before for valid savings.

annual_production_volume.label: Annual Production الحجم
annual_production_volume.helper: Total units produced لكل year. المستخدم to scale defect savings.

cost_per_defect.label: التكلفة لكل Defect
cost_per_defect.helper: Average التكلفة of rework, scrap, warranty, and inspection لكل defective unit (COPQ, ISO 9001:2015 clause 9.1.3).

material_cost_savings.label: المادة التكلفة Savings (annual)
material_cost_savings.helper: Direct المادة savings from الهدر reduction, scrap reduction, or better yield. Enter 0 if not applicable.

energy_cost_savings.label: الطاقة التكلفة Savings (annual)
energy_cost_savings.helper: الطاقة savings from process improvements (ISO 50001, Lean الطاقة). Enter 0 if not applicable.

implementation_cost.label: Implementation التكلفة (one-الوقت)
implementation_cost.helper: Total التكلفة to implement the Kaizen (training, equipment, downtime). المستخدم for ROI calculation.

sustainability_factor.label: Sustainability Factor
sustainability_factor.helper: Confidence that savings will لكلsist over الوقت. Low = 0.7, Medium = 0.85, High = 1.0. Based on Lean sustainability audits.

data_confidence.label: Data Confidence Level
data_confidence.helper: Quality of إدخال data. Low = 0.8, Medium = 0.9, High = 1.0. Affects adjusted savings.

mass_kg.label: Mass in Kilograms
mass_kg.helper: إدخال mass القيمة in kilograms for conversion to pounds. المستخدم in logistics, manufacturing, and trade.

precision_level.label: Precision Level
precision_level.helper: اختر number of decimal places for output rounding, لكل ISO 80000-1 rounding rules.

use_industry_rounding.label: Use Industry Rounding (WERC)
use_industry_rounding.helper: Apply WERC standard rounding (0.5 up) for trade compliance.

measurement_uncertainty.label: Measurement Uncertainty (%)
measurement_uncertainty.helper: Estimated uncertainty in the إدخال measurement, المستخدم for confidence adjustment (ISO/IEC Guide 98-3).

mass_lbs.label: Mass in Pounds (lb)
mass_lbs.helper: إدخال mass القيمة in pounds for conversion to kilograms. المستخدم in logistics, manufacturing, and المادة handling.

precision_level.label: Precision Level (Decimal Places)
precision_level.helper: اختر number of decimal places for the output. Higher precision for laboratory or quality control (ISO 17025).

rounding_method.label: Rounding Method
rounding_method.helper: Rounding method لكل ASTM E29 or ISO 80000-1. Standard rounding (half up) is default for most industrial applications.

include_loss_analysis.label: Include Hidden Loss Analysis
include_loss_analysis.helper: Enable لحساب potential mass loss due to moisture, measurement error, or المادة handling (Lean Six Sigma الهدر analysis).

measurement_uncertainty_pct.label: Measurement Uncertainty (%)
measurement_uncertainty_pct.helper: Estimated measurement uncertainty as a لكلcentage من mass القيمة. Based on calibration data (ISO 17025, GUM).

material_type.label: المادة Type (for loss factor)
material_type.helper: المادة type influences hidden loss factors (e.g., moisture absorption for hygroscopic المادةs, spillage for powders).

acquisition_cost.label: Acquisition التكلفة
acquisition_cost.helper: Total initial التكلفة of acquiring the asset (purchase, installation, commissioning).

expected_life_years.label: Expected Life (السنوات)
expected_life_years.helper: Planned العمر الإنتاجي من asset لكل ISO 15686.

maintenance_strategy.label: Maintenance Stالمعدلgy
maintenance_strategy.helper: Type of maintenance approach (preventive, predictive, reactive).

labor_rate.label: Labor المعدل
labor_rate.helper: Average hourly التكلفة of maintenance labor.

parts_cost_per_incident.label: Parts التكلفة لكل Incident
parts_cost_per_incident.helper: Average التكلفة of spare parts لكل maintenance event.

downtime_cost_per_hour.label: Downtime التكلفة لكل Hour
downtime_cost_per_hour.helper: Lost revenue or التكلفة لكل hour of unplanned downtime.

inflation_rate.label: Inflation المعدل
inflation_rate.helper: Annual inflation المعدل for future التكلفة adjustments.

discount_rate.label: Discount المعدل
discount_rate.helper: Discount المعدل for صافي present القيمة calculations.

data_confidence.label: Data Confidence
data_confidence.helper: Confidence level in إدخال data accuracy (0-100%).

first_unit_time.label: First Unit الوقت (الساعات)
first_unit_time.helper: Standard الوقت to produce the first unit, typically from historical data or pilot run.

learning_rate.label: Learning المعدل (%)
learning_rate.helper: لكلcentage reduction in الوقت لكل doubling of cumulative units. Typical range 70-95% for manual tasks.

cumulative_units.label: Cumulative Units Produced
cumulative_units.helper: Total number of units produced to date, المستخدم to estimate التيار and future unit times.

target_units.label: الهدف Units for Estimate
target_units.helper: The specific unit number for which the الوقت estimate مطلوب.

shift_length.label: Shift الطول (الساعات)
shift_length.helper: Standard working shift المدة for converting الوقت to calendar الأيام.

learning_model.label: Learning Curve Model
learning_model.helper: اختر theoretical model: Wright (standard), Crawford (unit), or DeJong (plateau).

include_break_in.label: Include Break-In Effect
include_break_in.helper: If true, applies a penalty factor for production interruptions (e.g., after holiالأيام or retooling).

break_in_penalty.label: Break-In Penalty (%)
break_in_penalty.helper: لكلcentage increase in الوقت for the first unit after a break, applied only if break-in is enabled.

equipmentcost.label: Equipment Purchase السعر
equipmentcost.helper: Total upfront التكلفة to acquire the asset if شراءing.

leasetermmonths.label: Lease المدة
leasetermmonths.helper: المدة من lease agreement in months.

monthlyleasepayment.label: Monthly Lease Payment
monthlyleasepayment.helper: Fixed monthly payment under the lease contract.

residualvalue.label: Residual القيمة At End of Lease
residualvalue.placeholder: أدخل Residual القيمة At End of Lease
residualvalue.helper: Estimated market القيمة من equipment at lease end (if شراءing, this is قيمة الخردة).

annualmaintenancecost.label: Annual Maintenance التكلفة (شراء)
annualmaintenancecost.helper: Expected yearly maintenance expense when owning the equipment.

leasemaintenanceincluded.label: Maintenance Included in Lease?
leasemaintenanceincluded.helper: Indicates whether the lease contract covers routine maintenance.

discountrate.label: Discount المعدل (WACC)
discountrate.helper: الوزنed average التكلفة of capital المستخدم to discount future cash التدفقs.

utilizationrate.label: Expected Utilization المعدل
utilizationrate.helper: لكلcentage of الوقت the equipment is expected to be productive.

taxrate.label: Effective Tax المعدل
taxrate.helper: Corpoالمعدل tax المعدل applied to depreciation and lease payment deductions.

depreciationmethod.label: Depreciation Method
depreciationmethod.helper: Method يُستخدم لحساب annual depreciation for tax shield.

leasetype.label: Lease Type
leasetype.helper: Oلكلating lease is off-balance-sheet; capital lease is treated as ownership.

current_weight_kg.label: التيار الوزن لكل Unit (kg)
current_weight_kg.helper: الوزن من product or packaging before lightالوزنing.

new_weight_kg.label: New الوزن لكل Unit (kg)
new_weight_kg.helper: الوزن من product or packaging after lightالوزنing.

annual_volume_units.label: Annual الحجم (units)
annual_volume_units.helper: Total number of units produced or shipped لكل year.

material_cost_per_kg.label: المادة التكلفة لكل kg
material_cost_per_kg.helper: التكلفة of raw المادة لكل kilogram.

waste_rate_percent.label: الهدر المعدل (%)
waste_rate_percent.helper: لكلcentage of المادة الهدرd during production (scrap, rework).

labor_hours_per_unit.label: Labor الساعات لكل Unit
labor_hours_per_unit.helper: Direct Labor الساعات required to produce one unit.

energy_consumption_per_kg.label: الطاقة الاستهلاك لكل kg of المادة
energy_consumption_per_kg.placeholder: أدخل الطاقة الاستهلاك لكل kg of المادة
energy_consumption_per_kg.helper: الطاقة المستخدمة to process one kilogram of المادة.

overhead_rate_percent.label: Overhead المعدل (%)
overhead_rate_percent.helper: لكلcentage of direct التكلفةs allocated to overhead.

material_type.label: المادة Type
material_type.helper: Type of المادة being lightالوزنed, affects processing and recyclability.

use_recycled_content.label: Use Recycled Content
use_recycled_content.helper: Whether the new المادة includes recycled content, which may reduce التكلفة and environmental impact.

liters.label: الحجم in Liters
liters.helper: Total liquid الحجم to be converted, typically from production batch or storage tank measurement.

conversionstandard.label: Conversion Standard
conversionstandard.helper: اختر gallon standard based on regional regulatory or trade requirements (ISO 80000-1).

temperatureadjustment.label: Temلكلature Adjustment Factor
temperatureadjustment.helper: Correction factor for thermal expansion/contraction of liquid (لكل ASTM D1250). 1.0 = no adjustment.

batchlossfactor.label: Batch Loss Factor
batchlossfactor.helper: Expected لكلcentage loss during transfer or processing (Lean Six Sigma الهدر reduction).

includeevaporation.label: Include Evaporation Loss
includeevaporation.helper: If true, applies an additional evaporation loss factor based on standard industrial evaporation المعدلs.

value_x.label: القيمة X (oلكلand)
value_x.helper: Primary إدخال for logarithmic calculation. Represents throughput, defect count, or signal amplitude.

base.label: Logarithm Base
base.helper: اختر logarithmic base لكل application: base 2 for binary entropy, base e for continuous processes, base 10 for decibel and pH scales.

unit_type.label: Unit Type
unit_type.helper: اختر unit type to apply correct scaling for decibel calculations in acoustics, electronics, or vibration analysis.

reference_value.label: Reference القيمة (for ratio)
reference_value.helper: Reference baseline for ratio-based logarithmic calculations (e.g., reference القدرة, reference amplitude).

enable_threshold_alerts.label: Enable Threshold Alerts
enable_threshold_alerts.helper: Toggle to activate automated alerts when logarithmic results exceed predefined industrial thresholds.

route_distance_km.label: Route المسافة (km)
route_distance_km.helper: Total المسافة من route from origin to destination.

average_speed_kmh.label: Average Speed (km/h)
average_speed_kmh.helper: Expected average speed under normal conditions.

planned_stops.label: Planned Stops
planned_stops.helper: Number of planned stops along the route (e.g., for pickup/delivery).

average_stop_time_min.label: Average Stop الوقت (min)
average_stop_time_min.helper: Average الوقت spent لكل stop, including waiting and handling.

traffic_delay_factor.label: Traffic Delay Factor
traffic_delay_factor.helper: Fraction of driving الوقت lost due to traffic congestion (0 = none, 1 = 100% delay).

fuel_cost_per_km.label: الوقود التكلفة لكل كم
fuel_cost_per_km.helper: Average الوقود التكلفة لكل kilometer for the vehicle type.

vehicle_operating_cost_per_km.label: Vehicle Oلكلating التكلفة لكل كم
vehicle_operating_cost_per_km.placeholder: أدخل Vehicle Oلكلating التكلفة لكل كم
vehicle_operating_cost_per_km.helper: Non-الوقود oلكلating التكلفةs لكل km (maintenance, tires, depreciation).

load_value_currency.label: Load القيمة (currency)
load_value_currency.helper: Total moصافيary القيمة من cargo being النقلed.

transit_time_target_hours.label: Transit الوقت الهدف (الساعات)
transit_time_target_hours.helper: الهدف transit الوقت for the route (المستخدم to compute الوقت-based penalties).

route_type.label: Route Type
route_type.helper: Type of route affecting speed and delay assumptions.

use_real_time_traffic.label: Use Real-الوقت Traffic Data
use_real_time_traffic.helper: If true, the calculator will adjust traffic delay factor based on real-الوقت data (premium feature).

purchase_price.label: Purchase السعر
purchase_price.helper: Initial capital investment for the machine, including installation and commissioning.

salvage_value.label: قيمة الخردة at End of Life
salvage_value.placeholder: أدخل قيمة الخردة at End of Life
salvage_value.helper: Estimated resale or scrap القيمة At the end من machine's العمر الإنتاجي.

useful_life_years.label: Estimated العمر الإنتاجي
useful_life_years.helper: Expected number of السنوات the machine will be oلكلational before major overhaul or replacement.

annual_operating_cost.label: Annual Oلكلating التكلفة (Year 1)
annual_operating_cost.helper: Includes الطاقة, مستهلكات, labor, and routine maintenance in the first year.

operating_cost_escalation_rate.label: Oلكلating التكلفة Escalation المعدل
operating_cost_escalation_rate.helper: Annual increase in oلكلating التكلفةs due to aging, inflation, and wear.

discount_rate.label: Discount المعدل (WACC)
discount_rate.helper: الوزنed average التكلفة of capital المستخدم for صافي present القيمة calculations.

annual_production_units.label: Annual Production Units
annual_production_units.helper: Number of units produced لكل year at full capacity.

revenue_per_unit.label: Revenue لكل Unit
revenue_per_unit.helper: Selling السعر لكل unit produced by the machine.

quality_defect_rate.label: Initial Defect المعدل
quality_defect_rate.helper: لكلcentage of defective units in the first year, المستخدم to model quality degradation over الوقت.

defect_rate_annual_increase.label: Defect المعدل Annual Increase
defect_rate_annual_increase.helper: Yearly increase in defect المعدل due to machine wear, impacting rework and scrap التكلفةs.

maintenance_strategy.label: Maintenance Stالمعدلgy
maintenance_strategy.helper: Type of maintenance program in place, affecting downtime and التكلفة patterns.

utilization_rate.label: Utilization المعدل
utilization_rate.helper: لكلcentage of available الوقت the machine is actually producing.

energy_cost_per_kwh.label: الطاقة التكلفة لكل kWh
energy_cost_per_kwh.helper: التكلفة of electricity لكل kilowatt-hour, المستخدم for الطاقة الاستهلاك modeling.

power_consumption_kw.label: القدرة الاستهلاك
power_consumption_kw.helper: المعدلd القدرة الاستهلاك من machine during oلكلation.

cutting_speed.label: Cutting Speed (Vc)
cutting_speed.helper: ISO 3685 standard for tool life; affects surface finish and cycle الوقت.

feed_rate.label: Feed المعدل (f)
feed_rate.helper: ISO 3002/1 standard; influences chip load and tool wear.

depth_of_cut.label: العمق of Cut (ap)
depth_of_cut.helper: ISO 3002/1; affects cutting forces and القدرة الاستهلاك.

part_length.label: Part الطول (L)
part_length.helper: Workpiece geometry; defines total travel المسافة.

part_diameter.label: Part القطر (D)
part_diameter.helper: Workpiece القطر; المستخدم for rotational speed calculation.

tool_change_time.label: Tool Change الوقت (Tct)
tool_change_time.helper: SMED (Single Minute Exchange of Die) metric; Lean manufacturing.

tool_life_minutes.label: Tool Life (T)
tool_life_minutes.helper: ISO 3685 Taylor tool life equation; affects التكلفة and downtime.

number_of_passes.label: Number of Passes (n_passes)
number_of_passes.helper: Roughing/finishing stالمعدلgy; impacts total cycle الوقت.

machine_type.label: Machine Type
machine_type.helper: ISO 841 for coordinate systems; affects spindle القدرة and rigidity.

use_high_feed.label: High Feed Stالمعدلgy
use_high_feed.helper: Lean Six Sigma approach to reduce cycle الوقت; may increase tool wear.

revenue.label: Total Revenue
revenue.helper: Total sales revenue for the لكلiod (ISO 9001 financial reporting).

materialcost.label: Direct المادة التكلفة
materialcost.helper: التكلفة of raw المادةs directly المستخدم in production (Lean التكلفة accounting).

laborcost.label: Direct Labor التكلفة
laborcost.helper: Wages and benefits for production labor (Six Sigma labor variance).

overheadcost.label: Manufacturing Overhead
overheadcost.helper: Indirect manufacturing التكلفةs (ISO 14000 environmental overhead allocation).

defectrate.label: Defect المعدل
defectrate.helper: لكلcentage of defective units (Six Sigma DPMO metric).

reworkcostperunit.label: Rework التكلفة لكل Unit
reworkcostperunit.helper: Average التكلفة to rework one defective unit (Lean الهدر reduction).

unitsproduced.label: Units Produced
unitsproduced.helper: Total units produced in the لكلiod (WERC throughput metric).

inventoryholdingcost.label: Inventory Holding التكلفة المعدل
inventoryholdingcost.helper: Annual holding التكلفة as لكلcentage of inventory القيمة (WERC warehousing standard).

averageinventoryvalue.label: Average Inventory القيمة
averageinventoryvalue.helper: Average القيمة of inventory held (ISO 9001 inventory management).

logisticscost.label: Logistics التكلفة
logisticscost.helper: Total inbound and outbound freight التكلفةs (WERC logistics benchmark).

qualitysystemcost.label: Quality System التكلفة
qualitysystemcost.helper: التكلفة of quality management system (ISO 9001 compliance).

productionvolume.label: Production الحجم
productionvolume.helper: Number of units produced for the لكلiod (Lean throughput).

setuptimehours.label: الإعداد الوقت لكل Batch
setuptimehours.helper: الوقت to change over equipment between batches (Lean SMED).

batchsize.label: Batch Size
batchsize.helper: Number of units لكل production batch (Lean batch size reduction).

laborrate.label: Labor المعدل
laborrate.helper: Hourly wage including benefits (Six Sigma labor variance).

machinedowntimepercent.label: Machine Downtime
machinedowntimepercent.helper: لكلcentage of scheduled الوقت machine is down (OEE metric).

energycostperunit.label: الطاقة التكلفة لكل Unit
energycostperunit.helper: الطاقة التكلفة allocated لكل unit produced (ISO 50001 الطاقة management).

warrantyreturnrate.label: Warranty Return المعدل
warrantyreturnrate.helper: لكلcentage of units returned under warranty (Six Sigma customer quality).

warrantycostperreturn.label: Warranty التكلفة لكل Return
warrantycostperreturn.helper: Average التكلفة to process one warranty return (ISO 9001 customer feedback).

scraprate.label: Scrap المعدل
scraprate.helper: لكلcentage of المادة scrapped (Lean الهدر elimination).

materialcostperunit.label: المادة التكلفة لكل Unit
materialcostperunit.helper: Standard المادة التكلفة لكل good unit (Lean التكلفة analysis).

current_material_cost.label: التيار المادة التكلفة لكل Unit
current_material_cost.placeholder: أدخل التيار المادة التكلفة لكل Unit
current_material_cost.helper: Direct المادة التكلفة لكل unit for the التيار المادة.

alternative_material_cost.label: Alternative المادة التكلفة لكل Unit
alternative_material_cost.placeholder: أدخل Alternative المادة التكلفة لكل Unit
alternative_material_cost.helper: Direct المادة التكلفة لكل unit for the alternative المادة.

annual_volume.label: Annual الحجم (units)
annual_volume.helper: Total number of units produced or purchased لكل year.

scrap_rate_current.label: التيار Scrap المعدل (%)
scrap_rate_current.helper: لكلcentage of units scrapped due to defects with التيار المادة.

scrap_rate_alternative.label: Alternative Scrap المعدل (%)
scrap_rate_alternative.helper: لكلcentage of units scrapped due to defects with alternative المادة.

logistics_cost_current.label: التيار Logistics التكلفة لكل Unit
logistics_cost_current.placeholder: أدخل التيار Logistics التكلفة لكل Unit
logistics_cost_current.helper: النقلation, handling, and warehousing التكلفة لكل unit for التيار المادة.

logistics_cost_alternative.label: Alternative Logistics التكلفة لكل Unit
logistics_cost_alternative.placeholder: أدخل Alternative Logistics التكلفة لكل Unit
logistics_cost_alternative.helper: النقلation, handling, and warehousing التكلفة لكل unit for alternative المادة.

changeover_cost.label: One-الوقت Changeover التكلفة
changeover_cost.helper: التكلفة to retool, test, and qualify the alternative المادة.

quality_impact.label: Quality Impact on Downstream
quality_impact.helper: Expected impact of المادة change on downstream rework or quality issues.

supplier_reliability.label: Alternative Supplier Reliability
supplier_reliability.helper: Historical on-الوقت delivery الأداء من alternative supplier.

currency_risk.label: Currency Risk Factor
currency_risk.helper: Expected annual currency fluctuation risk if sourcing from diffeإيجار region.

inventory_holding_cost.label: Inventory Holding التكلفة المعدل
inventory_holding_cost.helper: Annual التكلفة to hold inventory as a لكلcentage of unit التكلفة (WERC standard).

lead_time_current.label: التيار Lead الوقت (الأيام)
lead_time_current.helper: Average lead الوقت for التيار المادة.

lead_time_alternative.label: Alternative Lead الوقت (الأيام)
lead_time_alternative.helper: Average lead الوقت for alternative المادة.

value_mm.label: القيمة in Millimeters
value_mm.helper: The linear dimension to be converted from millimeters to inches. Typical range for industrial parts: 0.1 mm to 10,000 mm.

precision.label: Decimal Precision
precision.helper: Number of decimal places for the inch النتيجة. ISO 2768-m standard suggests 2-4 decimals for general tolerances.

tolerance_mm.label: Tolerance (mm)
tolerance_mm.helper: Manufacturing tolerance in millimeters. المستخدم to compute tolerance in inches and assess quality thresholds.

unit_system.label: الهدف Unit System
unit_system.helper: اختر output unit system. Imلكلial outputs inches; metric outputs millimeters (for cross-check).

apply_six_sigma.label: Apply Six Sigma Adjustment
apply_six_sigma.helper: If true, applies a 1.5 sigma shift to account for process drift (Six Sigma DMAIC methodology).

annual_demand.label: Annual Demand (units)
annual_demand.helper: Total forecasted demand for the SKU over one year. يُستخدم لحساب order frequency and cycle stock.

ordering_cost.label: Ordering التكلفة لكل Order ($)
ordering_cost.helper: Fixed التكلفة لكل purchase order (الإعداد, administrative, freight). Influences EOQ and total logistics التكلفة.

holding_cost_per_unit.label: Holding التكلفة لكل Unit لكل Year ($)
holding_cost_per_unit.placeholder: أدخل Holding التكلفة لكل Unit لكل Year ($)
holding_cost_per_unit.helper: التكلفة to hold one unit in inventory for one year (storage, insurance, obsolescence). Key for inventory carrying التكلفة.

unit_cost.label: Unit التكلفة ($)
unit_cost.helper: Purchase التكلفة لكل unit from supplier. المستخدم in Total التكلفة calculations and MOQ financial impact.

moq.label: Minimum Order الكمية (units)
moq.helper: Supplier-imposed minimum batch size. If EOQ < MOQ, order الكمية must be adjusted upward, increasing holding التكلفة.

lead_time_days.label: Lead الوقت (الأيام)
lead_time_days.helper: الوقت from order placement to receipt. المستخدم for safety stock calculation and reorder point.

demand_std_dev.label: Demand Standard Deviation (units/day)
demand_std_dev.helper: Daily demand variability. Critical for safety stock under Six Sigma service levels.

service_level.label: Service Level (%)
service_level.helper: Desired probability of not stocking out during lead الوقت. المستخدم to derive z-score for safety stock.

days_per_year.label: Oلكلating الأيام لكل Year
days_per_year.helper: Number of الأيام the facility opeالمعدلs. Converts annual demand to daily demand.

storage_capacity.label: Storage Capacity (units)
storage_capacity.helper: Maximum inventory the warehouse can physically hold. Constraint for feasible order الكمية.

backorder_cost_per_unit.label: Backorder التكلفة لكل Unit ($)
backorder_cost_per_unit.helper: التكلفة لكل unit of unmet demand (lost sales, penalty, expediting). المستخدم in Total التكلفة trade-off.

supplier_reliability.label: Supplier Reliability Factor
supplier_reliability.helper: Probability that supplier delivers on الوقت. Adjusts safety stock for lead الوقت variability (Lean JIT).

inventory_policy.label: Inventory Policy
inventory_policy.helper: Review method: continuous (Q,R) or لكلiodic (P,T). Affects safety stock formula.

use_moq_override.label: Force MOQ Compliance
use_moq_override.helper: If true, order الكمية is rounded up to MOQ when EOQ < MOQ. If false, EOQ is المستخدم even if below MOQ (may violate supplier المدةs).

mpg_value.label: الوقود Economy (MPG)
mpg_value.helper: Primary إدخال: miles لكل gallon (US gallon). Typical range for passenger vehicles: 10–60 mpg. المستخدم in North American fleet reporting.

fuel_type.label: الوقود Type
fuel_type.helper: Deالمدةines carbon intensity and الطاقة content. Required for environmental loss calculations لكل ISO 14067.

driving_cycle.label: Driving Cycle
driving_cycle.helper: Affects real-world efficiency deviation. المستخدم in Six Sigma process capability analysis for fleet variance.

annual_mileage.label: Annual Mileage
annual_mileage.helper: المستخدم to compute total الوقود الاستهلاك, التكلفة, and emissions. Typical fleet vehicle: 10k–30k miles/year.

fuel_price_per_gallon.label: الوقود السعر لكل Gallon
fuel_price_per_gallon.helper: Local الوقود التكلفة for Total التكلفة of ownership (TCO) analysis. إدخال for Lean التكلفة reduction projects.

co2_per_gallon.label: CO₂ لكل Gallon
co2_per_gallon.helper: Default for gasoline: 8.887 kg CO₂/gallon (EPA). المستخدم for environmental impact assessment لكل ISO 14064.

num_parts.label: Number of Parts in Study
num_parts.placeholder: أدخل Number of Parts in Study
num_parts.helper: Number of distinct parts selected for the Gage R&R study, typically 5-20 لكل AIAG MSA guidelines.

num_appraisers.label: Number of Appraisers
num_appraisers.helper: Number of oلكلators or appraisers لكلforming measurements, minimum 2 for reproducibility estimation.

num_trials.label: Number of Trials لكل Part
num_trials.placeholder: أدخل Number of Trials لكل Part
num_trials.helper: Number of repeated measurements لكل part لكل appraiser, typically 2-3.

total_variation.label: Total Observed Variation (Std Dev)
total_variation.helper: Standard deviation of all measurements in the study, representing total process variation.

repeatability_variation.label: Repeatability Variation (Std Dev)
repeatability_variation.helper: Variation due to equipment (same oلكلator, same part, repeated measurements).

reproducibility_variation.label: Reproducibility Variation (Std Dev)
reproducibility_variation.helper: Variation due to diffeإيجار oلكلators measuring the same part.

cost_per_defect.label: التكلفة لكل Defect (Internal)
cost_per_defect.helper: Average التكلفة incurred when a non-conforming unit is detected internally (scrap, rework, inspection).

cost_per_escaped_defect.label: التكلفة لكل Escaped Defect (External)
cost_per_escaped_defect.helper: Average التكلفة when a defect reaches the customer (warranty, liability, lost sales).

annual_production_volume.label: Annual Production الحجم
annual_production_volume.helper: Total number of units produced لكل year for the measured characteristic.

defect_rate.label: التيار Defect المعدل (ppm)
defect_rate.helper: Parts لكل million non-conforming based on التيار measurement system.

include_hidden_losses.label: Include Hidden Losses (False Positives/Negatives)
include_hidden_losses.helper: If true, calculates التكلفةs from misclassifications due to measurement error.

operating_hours_per_year.label: Oلكلating الساعات لكل Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Total planned oلكلating الساعات من equipment لكل year. يُستخدم لحساب failure frequency and downtime.

number_of_units.label: Number of Units
number_of_units.helper: Total number of identical or similar assets in the fleet.

mtbf.label: Mean الوقت Between Failures (MTBF)
mtbf.helper: Average الوقت between failures for a repairable system. Higher is better. ISO 14224.

mttr.label: Mean الوقت To Repair (MTTR)
mttr.helper: Average الوقت to restore a failed system to oلكلational state. Lower is better. Includes diagnosis, repair, testing.

cost_per_downtime_hour.label: التكلفة لكل Downtime Hour
cost_per_downtime_hour.helper: Lost profit or التكلفة incurred لكل hour of equipment downtime (lost production, labor, penalties).

cost_per_failure_event.label: التكلفة لكل Failure Event (excluding downtime)
cost_per_failure_event.placeholder: أدخل التكلفة لكل Failure Event (excluding downtime)
cost_per_failure_event.helper: Fixed التكلفةs لكل failure: spare parts, logistics, contractor fees, administrative overhead.

maintenance_labor_rate.label: Maintenance Labor المعدل
maintenance_labor_rate.helper: Hourly التكلفة of maintenance لكلsonnel (including overhead).

reliability_improvement_investment.label: Reliability Improvement Investment (annual)
reliability_improvement_investment.helper: Annual budget allocated to reliability improvement projects (training, redesign, predictive maintenance).

availability_target.label: التوفر الهدف
availability_target.helper: الهدف oلكلational التوفر (uptime / total الوقت). المستخدم for gap analysis.

industry_benchmark_mtbf.label: Industry Benchmark MTBF
industry_benchmark_mtbf.helper: Reference MTBF from industry standards (e.g., WERC, ISO) for comparison.

material_cost_per_unit.label: المادة التكلفة لكل Unit
material_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct المادة التكلفة لكل unit of product, including raw المادةs and purchased components.

labor_cost_per_hour.label: Labor التكلفة لكل Hour
labor_cost_per_hour.helper: Average fully burdened labor التكلفة لكل hour for direct oلكلators.

overhead_rate.label: Overhead المعدل
overhead_rate.helper: لكلcentage of direct labor التكلفة allocated to manufacturing overhead (ISO 9001 التكلفة accounting).

defect_rate.label: Defect المعدل
defect_rate.helper: لكلcentage of units produced that are defective and require rework or scrap (Six Sigma DPMO metric).

rework_time_per_unit.label: Rework الوقت لكل Unit
rework_time_per_unit.helper: Average الوقت spent reworking a defective unit.

scrap_rate.label: Scrap المعدل
scrap_rate.helper: لكلcentage of defective units that are scrapped (cannot be reworked).

waiting_time_per_unit.label: Waiting الوقت لكل Unit
waiting_time_per_unit.helper: Average idle الوقت لكل unit due to bottlenecks, المادة shortages, or equipment downtime (Lean Takt الوقت analysis).

excess_motion_cost_per_unit.label: Excess Motion التكلفة لكل Unit
excess_motion_cost_per_unit.placeholder: أدخل Excess Motion التكلفة لكل Unit
excess_motion_cost_per_unit.helper: التكلفة of unnecessary worker movement (walking, reaching) لكل unit, based on الوقت-motion studies.

inventory_holding_cost_per_unit.label: Inventory Holding التكلفة لكل Unit
inventory_holding_cost_per_unit.placeholder: أدخل Inventory Holding التكلفة لكل Unit
inventory_holding_cost_per_unit.helper: التكلفة of holding one unit in inventory لكل year (WERC DC Metrics).

overproduction_quantity.label: Overproduction الكمية
overproduction_quantity.helper: Number of units produced beyond customer demand (Muda of overproduction).

transportation_cost_per_unit.label: النقلation التكلفة لكل Unit
transportation_cost_per_unit.helper: التكلفة of moving المادةs or products between processes (Lean الهدر of النقلation).

processing_waste_per_unit.label: Processing الهدر لكل Unit
processing_waste_per_unit.helper: التكلفة of unnecessary processing steps or non-القيمة-added oلكلations.

production_volume.label: Production الحجم
production_volume.helper: Total number of units produced in the analysis لكلiod.
