shift_hours_per_day.label: Shift الساعات لكل Day
shift_hours_per_day.helper: Number of oلكلating الساعات لكل shift.

working_days_per_year.label: Working الأيام لكل Year
working_days_per_year.helper: Number of working الأيام لكل year.

industry_type.label: Industry Type
industry_type.helper: Industry sector for benchmarking and threshold adjustment.

include_hidden_losses.label: Include Hidden Losses
include_hidden_losses.helper: If true, includes intangible losses such as lost opportunity التكلفة and brand damage.

num_workers_exposed.label: Number of workers exposed
num_workers_exposed.helper: Total headcount in the noise/vibration zone (e.g., assembly line, press shop).

avg_daily_exposure_hours.label: Average daily exposure الساعات
avg_daily_exposure_hours.helper: لكل worker, typical shift المدة in the affected المساحة.

noise_level_dba.label: Noise level (A-الوزنed)
noise_level_dba.helper: Measured at oلكلator position لكل ISO 9612. 85 dB(A) is typical action level.

vibration_level_ms2.label: Vibration level (RMS acceleration)
vibration_level_ms2.helper: الوزنed acceleration لكل ISO 2631-1. Hand-arm or whole-body.

machine_runtime_hours_per_day.label: Machine وقت التشغيل لكل day
machine_runtime_hours_per_day.placeholder: أدخل Machine وقت التشغيل لكل day
machine_runtime_hours_per_day.helper: Total oلكلating الساعات من primary noise/vibration source.

maintenance_cost_per_machine_per_year.label: Annual maintenance التكلفة لكل machine
maintenance_cost_per_machine_per_year.placeholder: أدخل Annual maintenance التكلفة لكل machine
maintenance_cost_per_machine_per_year.helper: التيار average spend on repairs and parts for each affected machine.

number_of_machines.label: Number of machines in zone
number_of_machines.placeholder: أدخل Number of machines in zone
number_of_machines.helper: Count of equipment generating noise/vibration in the assessed المساحة.

avg_worker_annual_salary.label: Average worker annual salary (fully loaded)
avg_worker_annual_salary.placeholder: أدخل Average worker annual salary (fully loaded)
avg_worker_annual_salary.helper: Includes wages, benefits, overhead. المستخدم to estimate productivity loss.

hearing_protection_cost_per_worker_per_y.label: Hearing protection التكلفة لكل worker لكل year
hearing_protection_cost_per_worker_per_y.placeholder: أدخل Hearing protection التكلفة لكل worker لكل year

quality_defect_rate_percent.label: التيار defect المعدل due to vibration
quality_defect_rate_percent.placeholder: أدخل التيار defect المعدل due to vibration
quality_defect_rate_percent.helper: Estimated لكلcentage of parts affected by vibration-induced quality issues (e.g., surface finish, tolerances).

annual_production_volume.label: Annual production الحجم
annual_production_volume.helper: Total units produced لكل year in the assessed line.

cost_per_defect.label: التكلفة لكل defect (rework + scrap)
cost_per_defect.helper: Average التكلفة to rework or scrap a defective unit.

machine_power_kw.label: Machine القدرة الاستهلاك
machine_power_kw.helper: Average القدرة draw لكل machine during oلكلation.

vibration_reduction_investment.label: Vibration reduction investment (one-الوقت)
vibration_reduction_investment.helper: Budget for damلكلs, isolators, foundations, or redesign.

noise_reduction_investment.label: Noise reduction investment (one-الوقت)
noise_reduction_investment.helper: Budget for enclosures, silencers, acoustic panels.

iso_standard_compliance.label: ISO standard compliance level
iso_standard_compliance.helper: اختر most relevant standard for threshold evaluation.

initial_investment.label: Initial Investment (CAPEX)
initial_investment.helper: Total upfront capital expenditure including equipment, installation, and commissioning التكلفةs.

discount_rate.label: Discount المعدل (WACC)
discount_rate.helper: الوزنed average التكلفة of capital reflecting the opportunity التكلفة of capital.

project_life_years.label: Project Life (السنوات)
project_life_years.helper: Expected oلكلational lifespan من investment لكل ISO 15686-5.

annual_cash_inflow.label: Annual Cash Inالتدفق
annual_cash_inflow.helper: Expected annual revenue or التكلفة savings geneالمعدلd by the investment.

annual_cash_outflow.label: Annual Cash Outالتدفق
annual_cash_outflow.helper: Annual oلكلating expenses, maintenance, and other recurring التكلفةs.

salvage_value.label: قيمة الخردة
salvage_value.helper: Estimated residual القيمة At the end of project life.

inflation_rate.label: Inflation المعدل
inflation_rate.helper: Expected annual inflation المعدل for nominal cash التدفق adjustments.

tax_rate.label: Effective Tax المعدل
tax_rate.helper: Corpoالمعدل tax المعدل applied to صافي income.

depreciation_method.label: Depreciation Method
depreciation_method.helper: Depreciation method for tax shield calculation لكل GAAP/IFRS.

include_sensitivity.label: Include Sensitivity Analysis
include_sensitivity.helper: Toggle to enable Monte Carlo simulation for risk assessment.

planned_production_time.label: Planned Production الوقت (minutes)
planned_production_time.helper: Total scheduled الوقت for production in a shift/day (e.g., 8 الساعات = 480 minutes).

downtime_minutes.label: Total Downtime (minutes)
downtime_minutes.helper: Sum of all unplanned and planned stops (breakdowns, الإعداد, maintenance).

ideal_cycle_time.label: Ideal Cycle الوقت (minutes لكل unit)
ideal_cycle_time.placeholder: أدخل Ideal Cycle الوقت (minutes لكل unit)
ideal_cycle_time.helper: Theoretical fastest الوقت to produce one unit under optimal conditions.

total_parts_produced.label: Total Parts Produced
total_parts_produced.helper: Total count of units produced during the planned production الوقت.

defective_parts.label: Defective Parts
defective_parts.helper: Number of units that do not meet quality standards (scrap, rework).

shift_type.label: Shift Type
shift_type.helper: Type of shift to adjust for fatigue or environmental factors.

include_micro_stops.label: Include Micro-Stops (< 2 min) in Downtime
include_micro_stops.placeholder: أدخل Include Micro-Stops (< 2 min) in Downtime
include_micro_stops.helper: If true, small stops are counted as downtime لكل Six Sigma guidelines.

annual_usage_units.label: Annual Usage (units)
annual_usage_units.helper: Total number of office supply units (e.g., reams of paلكل, pens) consumed لكل year.

unit_cost.label: Unit التكلفة
unit_cost.helper: Average purchase التكلفة لكل unit من office supply item.

order_cost.label: Order التكلفة لكل Purchase Order
order_cost.placeholder: أدخل Order التكلفة لكل Purchase Order
order_cost.helper: Fixed التكلفة associated with placing a single purchase order (labor, processing, etc.).

holding_cost_rate.label: Holding التكلفة المعدل
holding_cost_rate.helper: Annual inventory holding التكلفة as a لكلcentage of unit التكلفة (storage, insurance, obsolescence).

waste_percentage.label: الهدر لكلcentage
waste_percentage.helper: Estimated لكلcentage of supplies الهدرd due to over-ordering, expiration, or damage.

order_frequency.label: Order Frequency
order_frequency.helper: How often orders are placed, affecting order size and inventory levels.

use_lean_inventory.label: Use Lean Inventory Principles
use_lean_inventory.helper: If enabled, applies just-in-الوقت ordering to reduce holding التكلفةs and الهدر.

voltage.label: Voltage (V)
voltage.helper: Nominal voltage لكل IEC 60038. Typical industrial القيمةs: 230V single-phase, 400V three-phase.

current.label: التيار (I)
current.helper: تيار الحمل in amلكلes. المستخدم for conductor sizing and protection coordination.

resistance.label: Resistance (R)
resistance.helper: DC resistance or AC impedance at القدرة frequency. Includes conductor, contact, and load resistance.

powerfactor.label: القدرة Factor (cos φ)
powerfactor.helper: Ratio of real القدرة to appaإيجار القدرة. Typical industrial loads: 0.8-1.0. المستخدم for AC القدرة calculations.

phasetype.label: Phase Type
phasetype.helper: Single-phase or three-phase system. Affects القدرة calculation formulas لكل IEC 60364.

temperature.label: Ambient Temلكلature
temperature.helper: Ambient temلكلature for resistance temلكلature correction. Copلكل conductor TCR = 0.00393 /°C.

current_headcount.label: التيار Headcount (FTEs)
current_headcount.helper: Number of full-الوقت equivalent الموظفون التيارly working in the department or line.

avg_hourly_wage.label: Average Hourly Wage (Base)
avg_hourly_wage.helper: Average base hourly wage for the role, excluding overtime premium.

overtime_premium.label: Overtime Premium Multiplier
overtime_premium.helper: Standard overtime pay multiplier (e.g., 1.5 for الوقت-and-a-half, 2.0 for double الوقت).

overtime_hours_per_week.label: Overtime الساعات لكل Week (لكل FTE)
overtime_hours_per_week.placeholder: أدخل Overtime الساعات لكل Week (لكل FTE)
overtime_hours_per_week.helper: Average overtime الساعات worked لكل full-الوقت employee لكل week.

hiring_cost_per_fte.label: Hiring التكلفة لكل FTE
hiring_cost_per_fte.helper: Total التكلفة to recruit, interview, onboard, and train a new employee (including agency fees, training المادةs, lost productivity).

annual_benefits_cost_per_fte.label: Annual Benefits التكلفة لكل FTE
annual_benefits_cost_per_fte.placeholder: أدخل Annual Benefits التكلفة لكل FTE
annual_benefits_cost_per_fte.helper: Annual التكلفة of benefits (health insurance, retirement, paid leave, etc.) لكل full-الوقت employee.

productivity_factor_overtime.label: Overtime Productivity Factor
productivity_factor_overtime.helper: Productivity during overtime as a لكلcentage of normal shift productivity (e.g., 85% due to fatigue).

productivity_factor_new_hire.label: New Hire Ramp-Up Productivity
productivity_factor_new_hire.helper: Average productivity of a new hire during the first 3 months as a لكلcentage of an exلكلienced employee.

quality_defect_rate_overtime.label: Overtime Defect المعدل Increase
quality_defect_rate_overtime.helper: Additional defect المعدل (in لكلcentage points) observed during overtime shifts due to fatigue.

quality_defect_rate_normal.label: Normal Defect المعدل
quality_defect_rate_normal.helper: Baseline defect المعدل during regular shifts.

cost_per_defect.label: التكلفة لكل Defect (rework/scrap)
cost_per_defect.helper: Average التكلفة to rework or scrap a defective unit (labor, المادةs, disposal).

weekly_productive_hours_needed.label: Weekly Productive الساعات Needed
weekly_productive_hours_needed.helper: Total productive الساعات required لكل week to meet demand (adjusted for normal productivity).

weeks_per_year.label: Weeks لكل Year (oلكلating)
weeks_per_year.helper: Number of weeks لكل year the oلكلation runs (typically 52 for continuous, 50 for seasonal).

include_risk_adjustment.label: Include Risk Adjustment
include_risk_adjustment.helper: If enabled, applies a risk multiplier to overtime التكلفةs to account for burnout, turnover, and safety incidents.

risk_multiplier.label: Overtime Risk Multiplier
risk_multiplier.helper: Multiplier applied to overtime التكلفةs when risk adjustment is enabled (based on historical incident data).

cycle_length.label: Average cycle الطول (الأيام)
cycle_length.helper: Typical range for healthy adult women; المستخدم as baseline for ovulation estimation.

luteal_phase_length.label: Luteal phase الطول (الأيام)
luteal_phase_length.helper: Fixed post-ovulation phase; variation indicates potential luteal phase defect.

last_period_start.label: Start date of last menstrual لكلiod
last_period_start.placeholder: أدخل Start date of last menstrual لكلiod
last_period_start.helper: Reference point for calculating next ovulation and fertile window.

cycle_variability.label: Cycle الطول variability (standard deviation, الأيام)
cycle_variability.placeholder: أدخل Cycle الطول variability (standard deviation, الأيام)
cycle_variability.helper: المستخدم to compute confidence intervals and adjust fertile window العرض لكل SPC rules.

age_group.label: Age group
age_group.helper: Age affects cycle regularity and fertility; المستخدم for risk adjustment.

has_irregular_cycles.label: Irregular cycles (variation > 7 الأيام)
has_irregular_cycles.helper: Triggers alternative calculation method and alerts for medical consultation.

rack_height_mm.label: Rack الارتفاع (mm)
rack_height_mm.helper: Total vertical storage الارتفاع لكل rack bay, typically 3-18m in high-bay warehouses.

pallet_depth_mm.label: Pallet العمق (mm)
pallet_depth_mm.helper: Standard pallet العمق (e.g., EUR pallet 1200mm, US pallet 1200mm).

pallet_width_mm.label: Pallet العرض (mm)
pallet_width_mm.helper: Standard pallet العرض (e.g., EUR pallet 800mm, US pallet 1000mm).

pallet_height_mm.label: Pallet الارتفاع (mm)
pallet_height_mm.helper: الارتفاع of a single loaded pallet including pallet base.

beam_thickness_mm.label: Beam السماكة (mm)
beam_thickness_mm.helper: Vertical السماكة of horizontal load beams, affects usable الارتفاع لكل level.

clearance_vertical_mm.label: Vertical Clearance (mm)
clearance_vertical_mm.helper: Safety gap between top of pallet and next beam for handling equipment.

aisle_width_mm.label: Aisle العرض (mm)
aisle_width_mm.helper: العرض of forklift travel aisle between rack rows, لكل OSHA/ISO 3691.

rack_length_mm.label: Rack Bay الطول (mm)
rack_length_mm.helper: Horizontal الطول of a single rack bay (center-to-center of uprights).

num_bays.label: Number of Bays
num_bays.helper: Number of adjacent rack bays in a row.

num_levels.label: Number of Levels
num_levels.helper: Number of horizontal beam levels لكل bay.

pallet_weight_kg.label: Average Pallet الوزن (kg)
pallet_weight_kg.helper: Average الوزن of a loaded pallet, المستخدم for structural load calculations.

utilization_rate.label: التيار Utilization المعدل (%)
utilization_rate.helper: لكلcentage of rack positions التيارly occupied.

storage_strategy.label: Storage Stالمعدلgy
storage_strategy.helper: Warehouse inventory rotation stالمعدلgy affecting throughput and space utilization.

forklift_type.label: Forklift Type
forklift_type.helper: Forklift type deالمدةines required aisle العرض and lift الارتفاع capability.

seismic_zone.label: Seismic Zone
seismic_zone.helper: Seismic classification لكل ASCE 7 / IBC, affects rack bracing requirements.

include_beam_deflection_check.label: Include Beam Deflection Check
include_beam_deflection_check.helper: If enabled, validates beam deflection against L/180 standard (RMI/ANSI MH16.1).

avg_invoice_value.label: Average Invoice القيمة
avg_invoice_value.helper: Average moصافيary القيمة of a single invoice issued to customers.

annual_invoice_count.label: Annual Invoice Count
annual_invoice_count.helper: Total number of invoices issued لكل year.

current_terms_days.label: التيار Payment المدةs (الأيام)
current_terms_days.helper: التيار صافي payment المدة offered to customers (e.g., صافي 30).

proposed_terms_days.label: Proposed Payment المدةs (الأيام)
proposed_terms_days.helper: New صافي payment المدة to be evaluated (e.g., صافي 15).

early_payment_discount_pct.label: Early Payment Discount (%)
early_payment_discount_pct.helper: لكلcentage discount offered for early payment (e.g., 2/10 صافي 30).

discount_window_days.label: Discount Window (الأيام)
discount_window_days.helper: Number of الأيام within which the discount can be taken (e.g., 10 الأيام for 2/10).

cost_of_capital_pct.label: التكلفة of Capital (%)
cost_of_capital_pct.helper: Annual الوزنed average التكلفة of capital (WACC) for the company.

customer_acceptance_rate_pct.label: Customer Acceptance المعدل (%)
customer_acceptance_rate_pct.helper: Estimated لكلcentage of customers who will take the early payment discount.

industry_benchmark_dso.label: Industry Benchmark DSO (الأيام)
industry_benchmark_dso.helper: Average الأيام Sales Outstanding for the industry (WERC/CFO benchmarks).

payment_behavior.label: Customer Payment Behavior
payment_behavior.helper: Typical payment behavior من customer base, المستخدم to adjust effective DSO.

pipe_diameter.label: Pipe Inner القطر
pipe_diameter.helper: Nominal pipe القطر لكل ISO 6708. Affects cross-sectional المساحة and velocity.

pipe_length.label: Pipe الطول
pipe_length.helper: Total straight pipe الطول. المستخدم for friction loss calculation.

flow_rate.label: الحجمtric التدفق المعدل
flow_rate.helper: Design التدفق المعدل. Must be within pump capacity and pipe rating.

fluid_density.label: Fluid الكثافة
fluid_density.helper: الكثافة at oلكلating temلكلature. Water = 1000, oil ≈ 850.

fluid_viscosity.label: Dynamic Viscosity
fluid_viscosity.helper: Dynamic viscosity at oلكلating temلكلature. Water = 0.001, heavy oil up to 1.

roughness.label: Pipe Roughness
roughness.helper: Absolute roughness الارتفاع. Steel = 0.000045, concrete = 0.001. لكل ISO 9906.

elevation_change.label: Elevation Change
elevation_change.helper: Positive if outlet is higher than inlet. Affects gravitational head.

minor_loss_coefficient.label: Minor Loss Coefficient (K)
minor_loss_coefficient.helper: Sum of K factors for fittings, valves, bends. لكل Crane Technical Paلكل No. 410.

flow_regime.label: التدفق Regime Assumption
flow_regime.helper: اختر 'auto' for Reynolds-based deالمدةination. Override for sensitivity analysis.

include_measurement_uncertainty.label: Include Measurement Uncertainty
include_measurement_uncertainty.helper: When true, applies GUM (Guide to the Expression of Uncertainty in Measurement) propagation to final النتيجة.

annual_units.label: Annual Units Produced
annual_units.helper: Total number of units produced لكل year for the process line where the poka-yoke will be applied.

current_defect_rate.label: التيار Defect المعدل
current_defect_rate.helper: التيار defect المعدل in parts لكل million (ppm) for the process step الهدفed by the poka-yoke.

defect_cost_per_unit.label: Defect التكلفة لكل Unit
defect_cost_per_unit.helper: Average Total التكلفة incurred لكل defective unit, including scrap, rework, warranty, and lost customer goodwill.

poka_yoke_effectiveness.label: Poka-Yoke Effectiveness
poka_yoke_effectiveness.helper: Expected لكلcentage of defects that will be prevented by the poka-yoke device or process.

implementation_cost.label: Implementation التكلفة
implementation_cost.helper: Total one-الوقت التكلفة to design, purchase, install, and validate the poka-yoke solution.

annual_maintenance_cost.label: Annual Maintenance التكلفة
annual_maintenance_cost.helper: Recurring yearly التكلفة for calibration, spare parts, and upkeep من poka-yoke system.

labor_hours_saved_per_year.label: Labor الساعات Saved لكل Year
labor_hours_saved_per_year.placeholder: أدخل Labor الساعات Saved لكل Year
labor_hours_saved_per_year.helper: Estimated reduction in inspection and rework Labor الساعات لكل year due to the poka-yoke.

labor_rate.label: Labor المعدل
labor_rate.helper: Fully burdened hourly labor التكلفة for oلكلators and inspectors.

discount_rate.label: Discount المعدل
discount_rate.helper: Annual discount المعدل المستخدم for صافي present القيمة (NPV) calculation, reflecting the التكلفة of capital.

project_life_years.label: Project Life (السنوات)
project_life_years.helper: Expected العمر الإنتاجي من poka-yoke solution before major redesign or replacement.

lmp_date.label: Last Menstrual لكلiod (LMP) Date
lmp_date.helper: Date من first day من last menstrual لكلiod, المستخدم as the baseline for gestational age calculation.

cycle_length.label: Average Cycle الطول
cycle_length.helper: Average الطول من woman's menstrual cycle in الأيام. Deviations from 28 الأيام adjust the due date estimate.

luteal_phase_length.label: Luteal Phase الطول
luteal_phase_length.helper: الطول من luteal phase (post-ovulation). Typically 14 الأيام, but can vary. المستخدم to refine ovulation date.

ultrasound_ga_weeks.label: Ultrasound Gestational Age (weeks)
ultrasound_ga_weeks.helper: Gestational age measured by ultrasound (crown-rump الطول). If provided, overrides LMP-based estimate.

ultrasound_ga_days.label: Ultrasound Gestational Age (additional الأيام)
ultrasound_ga_days.helper: المتبقي الأيام beyond weeks for ultrasound gestational age.

cycle_variability.label: Cycle Variability (standard deviation)
cycle_variability.helper: Standard deviation of cycle الطول, المستخدم to compute confidence intervals and data confidence adjustment.

parity.label: Parity (number of previous births)
parity.helper: Number of previous live births. المستخدم in risk stratification (e.g., grand multiparity).

risk_factors.label: Risk Factors Present
risk_factors.helper: Presence of known risk factors that may affect due date reliability or require additional monitoring.

design_pressure.label: Design الضغط (P)
design_pressure.helper: Maximum allowable working الضغط لكل ASME UG-21

allowable_stress.label: Allowable Stress (S)
allowable_stress.helper: المادة allowable stress at design temلكلature لكل ASME II Part D

joint_efficiency.label: Joint Efficiency (E)
joint_efficiency.helper: Welded joint efficiency factor لكل ASME UW-12

corrosion_allowance.label: Corrosion Allowance (CA)
corrosion_allowance.helper: Additional السماكة for corrosion/erosion لكل UG-25

material_utilization.label: المادة Utilization Factor
material_utilization.helper: Lean manufacturing metric for المادة الهدر reduction

safety_factor_override.label: Override Safety Factor
safety_factor_override.helper: Enable to use custom safety factor instead of ASME default 3.5

custom_safety_factor.label: Custom Safety Factor
custom_safety_factor.helper: Only المستخدم if override is enabled; typical range لكل ISO 16528

current_price.label: التيار السعر لكل Unit
current_price.helper: The التيار Selling السعر من product in USD.

current_quantity.label: التيار الكمية Sold (units/month)
current_quantity.helper: Monthly sales الحجم at التيار السعر.

price_change_percent.label: Proposed السعر Change (%)
price_change_percent.helper: لكلcentage change in السعر (negative for decrease, positive for increase).

elasticity_coefficient.label: السعر Elasticity of Demand (PED)
elasticity_coefficient.helper: Estimated elasticity coefficient (typically negative). Absolute القيمة >1 indicates elastic demand.

variable_cost_per_unit.label: Variable التكلفة لكل Unit
variable_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct Variable التكلفة لكل unit (المادةs, labor, etc.).

fixed_cost_monthly.label: Fixed التكلفة لكل Month
fixed_cost_monthly.helper: Total Fixed التكلفةs allocated لكل month.

demand_shift_factor.label: Demand Shift Factor (seasonality/market)
demand_shift_factor.helper: Multiplier to adjust baseline demand (e.g., 1.2 for 20% market growth).

confidence_level.label: Data Confidence Level
confidence_level.helper: Quality of إدخال data: low = ±20% error, medium = ±10%, high = ±5%.

apply_six_sigma_adjustment.label: Apply Six Sigma Process Adjustment
apply_six_sigma_adjustment.placeholder: أدخل Apply Six Sigma Process Adjustment
apply_six_sigma_adjustment.helper: If true, applies a 1.5 sigma shift to account for process variation (DMAIC).

material_weight.label: المادة الوزن
material_weight.helper: Total الوزن of raw المادةs المستخدم in the product, including all components and packaging.

material_type.label: المادة Type
material_type.helper: Primary المادة category to deالمدةine emission factors لكل ISO 14067.

energy_consumption.label: الطاقة الاستهلاك in Manufacturing
energy_consumption.helper: Total electrical الطاقة المستخدمة during production processes (machining, assembly, etc.).

transport_distance.label: النقل المسافة
transport_distance.helper: Average المسافة from raw المادة source to manufacturing facility, and from facility to customer.

transport_mode.label: النقل Mode
transport_mode.helper: Mode of النقل affecting emission factors لكل ton-km (WERC guidelines).

recycled_content.label: Recycled Content
recycled_content.helper: لكلcentage of recycled المادة in the product, reducing virgin المادة emissions.

use_phase_efficiency.label: Use Phase Efficiency
use_phase_efficiency.helper: Annual الطاقة الاستهلاك من product during its use phase (e.g., for appliances).

lifespan.label: Product Lifespan
lifespan.helper: Expected العمر الإنتاجي من product, المستخدم to allocate use-phase emissions.

end_of_life_recycling_rate.label: End-of-Life Recycling المعدل
end_of_life_recycling_rate.helper: لكلcentage of product mass that is recycled at end of life, reducing disposal emissions.

energy_source.label: الطاقة Source
energy_source.helper: Type of الطاقة المستخدمة in manufacturing, affecting emission factor لكل kWh.

avg_volume_per_sku.label: Average الحجم لكل SKU
avg_volume_per_sku.helper: Average annual production الكمية لكل SKU.

num_components.label: Number of Unique Components
num_components.helper: Total distinct raw المادةs or parts المستخدم across all SKUs.

avg_bom_levels.label: Average BOM Levels
avg_bom_levels.helper: Average العمق من bill of المادةs (number of subassembly tiers).

setup_time_minutes.label: Average الإعداد الوقت لكل Changeover
setup_time_minutes.placeholder: أدخل Average الإعداد الوقت لكل Changeover
setup_time_minutes.helper: Average الوقت to change a production line from one SKU to another.

overhead_rate.label: Overhead المعدل
overhead_rate.helper: Manufacturing overhead as لكلcentage of direct labor and المادة.

complexity_type.label: Complexity Type
complexity_type.helper: Category of complexity: 'product' (high SKU count), 'process' (high الإعداد الوقت), 'mixed' (both).

use_lean_metrics.label: Use Lean Metrics (SMED, OEE)
use_lean_metrics.helper: If true, applies SMED-based الإعداد reduction and OEE factors.

labor_hours.label: Direct Labor الساعات
labor_hours.helper: Total planned direct Labor الساعات for the project, based on work breakdown structure (WBS).

labor_rate.label: Average Labor المعدل
labor_rate.helper: الوزنed average hourly المعدل including wages, benefits, and overhead لكل ISO 15686-5.

material_cost.label: المادة التكلفة
material_cost.helper: Total التكلفة of raw المادةs and purchased components, including procurement and logistics.

equipment_cost.label: Equipment & Tooling التكلفة
equipment_cost.helper: التكلفة of specialized machinery, tooling, and equipment depreciation or إيجارal.

overhead_percentage.label: Overhead لكلcentage
overhead_percentage.helper: Indirect التكلفة المعدل (facilities, utilities, management) as a لكلcentage of direct التكلفةs, لكل standard التكلفة accounting.

complexity_factor.label: Project Complexity Factor
complexity_factor.helper: Adjusts التكلفة based on project complexity (low/medium/high) لكل PMI and Lean principles.

quality_level.label: Quality Level (Sigma)
quality_level.helper: الهدف quality level based on Six Sigma; higher sigma reduces rework and hidden التكلفةs.

use_lean_standardization.label: Apply Lean Standardization
use_lean_standardization.helper: If true, applies lean الهدر reduction factor (e.g., 5% reduction in labor and المادة).

plannedduration.label: Planned المدة (months)
plannedduration.helper: Original planned project المدة in months as لكل baseline schedule.

actualduration.label: Actual المدة to Date (months)
actualduration.helper: Elapsed الوقت since project start, المستخدم to compute schedule الأداء.

plannedcost.label: Planned Total التكلفة (USD)
plannedcost.helper: Total budgeted التكلفة for the project at completion.

actualcost.label: Actual التكلفة Incurred (USD)
actualcost.helper: Total التكلفةs actually incurred up to the التيار reporting لكلiod.

percentcomplete.label: لكلcent Complete (%)
percentcomplete.helper: Estimated لكلcentage of work completed based on earned القيمة or physical progress.

scopechangefrequency.label: Scope Change Frequency
scopechangefrequency.helper: Frequency of scope changes affecting project baseline. Low = 0-1 changes, Modeالمعدل = 2-4, High = 5+.

teamexperience.label: Team Exلكلience Level
teamexperience.helper: Average exلكلience level من core project team.

qualitydefectrate.label: Quality Defect المعدل (defects لكل unit)
qualitydefectrate.placeholder: أدخل Quality Defect المعدل (defects لكل unit)
qualitydefectrate.helper: Number of defects لكل unit of output (e.g., لكل 1000 lines of code, لكل 100 parts).

supplierreliability.label: Supplier Reliability Index
supplierreliability.helper: Probability that critical suppliers deliver on الوقت and within spec (0 = unreliable, 1 = fully reliable).

riskexposure.label: Risk Exposure (USD)
riskexposure.helper: Moصافيary القيمة of identified risks (probability * impact) not yet mitigated.

pressure_psi.label: الضغط (PSI)
pressure_psi.helper: إدخال الضغط in pounds لكل square inch (PSI). Typical range: 0–100,000 psi for industrial applications.

temperature_celsius.label: Temلكلature (°C)
temperature_celsius.helper: Process temلكلature in Celsius. المستخدم for thermal correction لكل ISO 80000-1.

altitude_meters.label: Altitude (m)
