shift_type.helper: Shift type affects labor premiums and الطاقة tariffs.

overtime_applied.label: Overtime Applied
overtime_applied.helper: Indicates if overtime المعدلs apply to any portion من shift.

direct_labor_hourly_rate.label: Direct Labor Hourly المعدل
direct_labor_hourly_rate.helper: Average hourly wage paid to direct production workers, including base pay and shift diffeإيجارials.

num_direct_labor_employees.label: Number of Direct Labor الموظفون
num_direct_labor_employees.placeholder: أدخل Number of Direct Labor الموظفون
num_direct_labor_employees.helper: Total headcount of workers directly involved in production.

annual_operating_hours_per_employee.label: Annual Oلكلating الساعات لكل Employee
annual_operating_hours_per_employee.placeholder: أدخل Annual Oلكلating الساعات لكل Employee
annual_operating_hours_per_employee.helper: Standard annual الساعات لكل employee (e.g., 52 weeks * 40 الساعات). Adjust for overtime or part-الوقت.

total_annual_overhead_costs.label: Total Annual Overhead التكلفةs
total_annual_overhead_costs.helper: All indirect التكلفةs: إيجار, utilities, management salaries, insurance, taxes, maintenance, IT, etc.

total_annual_machine_costs.label: Total Annual Machine التكلفةs
total_annual_machine_costs.helper: Depreciation, lease payments, repairs, tooling, and الطاقة التكلفةs for all production equipment.

average_shop_efficiency_percent.label: Average Shop Efficiency (%)
average_shop_efficiency_percent.helper: الفعالية الإجمالية للمعدات (OEE) or labor efficiency, accounting for downtime, الإعداد, and speed loss.

quality_yield_percent.label: Quality Yield (%)
quality_yield_percent.helper: First-pass yield or overall yield; rework and scrap increase effective hourly التكلفة.

shift_premium_factor.label: Shift Premium Factor
shift_premium_factor.helper: 1.0 for single shift, 1.1 for two-shift, 1.2 for three-shift oلكلations (accounts for shift diffeإيجارials).

include_benefits.label: Include Benefits & Payroll Taxes
include_benefits.helper: If true, adds 30% burden to direct Labor المعدل for benefits, FICA, workers' comp, etc.

overhead_allocation_method.label: Overhead Allocation Method
overhead_allocation_method.helper: Basis for distributing overhead to hourly المعدل. Direct Labor الساعات is most common in job shops.

material_cost.label: المادة التكلفة لكل Unit
material_cost.helper: Direct التكلفة of raw المادةs لكل signage unit, including substالمعدل, ink, and laminates.

labor_hours.label: Labor الساعات لكل Unit
labor_hours.helper: Standard direct Labor الساعات required to produce one signage unit, based on الوقت studies.

labor_rate.label: Labor المعدل لكل Hour
labor_rate.helper: Fully burdened hourly wage including benefits, taxes, and overhead allocation.

overhead_rate.label: Overhead المعدل
overhead_rate.helper: لكلcentage applied to direct التكلفةs to cover facility, equipment, and administrative overhead.

complexity_factor.label: Complexity Factor
complexity_factor.helper: Adjusts labor and الهدر factors based on design complexity لكل ISO 9001 process variation guidelines.

quality_level.label: Quality Level
quality_level.helper: Defines inspection rigor and rework allowance based on Six Sigma quality levels.

quantity.label: Order الكمية
quantity.helper: Total number of signage units in the order, affecting الحجم discounts and الإعداد amortization.

waste_factor.label: الهدر Factor
waste_factor.helper: Expected المادة الهدر لكلcentage due to الإعداد, trimming, and defects, aligned with Lean manufacturing الهدفs.

risk_margin.label: Risk Margin
risk_margin.helper: Additional margin to cover market volatility, المادة السعر fluctuations, and unforeseen delays.

shipping_cost_per_unit.label: Shipping التكلفة لكل Unit
shipping_cost_per_unit.helper: Average freight التكلفة لكل unit based on المسافة, الوزن, and packaging.

defect_rate.label: Defect المعدل (DPMO)
defect_rate.helper: التيار defects لكل million opportunities for the process under evaluation.

process_sigma.label: التيار Process Sigma Level
process_sigma.helper: التيار sigma level من process, typically derived from DPMO using standard conversion tables.

annual_volume.label: Annual Unit الحجم
annual_volume.helper: Total number of units produced or transactions processed لكل year.

cost_per_defect.label: التكلفة لكل Defect
cost_per_defect.helper: Average التكلفة incurred لكل defect, including rework, scrap, warranty, and customer impact.

implementation_cost.label: Estimated Implementation التكلفة
implementation_cost.helper: Total التكلفة to implement the Six Sigma improvement project (training, equipment, downtime, etc.).

project_risk.label: Project Risk Level
project_risk.helper: Qualitative assessment of risk associated with the project (technical complexity, resource التوفر, stakeholder شراء-in).

strategic_alignment.label: Stالمعدلgic Alignment Score
strategic_alignment.helper: How well the project aligns with organizational stالمعدلgic goals (1 = low, 10 = high).

customer_impact.label: Customer Impact Score
customer_impact.helper: Degree of positive impact on customer satisfaction (1 = minimal, 10 = transformative).

data_confidence.label: Data Confidence Level
data_confidence.helper: Confidence in the accuracy and reliability من إدخال data (0% = guess, 100% = verified).

wake_time.label: Desired wake-up الوقت (24h)
wake_time.helper: الهدف end of sleep cycle; المستخدم to back-احسب optimal bedtimes.

sleep_debt_hours.label: Accumulated sleep debt (الساعات)
sleep_debt_hours.helper: Cumulative deficit from prior nights; drives recovery need لكل sleep science.

cycle_length_minutes.label: Average sleep cycle الطول
cycle_length_minutes.helper: Typical NREM/REM cycle المدة; 90 min is standard, adjustable لكل individual.

fall_asleep_minutes.label: Estimated الوقت to fall asleep
fall_asleep_minutes.placeholder: أدخل Estimated الوقت to fall asleep
fall_asleep_minutes.helper: Sleep onset latency; affects actual sleep start الوقت.

recovery_efficiency.label: Recovery efficiency factor
recovery_efficiency.helper: Adjusts sleep debt repayment المعدل (1.0 = normal, <1.0 = impaired recovery, >1.0 = enhanced).

shift_worker.label: Shift worker?
shift_worker.helper: Flag to apply circadian disruption penalty لكل ISO 10075-2.

current_changeover_time.label: التيار Changeover الوقت (minutes)
current_changeover_time.helper: Total الوقت from last good piece of previous run to first good piece of next run. Measured لكل SMED standard.

internal_operations_percentage.label: Internal Oلكلations (% of total الوقت)
internal_operations_percentage.placeholder: أدخل Internal Oلكلations (% of total الوقت)
internal_operations_percentage.helper: لكلcentage of changeover الوقت where machine is stopped. الهدف is to convert internal to external.

setup_team_size.label: الإعداد Team Size (oلكلators)
setup_team_size.helper: Number of oلكلators directly involved in the changeover process.

parallel_work_possible.label: Parallel Work Possible
parallel_work_possible.helper: Indicates if tasks can be لكلformed simultaneously by multiple oلكلators (SMED principle).

standardization_level.label: Standardization Level
standardization_level.helper: Degree of standardized work instructions, tooling, and die design. High = minimal adjustments.

waste_motion_score.label: الهدر Motion Score (1-10)
waste_motion_score.helper: Subjective assessment of unnecessary movement, searching, and walking during changeover. 1 = optimal, 10 = extreme الهدر.

subgroup_size.label: Subgroup Size (n)
subgroup_size.helper: Number of samples لكل subgroup for X-bar and R charts. Typical القيمةs: 3-10.

num_subgroups.label: Number of Subgroups (k)
num_subgroups.helper: Total subgroups المستخدم to estimate process variation. Minimum 10 for reliable limits.

overall_mean.label: Overall Mean (X-double-bar)
overall_mean.helper: Average of subgroup means. Central line for X-bar chart.

average_range.label: Average Range (R-bar)
average_range.helper: Mean of subgroup ranges. المستخدم to estimate process sigma.

usl.label: Upلكل Specification Limit (USL)
usl.helper: Maximum acceptable القيمة لكل customer or design requirement.

lsl.label: Lower Specification Limit (LSL)
lsl.helper: Minimum acceptable القيمة لكل customer or design requirement.

chart_type.label: Chart Type
chart_type.helper: اختر control chart type. Xbar-R for small subgroups, Xbar-s for larger, I-MR for individual measurements.

use_estimated_sigma.label: Use Estimated Sigma from R-bar
use_estimated_sigma.placeholder: أدخل Use Estimated Sigma from R-bar
use_estimated_sigma.helper: If true, sigma is estimated from R-bar/d2. If false, use pooled standard deviation.

process_cycle_time_min.label: Process Cycle الوقت (minutes)
process_cycle_time_min.helper: Average الوقت to complete one production cycle. المستخدم to estimate units produced لكل shift.

units_per_cycle.label: Units لكل Cycle
units_per_cycle.helper: Number of units produced in one complete cycle.

defect_rate_out_of_control.label: Defect المعدل When Out of Control
defect_rate_out_of_control.placeholder: أدخل Defect المعدل When Out of Control
defect_rate_out_of_control.helper: Expected defect لكلcentage when the process is out of control (based on historical SPC data).

defect_rate_in_control.label: Defect المعدل When In Control
defect_rate_in_control.placeholder: أدخل Defect المعدل When In Control
defect_rate_in_control.helper: Baseline defect لكلcentage when the process is stable and in control.

cost_per_defect.label: التكلفة لكل Defect
cost_per_defect.helper: Average التكلفة incurred لكل defective unit (scrap, rework, warranty, etc.).

detection_delay_hours.label: Detection Delay (الساعات)
detection_delay_hours.helper: الوقت from when the process goes out of control until the signal is detected (e.g., sampling interval, lab delay).

response_delay_hours.label: Response Delay (الساعات)
response_delay_hours.helper: الوقت from detection until corrective action is implemented (e.g., root cause analysis, adjustment).

shift_hours.label: Shift الساعات لكل Day
shift_hours.helper: Number of production الساعات لكل shift. يُستخدم لحساب daily production الحجم.

shifts_per_day.label: Shifts لكل Day
shifts_per_day.helper: Number of shifts oلكلating لكل day.

operating_days_per_year.label: Oلكلating الأيام لكل Year
operating_days_per_year.helper: Number of الأيام the plant opeالمعدلs annually.

signal_frequency_per_year.label: Out-of-Control Signal Frequency (لكل year)
signal_frequency_per_year.helper: Expected number of out-of-control signals لكل year based on historical SPC data.

cost_of_correction_per_event.label: التكلفة of Correction لكل Event
cost_of_correction_per_event.placeholder: أدخل التكلفة of Correction لكل Event
cost_of_correction_per_event.helper: Average التكلفة to investigate and correct an out-of-control event (labor, المادةs, downtime).

include_hidden_losses.label: Include Hidden Losses (e.g., customer dissatisfaction, lost sales)
include_hidden_losses.placeholder: أدخل Include Hidden Losses (e.g., customer dissatisfaction, lost sales)
include_hidden_losses.helper: Toggle to include estimated hidden التكلفةs such as brand damage and lost future sales.

hidden_loss_multiplier.label: Hidden Loss Multiplier
hidden_loss_multiplier.helper: Multiplier applied to direct defect التكلفةs to estimate hidden losses (based on industry benchmarks).

area_sqft.label: المساحة in أقدام مربعة
area_sqft.helper: Total المساحة to be converted from imلكلial to metric units. Typical range for industrial floors, warehouses, or production cells.

measurement_accuracy.label: Measurement Accuracy Class
measurement_accuracy.helper: Defines the tolerance level من original measurement لكل ISO 2768-1. Affects confidence interval and hidden loss drivers.

rounding_precision.label: Rounding Precision
rounding_precision.helper: Number of decimal places for the final النتيجة. Industrial standards often require 2-4 decimals for engineering documentation.

include_tolerance.label: Include Tolerance Band
include_tolerance.helper: If enabled, the output will include upلكل and lower tolerance limits based on measurement accuracy class.

orifice_diameter.label: Orifice القطر
orifice_diameter.helper: القطر من trap orifice; typical failed traps have orifices from 1 mm to 20 mm.

steam_pressure.label: Steam الضغط (gauge)
steam_pressure.helper: Gauge الضغط of steam upstream من trap. Common industrial range 3–15 bar_g.

operating_hours_per_year.label: Oلكلating الساعات لكل Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Annual oلكلating الساعات من steam system. Typical continuous process: 8000 h/yr.

steam_cost.label: Steam التكلفة
steam_cost.helper: التكلفة to geneالمعدل one metric tonne of steam, including الوقود, water treatment, and maintenance.

trap_type.label: Trap Type
trap_type.helper: Type of steam trap influences discharge coefficient and failure mode.

failure_mode.label: Failure Mode
failure_mode.helper: Failure mode deالمدةines effective orifice المساحة and discharge coefficient.

condensate_recovery.label: Condensate Recovery
condensate_recovery.helper: Whether condensate is recovered; affects صافي الطاقة loss calculation.

actual_labor_cost.label: Actual Labor التكلفة
actual_labor_cost.helper: Total labor التكلفة incurred by subcontractor.

actual_material_cost.label: Actual المادة التكلفة
actual_material_cost.helper: Total المادة التكلفة incurred by subcontractor.

overhead_percentage.label: Overhead لكلcentage
overhead_percentage.helper: Overhead as لكلcentage of direct التكلفةs (ISO 9001 التكلفة accounting).

quality_rework_cost.label: Quality Rework التكلفة
quality_rework_cost.helper: التكلفة of rework due to non-conformance (Six Sigma DMAIC).

schedule_delay_penalty.label: Schedule Delay Penalty
schedule_delay_penalty.helper: Penalties incurred due to late delivery (Lean just-in-الوقت).

waste_factor.label: الهدر Factor (Lean Muda)
waste_factor.helper: Estimated الهدر as لكلcentage of total direct التكلفةs (Lean manufacturing).

labor_efficiency_index.label: Labor Efficiency Index (LEI)
labor_efficiency_index.helper: Ratio of standard Labor الساعات to actual Labor الساعات (WERC DC metrics).

material_price_variance.label: المادة السعر Variance
material_price_variance.helper: الفرق between standard and actual المادة السعرs.

scope_change_cost.label: Scope Change التكلفة
scope_change_cost.helper: Additional التكلفةs from unapproved scope changes.

inventory_holding_cost.label: Inventory Holding التكلفة
inventory_holding_cost.helper: التكلفة of carrying excess inventory (WERC warehousing).

currency_exchange_loss.label: Currency Exchange Loss
currency_exchange_loss.helper: Loss due to unfavorable exchange المعدل fluctuations.

contract_type.label: Contract Type
contract_type.helper: Type of subcontractor contract influences margin risk.

use_lean_accounting.label: Use Lean Accounting Adjustments
use_lean_accounting.helper: Apply Lean accounting principles to القيمة stream التكلفةing.

contract_value.label: Contract القيمة (in base currency)
contract_value.helper: Total القيمة من supplier contract denominated in the base currency (e.g., USD).

foreign_exposure_pct.label: Foreign Currency Exposure (%)
foreign_exposure_pct.helper: لكلcentage of contract القيمة exposed to foreign currency fluctuations.

volatility_annual.label: Annual FX Volatility
volatility_annual.helper: Expected annualized standard deviation من foreign exchange المعدل, based on historical data or market consensus.

hedge_ratio.label: Hedge Ratio (%)
hedge_ratio.helper: لكلcentage من foreign exposure that is hedged via forward contracts, options, or other instruments.

time_horizon_months.label: الوقت Horizon (months)
time_horizon_months.helper: المدة over which the currency risk is assessed, typically matching the contract payment schedule.

confidence_level.label: Confidence Level
confidence_level.helper: Statistical confidence level for القيمة-at-Risk (VaR) calculation. Higher levels indicate more conservative risk estimates.

supplier_credit_rating.label: Supplier Credit Rating (S&P equivalent)
supplier_credit_rating.helper: Credit rating من supplier, المستخدم to adjust default probability and overall risk premium.

use_iso_31000.label: Apply ISO 31000 Risk Management Framework
use_iso_31000.placeholder: أدخل Apply ISO 31000 Risk Management Framework
use_iso_31000.helper: If enabled, the calculation incorpoالمعدلs ISO 31000 principles for risk identification, analysis, and evaluation.

purchase_price.label: Purchase السعر لكل Unit
purchase_price.helper: Negotiated Unit السعر from supplier contract.

defect_rate.label: Defect المعدل (ppm)
defect_rate.helper: Parts لكل million defective, Six Sigma metric.

inspection_cost_per_unit.label: Inspection التكلفة لكل Unit
inspection_cost_per_unit.helper: التكلفة of incoming quality inspection لكل unit.

freight_cost_per_unit.label: Freight التكلفة لكل Unit
freight_cost_per_unit.helper: Average shipping التكلفة لكل unit from supplier.

lead_time_days.label: Lead الوقت (الأيام)
lead_time_days.helper: Supplier lead الوقت from order to delivery.

carrying_cost_rate.label: Inventory Carrying التكلفة المعدل
carrying_cost_rate.helper: Annual inventory holding التكلفة as لكلcentage of unit التكلفة (Lean metric).

warranty_claim_rate.label: Warranty Claim المعدل
warranty_claim_rate.helper: لكلcentage of units that النتيجة in warranty claims.

average_claim_cost.label: Average Warranty Claim التكلفة
average_claim_cost.helper: Average التكلفة لكل warranty claim (labor, parts, logistics).

supplier_quality_level.label: Supplier Quality Level
supplier_quality_level.helper: Qualitative assessment of supplier quality management system (ISO 9001).

use_eco_cost.label: Include Environmental التكلفة
use_eco_cost.helper: Toggle to include estimated carbon and الهدر disposal التكلفةs (ISO 14040).

co2_per_unit.label: CO2 Emissions لكل Unit
co2_per_unit.helper: Estimated carbon footprint لكل unit from supplier oلكلations.

carbon_tax_rate.label: Carbon Tax المعدل
carbon_tax_rate.helper: Applicable carbon tax or internal سعر الكربون.

supplier_reliability_score.label: Supplier Reliability Score (0-100)
supplier_reliability_score.helper: Historical on-الوقت delivery and quality الأداء of key suppliers. Higher score indicates better reliability.

inventory_buffer_days.label: Inventory Buffer (الأيام of Cover)
inventory_buffer_days.helper: Average الأيام of inventory held to absorb demand or supply shocks. Based on lean inventory principles.

lead_time_variability.label: Lead الوقت Variability (Coefficient of Variation)
lead_time_variability.placeholder: أدخل Lead الوقت Variability (Coefficient of Variation)
lead_time_variability.helper: Standard deviation of lead الوقت divided by mean lead الوقت. Higher القيمةs indicate unpredictable supply.

single_source_dependency.label: Single Source Dependency (0-100%)
single_source_dependency.helper: لكلcentage of critical components sourced from a single supplier. High dependency increases risk.

geopolitical_risk_index.label: Geopolitical Risk Index (0-100)
geopolitical_risk_index.helper: Composite index of political instability, trade restrictions, and regional conflicts affecting supply chain.

demand_volatility.label: Demand Volatility (Coefficient of Variation)
demand_volatility.helper: Variability in customer demand over الوقت. High volatility strains capacity and inventory.

transportation_disruption_probability.label: النقلation Disruption Probability (0-1)
transportation_disruption_probability.helper: Estimated likelihood of a major النقلation disruption (port closure, strike, etc.) in the next quarter.

quality_defect_rate.label: Quality Defect المعدل (ppm)
quality_defect_rate.helper: Parts لكل million defective from incoming inspection. Six Sigma الهدف is < 3.4 ppm.

cyber_risk_score.label: Cyber Risk Score (0-100)
cyber_risk_score.helper: Assessment of cybersecurity vulnerabilities in supply chain IT systems. Higher score indicates higher risk.

use_advanced_hedging.label: Enable Advanced Hedging Stالمعدلgies
use_advanced_hedging.helper: If true, applies financial and oلكلational hedging models to mitigate currency and commodity risks.

target_value.label: الهدف القيمة (T)
target_value.helper: The ideal nominal specification for the product characteristic (e.g., الطول, الوزن, voltage).

lower_spec_limit.label: Lower Specification Limit (LSL)
lower_spec_limit.helper: Minimum acceptable القيمة لكل engineering or customer requirement.

upper_spec_limit.label: Upلكل Specification Limit (USL)
upper_spec_limit.helper: Maximum acceptable القيمة لكل engineering or customer requirement.

cost_at_limit.label: التكلفة at Specification Limit (A₀)
cost_at_limit.helper: Estimated financial loss (rework, scrap, warranty) when a unit is exactly at the specification limit.

deviation_at_limit.label: Deviation at Limit (Δ)
deviation_at_limit.helper: المسافة from الهدف to the nearest specification limit (Δ = min(T-LSL, USL-T)).

production_volume.label: Production الحجم (N)
production_volume.helper: Total number of units produced in the لكلiod.

inspection_rate.label: Inspection المعدل (%)
inspection_rate.helper: لكلcentage of units inspected. المستخدم to adjust hidden loss estimates.

loss_function_type.label: Loss Function Type
loss_function_type.helper: Type of quality characteristic: nominal-is-best (الهدف), smaller-is-better (e.g., impurities), larger-is-better (e.g., strength).

include_hidden_factory.label: Include Hidden Factory Losses
include_hidden_factory.helper: If true, adds estimated losses from rework, inspection, and scrap that are not captured by the basic loss function.

available_work_time_seconds.label: Available Work الوقت لكل Shift (seconds)
available_work_time_seconds.placeholder: أدخل Available Work الوقت لكل Shift (seconds)
available_work_time_seconds.helper: Total planned production الوقت لكل shift excluding breaks and planned downtime.

customer_demand_per_shift.label: Customer Demand لكل Shift (units)
customer_demand_per_shift.helper: Number of units required by the customer لكل shift.

cycle_time_seconds.label: Actual Cycle الوقت (seconds)
cycle_time_seconds.helper: Measured average الوقت to complete one unit of product at the bottleneck oلكلation.

changeover_time_minutes.label: Average Changeover الوقت (minutes)
changeover_time_minutes.helper: الوقت required to switch from one product variant to another, including الإعداد and adjustments.

batch_size.label: Average Batch Size (units)
batch_size.helper: Number of units produced consecutively before a changeover.

labor_cost_per_hour.label: Direct Labor التكلفة لكل Hour ($)
labor_cost_per_hour.placeholder: أدخل Direct Labor التكلفة لكل Hour ($)
labor_cost_per_hour.helper: Fully loaded hourly wage including benefits for direct production oلكلators.

overhead_rate_percent.label: Overhead المعدل (%)
overhead_rate_percent.helper: لكلcentage of direct labor التكلفة allocated to manufacturing overhead (e.g., suلكلvision, utilities, maintenance).

demand_variability_coefficient.label: Demand Variability Coefficient (CV)
demand_variability_coefficient.helper: Coefficient of variation of daily customer demand; المستخدم to quantify demand uncertainty.

flexibility_strategy.label: Flexibility Stالمعدلgy
flexibility_strategy.helper: Production stالمعدلgy to handle demand variability: mixed-model (quick changeovers), dedicated lines (fixed product lines), chase demand (vary capacity), or level schedule (stable production with inventory).

age.label: Age
age.helper: Age affects basal metabolic المعدل; المستخدم in Mifflin-St Jeor and Harris-Benedict equations.

gender.label: Gender
gender.helper: Gender-specific coefficients for BMR estimation لكل ISO 8996 and clinical standards.

weight.label: Body الوزن
weight.helper: Primary driver of الطاقة expenditure; المستخدم in all BMR formulas.

height.label: الارتفاع
height.helper: الارتفاع influences lean body mass and BMR; المستخدم in Mifflin-St Jeor and Harris-Benedict.

activitylevel.label: Activity Level
activitylevel.helper: Physical activity level (PAL) multiplier لكل WHO/FAO and ISO 8996 metabolic المعدل classification.

bodyfatpercent.label: Body Fat لكلcentage
bodyfatpercent.helper: Optional إدخال for Katch-McArdle formula; improves accuracy for lean mass estimation.

isathlete.label: Athlete Mode
isathlete.helper: Activates adjusted activity multipliers for high-frequency training (6+ sessions/week).

production_volume_meters.label: Monthly Production الحجم (meters)
production_volume_meters.helper: Total fabric produced لكل month, المستخدم as baseline for الهدر ratio calculations.

fabric_type.label: Fabric Type
fabric_type.helper: Diffeإيجار fabric types have distinct الهدر generation profiles and recycling potential.

waste_percentage.label: التيار الهدر لكلcentage (%)
waste_percentage.helper: Measured الهدر as a لكلcentage of total production, including cutting, sewing, and finishing losses.

rework_rate.label: Rework المعدل (%)
rework_rate.helper: لكلcentage of products requiring rework, a key Lean Six Sigma metric for process efficiency.

defect_density.label: Defect الكثافة (defects لكل 1000 meters)
defect_density.helper: Number of defects لكل 1000 meters of fabric, critical for quality control.

energy_cost_per_kwh.label: الطاقة التكلفة ($/kWh)
energy_cost_per_kwh.helper: Average electricity التكلفة, يُستخدم لحساب الطاقة الهدر from inefficient processes.

labor_cost_per_hour.label: Labor التكلفة ($/hour)
labor_cost_per_hour.helper: Average hourly wage, المستخدم to quantify labor الهدر from rework and idle الوقت.

recycling_capability.label: Recycling Capability
recycling_capability.helper: التيار ability to recycle الهدر fabric, affecting الهدر disposal التكلفة and environmental impact.

iso_14001_certified.label: ISO 14001 Certified
iso_14001_certified.helper: Indicates if the facility has ISO 14001 environmental management certification, influencing الهدر reduction practices.

material_type.label: المادة Type
material_type.helper: اختر المادة category to apply appropriate thermal conductivity ranges and correction factors لكل ISO 8301.

temperature_k.label: Oلكلating Temلكلature
temperature_k.helper: Mean temلكلature من المادة during oلكلation. Affects phonon scattering and electron النقل in solids.

thickness_m.label: السماكة
thickness_m.helper: المادة السماكة in the direction of heat التدفق. المستخدم for thermal resistance calculation.

cross_section_area_m2.label: Cross-Sectional المساحة
cross_section_area_m2.helper: المساحة لكلpendicular to heat التدفق. Critical for heat flux الكثافة calculations.

heat_flow_w.label: Heat التدفق المعدل
heat_flow_w.helper: Steady-state heat transfer المعدل through the المادة. Measured via calorimeter or heat flux sensor.

temperature_delta_k.label: Temلكلature الفرق
temperature_delta_k.helper: Temلكلature gradient across the المادة السماكة. Drives conductive heat transfer.

moisture_content_pct.label: Moisture Content
moisture_content_pct.helper: لكلcentage of moisture by الحجم. Increases effective thermal conductivity in porous المادةs (WERC guidelines).

aging_factor.label: Aging Factor
aging_factor.helper: Multiplier accounting for المادة degradation over الوقت. Based on Six Sigma aging studies.

measurement_confidence.label: Measurement Confidence
measurement_confidence.helper: Confidence level in إدخال data quality. Affects data confidence adjustment in outputs.

observed_time.label: Observed الوقت (seconds)
observed_time.helper: Average cycle الوقت recorded during direct observation, excluding any abnormal delays.

performance_rating.label: الأداء Rating (%)
performance_rating.helper: Oلكلator pace relative to normal (100% = standard pace). Based on Westinghouse or similar rating system.

allowance_percentage.label: Allowance لكلcentage (%)
allowance_percentage.helper: Total allowance for fatigue, لكلsonal needs, and unavoidable delays (ISO 9001 / ILO guidelines).

frequency_per_cycle.label: Frequency لكل Cycle
frequency_per_cycle.helper: How many times the observed element occurs لكل complete work cycle (e.g., 2 inspections لكل assembly).

work_measurement_method.label: Work Measurement Method
work_measurement_method.helper: The technique المستخدم to obtain the observed الوقت; affects confidence and adjustment factors.

include_learning_curve.label: Include Learning Curve Adjustment
include_learning_curve.helper: If true, applies a learning curve factor (80% slope) for new or changed processes.

tool_cost.label: Tool التكلفة لكل Unit
tool_cost.helper: Purchase السعر of a single cutting tool or insert.

tool_life_parts.label: Tool Life (Parts لكل Tool)
tool_life_parts.helper: Average number of parts produced before tool replacement مطلوب.

replacement_time_min.label: Replacement الوقت
replacement_time_min.helper: الوقت required to replace or index the tool.

machine_hourly_rate.label: Machine Hourly المعدل
machine_hourly_rate.helper: Fully burdened التكلفة لكل hour of machine oلكلation (including labor, overhead, depreciation).

rework_rate.label: Rework المعدل due to Wear
rework_rate.placeholder: أدخل Rework المعدل due to Wear
rework_rate.helper: لكلcentage of parts requiring rework due to tool wear, based on Six Sigma defect tracking.

rework_cost_per_part.label: Rework التكلفة لكل Part
rework_cost_per_part.helper: Average التكلفة to rework a defective part (المادة, labor, overhead).

scrap_rate.label: Scrap المعدل due to Wear
scrap_rate.placeholder: أدخل Scrap المعدل due to Wear
scrap_rate.helper: لكلcentage of parts scrapped due to tool wear beyond tolerance.

scrap_material_cost.label: Scrap المادة التكلفة لكل Part
scrap_material_cost.placeholder: أدخل Scrap المادة التكلفة لكل Part
scrap_material_cost.helper: التكلفة of raw المادة lost لكل scrapped part.

tool_type.label: Tool Type
tool_type.helper: المادة من cutting tool, affects wear المعدل and التكلفة multipliers.

coolant_used.label: Coolant المستخدم
coolant_used.helper: Indicates if coolant is المستخدم; affects tool life and wear المعدل.

purchase_price.label: Purchase السعر
purchase_price.helper: Initial capital expenditure for acquiring the asset (ISO 15663 lifecycle التكلفةing).

annual_energy_cost.label: Annual الطاقة التكلفة
annual_energy_cost.helper: Yearly electricity, الوقود, or other الطاقة الاستهلاك التكلفةs (Lean الطاقة efficiency).

annual_maintenance_cost.label: Annual Maintenance التكلفة
annual_maintenance_cost.helper: Planned and unplanned maintenance expenses (Six Sigma reliability).

annual_labor_cost.label: Annual Labor التكلفة
annual_labor_cost.helper: Oلكلator and technician wages directly attributable to the asset (WERC DC metrics).

annual_consumables_cost.label: Annual مستهلكات التكلفة
annual_consumables_cost.helper: Filters, lubricants, spare parts, and other recurring supplies.

useful_life_years.label: العمر الإنتاجي (السنوات)
useful_life_years.helper: Expected oلكلational lifespan لكل ISO 15663 or manufacturer specification.

salvage_value.label: قيمة الخردة
salvage_value.helper: Residual القيمة At end of العمر الإنتاجي (accounting standard).

discount_rate.label: Discount المعدل (%)
discount_rate.helper: الوزنed average التكلفة of capital or hurdle المعدل for NPV calculation.

inflation_rate.label: Inflation المعدل (%)
inflation_rate.helper: Expected annual inflation for future التكلفة escalation.

utilization_hours_per_year.label: Utilization الساعات لكل Year
utilization_hours_per_year.helper: Actual oلكلating الساعات لكل year (OEE التوفر).

downtime_cost_per_hour.label: Downtime التكلفة لكل Hour
downtime_cost_per_hour.helper: Lost revenue or penalty التكلفة لكل hour of unplanned downtime.

expected_downtime_hours_per_year.label: Expected Downtime الساعات لكل Year
expected_downtime_hours_per_year.placeholder: أدخل Expected Downtime الساعات لكل Year

training_cost_per_operator.label: Training التكلفة لكل Oلكلator
training_cost_per_operator.helper: Initial and recurring training التكلفة لكل oلكلator (Lean skill matrix).

number_of_operators.label: Number of Oلكلators
number_of_operators.helper: Direct oلكلators assigned to the asset.

environmental_compliance_cost_per_year.label: Environmental Compliance التكلفة لكل Year
environmental_compliance_cost_per_year.placeholder: أدخل Environmental Compliance التكلفة لكل Year

asset_type.label: Asset Type
asset_type.helper: Category influences depreciation method and maintenance factors.

depreciation_method.label: Depreciation Method
depreciation_method.helper: Accounting method for annual depreciation expense.

include_downtime.label: Include Downtime التكلفةs
include_downtime.helper: Toggle to include or exclude downtime-related التكلفةs in TCO.

base_salary.label: Base Annual Salary
base_salary.helper: Annual gross salary before any deductions or benefits.

bonus_percent.label: الهدف Bonus (% of base salary)
bonus_percent.placeholder: أدخل الهدف Bonus (% of base salary)
bonus_percent.helper: Typical annual bonus as a لكلcentage of base salary.

benefits_percent.label: Benefits التكلفة (% of base salary)
benefits_percent.placeholder: أدخل Benefits التكلفة (% of base salary)
benefits_percent.helper: Includes health insurance, retirement contributions, paid leave, etc. Typical range 25-40%.

payroll_tax_percent.label: Payroll Tax (% of base salary)
payroll_tax_percent.placeholder: أدخل Payroll Tax (% of base salary)
payroll_tax_percent.helper: Employer portion of Social Security and Medicare (FICA) in the US.

overhead_percent.label: Overhead Allocation (% of direct التكلفة)
overhead_percent.placeholder: أدخل Overhead Allocation (% of direct التكلفة)
overhead_percent.helper: Facilities, equipment, IT, admin support allocated لكل employee.

training_cost.label: Annual Training التكلفة لكل Employee
training_cost.placeholder: أدخل Annual Training التكلفة لكل Employee
training_cost.helper: Direct التكلفة of training programs, certifications, and development.

productivity_factor.label: Productivity Factor (0-1)
productivity_factor.helper: Lean metric: actual productive الوقت vs. available الوقت. 1 = full productivity.

turnover_rate.label: Annual Turnover المعدل (%)
turnover_rate.helper: لكلcentage of الموظفون leaving لكل year. Drives replacement and ramp-up التكلفةs.

replacement_cost_percent.label: Replacement التكلفة (% of base salary)
replacement_cost_percent.placeholder: أدخل Replacement التكلفة (% of base salary)
replacement_cost_percent.helper: التكلفة of recruiting, hiring, and onboarding a replacement.

overtime_hours_per_week.label: Average Overtime الساعات لكل Week
overtime_hours_per_week.placeholder: أدخل Average Overtime الساعات لكل Week
overtime_hours_per_week.helper: Average weekly overtime الساعات لكل employee.

overtime_premium.label: Overtime Premium (multiplier)
overtime_premium.helper: Typically 1.5x for الوقت-and-a-half, 2x for double الوقت.

include_hidden_costs.label: Include Hidden التكلفة Drivers
include_hidden_costs.helper: Toggle to include absenteeism, engagement loss, and quality التكلفةs.

production_cost_per_unit.label: Production التكلفة لكل Unit (USD)
production_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct manufacturing التكلفة لكل unit (المادةs, labor, overhead) at the producing entity.

market_price_per_unit.label: Market السعر لكل Unit (USD)
market_price_per_unit.helper: Arm's الطول market السعر for comparable uncontrolled transactions.

volume_units.label: Transaction الحجم (units)
volume_units.helper: Total number of units transferred between entities in the لكلiod.

tax_rate_producer.label: Producer Entity Tax المعدل (%)
tax_rate_producer.helper: Effective corpoالمعدل tax المعدل من producing entity's jurisdiction.

tax_rate_distributor.label: Distributor Entity Tax المعدل (%)
tax_rate_distributor.helper: Effective corpoالمعدل tax المعدل من distributing entity's jurisdiction.

transfer_price_current.label: التيار Transfer السعر (USD)
transfer_price_current.helper: Existing transfer السعر المستخدم for intercompany transactions.

compliance_risk_tolerance.label: Compliance Risk Tolerance (Low/Medium/High)
compliance_risk_tolerance.helper: Company's appetite for audit risk; Low = tight arm's الطول range, High = wider range.

include_lean_waste_factor.label: Include Lean الهدر Factor
include_lean_waste_factor.helper: If true, applies a الهدر reduction factor (muda) to production التكلفة based on Six Sigma process capability.

annual_volume.label: Annual Shipping الحجم (units)
annual_volume.helper: Total number of units shipped لكل year across all modes.

avg_shipment_weight.label: Average Shipment الوزن (kg)
avg_shipment_weight.helper: Average الوزن لكل shipment, المستخدم to compute freight التكلفة and risk exposure.

distance_km.label: Average المسافة لكل Shipment (km)
distance_km.helper: Average haul المسافة for each shipment, influences الوقود التكلفة and transit risk.

mode.label: النقل Mode
mode.helper: Primary mode of النقل: truck, rail, ocean, air.

fuel_price_per_liter.label: الوقود السعر (USD لكل liter)
fuel_price_per_liter.helper: التيار diesel or bunker الوقود السعر, المستخدم for Variable التكلفة estimation.

labor_rate_per_hour.label: Labor المعدل (USD لكل hour)
labor_rate_per_hour.helper: Average hourly wage for drivers/oلكلators, المستخدم in labor التكلفة calculation.

transit_time_days.label: Transit الوقت (الأيام)
transit_time_days.helper: Expected door-to-door transit الوقت, affects inventory carrying التكلفة and risk.

damage_rate_percent.label: Historical Damage المعدل (%)
damage_rate_percent.helper: لكلcentage of shipments damaged in transit, based on historical data.

insurance_rate_per_1000.label: Insurance المعدل (لكل $1000 القيمة)
insurance_rate_per_1000.helper: Premium لكل $1000 of declared cargo القيمة, المستخدم for insurance التكلفة.

cargo_value_per_unit.label: Cargo القيمة لكل Unit (USD)
cargo_value_per_unit.helper: Average القيمة of each shipped unit, المستخدم for risk exposure and insurance.

inventory_holding_cost_percent.label: Inventory Holding التكلفة (% of القيمة لكل year)
inventory_holding_cost_percent.placeholder: أدخل Inventory Holding التكلفة (% of القيمة لكل year)
inventory_holding_cost_percent.helper: Annual التكلفة to hold inventory as a لكلcentage of cargo القيمة, includes warehousing, capital التكلفة.

carbon_tax_per_ton_co2.label: Carbon Tax (USD لكل ton CO2)
carbon_tax_per_ton_co2.placeholder: أدخل Carbon Tax (USD لكل ton CO2)
carbon_tax_per_ton_co2.helper: Regulatory التكلفة لكل metric ton of CO2 emitted, المستخدم for environmental التكلفة.

use_lean_metrics.label: Apply Lean Metrics (takt الوقت, الهدر)
use_lean_metrics.placeholder: أدخل Apply Lean Metrics (takt الوقت, الهدر)
use_lean_metrics.helper: If enabled, includes lean الهدر factors (overprocessing, waiting) in التكلفة and risk.

num_employees.label: Number of الموظفون
num_employees.helper: Total headcount at the start من لكلiod.

annual_turnover_rate.label: Annual Turnover المعدل
annual_turnover_rate.helper: لكلcentage of الموظفون leaving لكل year (voluntary + involuntary).

avg_salary.label: Average Annual Salary لكل Employee
avg_salary.placeholder: أدخل Average Annual Salary لكل Employee
avg_salary.helper: Average total compensation (base + benefits) لكل employee.

onboarding_cost_per_hire.label: Onboarding التكلفة لكل Hire
onboarding_cost_per_hire.helper: Training المادةs, orientation, IT الإعداد, mentor الوقت.

training_cost_per_hire.label: Training التكلفة لكل Hire (first year)
training_cost_per_hire.placeholder: أدخل Training التكلفة لكل Hire (first year)

lost_productivity_months.label: Lost Productivity المدة
lost_productivity_months.helper: Average months of reduced output لكل new hire (ramp-up لكلiod).

productivity_factor.label: Productivity Factor during Ramp-up
productivity_factor.helper: Average productivity level during ramp-up (e.g., 50% means half output).

exit_interview_cost_per_leaver.label: Exit Interview التكلفة لكل Leaver
exit_interview_cost_per_leaver.placeholder: أدخل Exit Interview التكلفة لكل Leaver

overtime_cover_cost_per_leaver.label: Overtime Cover التكلفة لكل Leaver
overtime_cover_cost_per_leaver.placeholder: أدخل Overtime Cover التكلفة لكل Leaver
overtime_cover_cost_per_leaver.helper: Extra pay for المتبقي staff covering duties.

quality_defect_cost_per_leaver.label: Quality Defect التكلفة لكل Leaver
quality_defect_cost_per_leaver.placeholder: أدخل Quality Defect التكلفة لكل Leaver
quality_defect_cost_per_leaver.helper: Rework, scrap, customer complaints due to inexلكلience.

customer_impact_cost_per_leaver.label: Customer Impact التكلفة لكل Leaver
customer_impact_cost_per_leaver.placeholder: أدخل Customer Impact التكلفة لكل Leaver

knowledge_loss_cost_per_leaver.label: Knowledge Loss التكلفة لكل Leaver
knowledge_loss_cost_per_leaver.placeholder: أدخل Knowledge Loss التكلفة لكل Leaver
knowledge_loss_cost_per_leaver.helper: Loss of institutional knowledge, intellectual proلكلty.

include_indirect_costs.label: Include Indirect التكلفةs
include_indirect_costs.helper: Toggle to include quality, customer, and knowledge loss التكلفةs.

leak_diameter_mm.label: Equivalent Leak القطر (mm)
leak_diameter_mm.helper: Estimated القطر من leak orifice, typically measured via ultrasonic leak detector or التدفق test.

system_pressure_bar.label: System الضغط (bar gauge)
system_pressure_bar.helper: Oلكلating الضغط من compressed air system at the point of leak.

operating_hours_per_year.label: Oلكلating الساعات لكل Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Total annual الساعات the vacuum/compressed air system is in oلكلation.

electricity_cost_per_kwh.label: Electricity التكلفة ($/kWh)
electricity_cost_per_kwh.helper: Average التكلفة of electricity لكل kilowatt-hour, including demand charges if applicable.

compressor_specific_power.label: Compressor Specific القدرة (kW لكل 100 cfm)
compressor_specific_power.placeholder: أدخل Compressor Specific القدرة (kW لكل 100 cfm)
compressor_specific_power.helper: القدرة الاستهلاك من compressor لكل 100 cfm of free air delivered. Typical range 16-22 kW/100 cfm for rotary screw compressors.

ambient_temperature_c.label: Ambient Temلكلature (°C)
ambient_temperature_c.helper: Average ambient temلكلature at compressor intake, affects air الكثافة and mass التدفق.

leak_type.label: Leak Type (Orifice Shape Factor)
leak_type.helper: Shape factor affects discharge coefficient. Round is typical for drilled holes; sharp for cracks; long for pipes.

include_carbon_cost.label: Include Carbon التكلفة Calculation
include_carbon_cost.helper: If enabled, calculates CO2 emissions and associated التكلفة based on grid emission factor.

emission_factor_kg_co2_per_kwh.label: Grid Emission Factor (kg CO2/kWh)
emission_factor_kg_co2_per_kwh.helper: Average CO2 emissions لكل kWh of electricity consumed. Varies by region (e.g., US average ~0.4, China ~0.6).

vector1_magnitude.label: Vector 1 Magnitude
vector1_magnitude.helper: Magnitude من first force/velocity vector in Newtons (N) or m/s. Typical range for industrial applications: 0.1–100,000 N.

vector1_angle.label: Vector 1 Angle
vector1_angle.helper: Direction من first vector measured from positive x-axis (0° to 360°). المستخدم in force analysis لكل ISO 80000-2.

vector2_magnitude.label: Vector 2 Magnitude
vector2_magnitude.helper: Magnitude من second vector. Common in multi-force systems (e.g., conveyor belt tensions, robotic arm loads).

vector2_angle.label: Vector 2 Angle
vector2_angle.helper: Direction من second vector. Typical angles: 0° (horizontal), 90° (vertical), 180° (opposite).

unit_system.label: Unit System
unit_system.helper: اختر SI (metric) or Imلكلial (lb, ft/s) for output consistency. ISO 1000 recommends SI for engineering calculations.

confidence_level.label: Data Confidence Level
confidence_level.helper: Confidence in إدخال measurement accuracy (e.g., from sensor calibration). المستخدم for Six Sigma risk adjustment.

conductor_material.label: Conductor المادة
conductor_material.helper: المادة affects resistivity; copلكل and aluminum are common in industrial installations.

conductor_size.label: Conductor Size (AWG or kcmil)
conductor_size.helper: Cross-sectional المساحة deالمدةines resistance لكل unit الطول.

circuit_length.label: One-Way Circuit الطول
circuit_length.helper: المسافة from source to load; longer runs increase voltage drop.

load_current.label: تيار الحمل (Amلكلes)
load_current.helper: التيار drawn by the load; higher التيار increases drop.

system_voltage.label: System Voltage (Line-to-Line)
system_voltage.helper: Nominal voltage من system; المستخدم to compute لكلcentage drop.

phase_type.label: Phase Type
phase_type.helper: Single-phase or three-phase affects the voltage drop formula (factor sqrt(3) for three-phase).

power_factor.label: القدرة Factor (cos φ)
power_factor.helper: Reactive component increases effective التيار; typical industrial PF is 0.8-0.95.

ambient_temperature.label: Ambient Temلكلature
ambient_temperature.helper: Temلكلature affects conductor resistance; higher temلكلature increases resistance.

annualdemand.label: Annual Demand (units)
annualdemand.helper: Total customer demand لكل year for the product family under analysis.

sellingprice.label: Selling السعر لكل unit
sellingprice.helper: Average Selling السعر لكل unit to the customer.

laborcostperhour.label: Labor التكلفة لكل hour
laborcostperhour.helper: Fully loaded labor التكلفة لكل oلكلator hour.

totalcycletime.label: Total Cycle الوقت (minutes)
totalcycletime.helper: Sum of all process cycle times for one unit through the القيمة stream.

totalvalueaddedtime.label: Total القيمة-Added الوقت (minutes)
totalvalueaddedtime.helper: Sum of only القيمة-added process times (ISO 22400, Lean definition).

defectrate.label: Defect المعدل (%)
defectrate.helper: لكلcentage of units that require rework or are scrapped (First Pass Yield).

reworkcostperunit.label: Rework التكلفة لكل defective unit
reworkcostperunit.placeholder: أدخل Rework التكلفة لكل defective unit
reworkcostperunit.helper: Additional التكلفة to rework one defective unit (labor + المادة).

inventoryholdingcostpercent.label: Inventory Holding التكلفة (% of COGS)
inventoryholdingcostpercent.placeholder: أدخل Inventory Holding التكلفة (% of COGS)
inventoryholdingcostpercent.helper: Annual inventory carrying التكلفة as a لكلcentage of التكلفة of goods sold (WERC standard).

averageinventoryvalue.label: Average Inventory القيمة (currency)
averageinventoryvalue.helper: Average القيمة of raw المادة, WIP, and finished goods inventory.

overheadrate.label: Overhead المعدل (% of direct labor)
overheadrate.placeholder: أدخل Overhead المعدل (% of direct labor)
overheadrate.helper: Manufacturing overhead allocated as a لكلcentage of direct labor التكلفة.

operatorspershift.label: Oلكلators لكل shift
operatorspershift.helper: Number of direct oلكلators working لكل shift in the القيمة stream.

shiftsperday.label: Shifts لكل day
shiftsperday.helper: Number of production shifts لكل day.

workingdaysperyear.label: Working الأيام لكل year
workingdaysperyear.helper: Number of oلكلating الأيام لكل year.

wastereductiontarget.label: الهدر Reduction الهدف (%)
wastereductiontarget.helper: الهدف لكلcentage reduction in non-القيمة-added الوقت (Lean continuous improvement).

total_floor_area.label: Total مساحة الأرضية
total_floor_area.helper: Total available warehouse floor space in أقدام مربعة.

storage_area_percent.label: Storage المساحة لكلcentage
storage_area_percent.helper: لكلcentage of total مساحة الأرضية dedicated to storage (pallet racks, shelving).

aisle_width.label: Aisle العرض
aisle_width.helper: العرض of main travel aisles in feet.

pallet_flow_type.label: Pallet التدفق Type
pallet_flow_type.helper: Type of pallet storage system المستخدم.

avg_pallet_size.label: Average Pallet Size (footprint)
avg_pallet_size.helper: Average footprint of a single pallet (الطول x العرض).

avg_inventory_turns.label: Average Inventory Turns لكل Year
avg_inventory_turns.placeholder: أدخل Average Inventory Turns لكل Year
avg_inventory_turns.helper: Number of times inventory is cycled annually.

labor_cost_per_hour.label: Labor التكلفة لكل Hour
labor_cost_per_hour.helper: Fully loaded hourly wage for warehouse oلكلators.

equipment_cost_per_hour.label: Equipment التكلفة لكل Hour
equipment_cost_per_hour.helper: Hourly التكلفة of المادة handling equipment (forklifts, pallet jacks).

order_lines_per_day.label: Order Lines لكل Day
order_lines_per_day.helper: Average number of order lines processed daily.

storage_utilization.label: Storage Utilization المعدل
storage_utilization.helper: التيار لكلcentage of storage positions occupied.

layout_type.label: Layout Type
layout_type.helper: Warehouse layout configuration based on aisle العرض and equipment.

include_cross_dock.label: Include Cross-Dock المساحة
include_cross_dock.helper: Whether a dedicated cross-docking zone is included in the layout.

numemployees.label: Number of الموظفون
numemployees.helper: Total full-الوقت equivalent الموظفون on site.

workdaysperyear.label: Work الأيام لكل Year
workdaysperyear.helper: Number of oلكلating الأيام لكل year.

avgwateruseperpersonperday.label: Average Water Use لكل لكلson لكل Day
avgwateruseperpersonperday.placeholder: أدخل Average Water Use لكل لكلson لكل Day
avgwateruseperpersonperday.helper: Estimated daily water الاستهلاك لكل employee (drinking, sanitation, cleaning).

processwaterintensity.label: Process Water Intensity
processwaterintensity.helper: Water المستخدم لكل unit of production output (e.g., liters لكل product).

leakagefactor.label: Leakage Factor
leakagefactor.helper: Estimated لكلcentage of water lost due to leaks in the distribution system.

recyclingrate.label: Water Recycling المعدل
recyclingrate.helper: لكلcentage of process water that is treated and reالمستخدم.

seasonalfactor.label: Seasonal Adjustment Factor
seasonalfactor.helper: Multiplier to account for seasonal variations (e.g., summer peak).

industrytype.label: Industry Type
industrytype.helper: اختر industry sector to apply appropriate benchmarks.

totalwaterin.label: Total Water إدخال (m³)
totalwaterin.helper: Total الحجم of water entering the facility from all sources (municipal, well, recycled).

productionoutput.label: Production Output (units)
productionoutput.helper: Total number of units produced in the reporting لكلiod.

processwater.label: Process Water المستخدم (m³)
processwater.helper: Water directly المستخدم in manufacturing processes (e.g., cooling, rinsing, chemical mixing).

coolingwater.label: Cooling Water Makeup (m³)
coolingwater.helper: Water added to cooling towers or closed-loop systems to compensate for evaporation and blowdown.

wastewaterdischarge.label: الهدرwater Discharge (m³)
wastewaterdischarge.helper: الحجم of الهدرwater discharged to sewer or treatment facility.

recycledwater.label: Recycled Water (m³)
recycledwater.helper: الحجم of water treated and reالمستخدم within the facility.

leakagelosses.label: Leakage Losses (m³)
leakagelosses.helper: Estimated water lost through leaks in pipes, valves, and fixtures.

industrytype.label: Industry Type
industrytype.helper: Industry classification المستخدم for benchmarking and normalization.

watercostperm3.label: Water التكلفة (currency/m³)
watercostperm3.helper: Average التكلفة لكل cubic meter of water including supply and الهدرwater treatment.

enableadvancedanalysis.label: Enable Advanced Analysis
enableadvancedanalysis.helper: If true, enables hidden loss driver detection and suggested actions.

weld_type.label: Weld Type
weld_type.helper: Deالمدةines the geometry factor and stress distribution model لكل AWS D1.1.

base_material_yield_strength.label: Base المادة Yield Strength
base_material_yield_strength.helper: Yield strength من weaker base المادة (ISO 898 / ASTM A36).

weld_material_tensile_strength.label: Weld المادة Tensile Strength
weld_material_tensile_strength.helper: Tensile strength of filler metal (e.g., ER70S-6).

throat_thickness.label: Effective الحلق السماكة
throat_thickness.helper: Minimum الحلق dimension لكل ISO 5817 quality level B.

applied_load.label: Applied Load
applied_load.helper: Service load acting on the weld joint.

load_angle.label: Load Angle (from weld axis)
load_angle.helper: Angle between applied load and weld longitudinal axis. 90° = transverse, 0° = longitudinal.

quality_level.label: Quality Level (ISO 5817)
quality_level.helper: ISO 5817 weld quality level: B=stringent, C=modeالمعدل, D=basic.

inspection_method.label: Inspection Method
inspection_method.helper: NDT method المستخدم; affects confidence factor.

is_fatigue_loading.label: Fatigue Loading
is_fatigue_loading.helper: If true, applies S-N curve reduction لكل AWS D1.1 fatigue categories.

joint_type.label: Joint Type
joint_type.helper: اختر weld joint geometry لكل ISO 9692. Affects الحجم calculation formula.

plate_thickness.label: Plate السماكة (t)
plate_thickness.helper: السماكة من base metal. Critical for groove الحجم calculation.

root_face.label: Root Face (f)
root_face.helper: Land at the root من groove. Affects effective العمق.

root_gap.label: Root Gap (g)
root_gap.helper: Gap between plates at root. Increases weld الحجم.

groove_angle.label: Groove Angle (α)
groove_angle.helper: Included angle of V-groove. Standard range لكل AWS D1.1.

leg_length.label: Leg الطول (for fillet)
leg_length.helper: Fillet weld leg size. Only المستخدم when joint_type = fillet.

weld_process.label: Welding Process
weld_process.helper: اختر welding process. Affects deposition efficiency and Labor المعدل.

material_density.label: المادة الكثافة
material_density.helper: الكثافة of weld metal. Steel ~7.85, Aluminum ~2.7, Stainless ~8.0.

labor_rate.label: Labor المعدل
labor_rate.helper: Hourly التكلفة of welder including overhead.

overhead_rate.label: Overhead المعدل
overhead_rate.helper: لكلcentage added to direct labor for indirect التكلفةs.

consumable_cost_per_kg.label: Consumable التكلفة لكل kg
consumable_cost_per_kg.helper: التكلفة of filler metal لكل kilogram.

deposition_efficiency.label: Deposition Efficiency
deposition_efficiency.helper: Ratio of deposited metal to consumed filler. Varies by process: SMAW~65%, GMAW~90%, FCAW~85%, SAW~99%, GTAW~95%.

operator_factor.label: Oلكلator Factor
operator_factor.helper: لكلcentage of total الوقت that the welder is actually depositing metal. Typical range 20-50%.

weld_speed.label: Weld Speed
weld_speed.helper: Travel speed من welding arc. Affects deposition المعدل and الوقت.

wire_feed_speed.label: Wire Feed Speed (if applicable)
wire_feed_speed.helper: Only for GMAW/FCAW processes. يُستخدم لحساب deposition المعدل.

wire_diameter.label: Wire القطر
wire_diameter.helper: القطر of filler wire. Affects cross-sectional المساحة and deposition المعدل.

use_premium_data.label: Use Premium Data (historical trends)
use_premium_data.helper: If true, adjusts deposition efficiency and oلكلator factor based on historical data from premium database.

weld_length_mm.label: Weld الطول (mm)
weld_length_mm.helper: Total الطول من weld joint to be deposited.

weld_throat_mm.label: Weld الحلق السماكة (mm)
weld_throat_mm.helper: Effective الحلق السماكة من fillet or groove weld.

material_density_g_per_cm3.label: المادة الكثافة (g/cm³)
material_density_g_per_cm3.helper: الكثافة من base and filler المادة (typical steel ~7.85).

deposition_efficiency.label: Deposition Efficiency (%)
deposition_efficiency.helper: Ratio of deposited weld metal to total filler metal consumed (includes spatter and losses).

labor_rate_per_hour.label: Labor المعدل (USD/hour)
labor_rate_per_hour.helper: Fully burdened hourly labor التكلفة for welder.

welding_speed_mm_per_min.label: Welding Speed (mm/min)
welding_speed_mm_per_min.helper: Travel speed من welding torch along the joint.

filler_wire_cost_per_kg.label: Filler Wire التكلفة (USD/kg)
filler_wire_cost_per_kg.helper: التكلفة لكل kilogram of filler wire or electrode.

gas_cost_per_liter.label: Shielding Gas التكلفة (USD/L)
gas_cost_per_liter.helper: التكلفة لكل liter of shielding gas (e.g., Argon/CO2 mix).

gas_flow_rate_l_per_min.label: Gas التدفق المعدل (L/min)
gas_flow_rate_l_per_min.helper: التدفق المعدل of shielding gas during welding.

welding_power_kw.label: Welding القدرة (kW)
welding_power_kw.helper: Average القدرة الاستهلاك من welding machine during oلكلation.

overhead_rate_per_hour.label: Overhead المعدل (USD/hour)
overhead_rate_per_hour.helper: Facility and equipment overhead allocated لكل hour of welding.

rework_rate_percent.label: Rework المعدل (%)
rework_rate_percent.helper: لكلcentage of welds requiring rework (defect المعدل).

rework_cost_factor.label: Rework التكلفة Factor
rework_cost_factor.helper: Multiplier on original التكلفة to account for rework (cutting, re-welding, inspection).

weld_process_type.label: Welding Process Type
weld_process_type.helper: Standard arc welding process لكل AWS A3.0.

use_premium_material.label: Use Premium Filler المادة
use_premium_material.helper: Toggle to apply a 20% التكلفة premium for high-الأداء filler wire.

basic_wind_speed.label: Basic Wind Speed (V)
basic_wind_speed.helper: Design wind speed at 10m الارتفاع for the location, typically from local building codes.

terrain_category.label: Terrain Category
terrain_category.helper: Terrain roughness لكل ISO 4354: A=open sea, B=open country, C=suburban, D=urban.

building_height.label: Building الارتفاع (z)
building_height.helper: الارتفاع above ground to the top من structure.

exposure_factor.label: Exposure Factor (Ce)
exposure_factor.helper: Adjustment for local topography and shielding, لكل ASCE 7.

gust_factor.label: Gust Effect Factor (G)
gust_factor.helper: Dynamic response factor for wind gusts, typically 0.85 for rigid structures.

pressure_coefficient.label: الضغط Coefficient (Cp)
pressure_coefficient.helper: Aerodynamic shape factor for the building surface (positive for windward, negative for leeward).

air_density.label: Air الكثافة (ρ)
air_density.helper: Standard air الكثافة at sea level, adjust for altitude if needed.

is_cyclic_loading.label: Cyclic Loading Consideration
is_cyclic_loading.helper: If true, applies fatigue reduction factor لكل ISO 4354 for dynamic wind events.

turbine_capacity.label: Turbine المعدلd Capacity (MW)
turbine_capacity.helper: Nameplate capacity من wind turbine model under evaluation.

capacity_factor.label: Capacity Factor (%)
capacity_factor.helper: Expected annual capacity factor based on site wind resource assessment (IEC 61400-1).

capital_cost_per_mw.label: Capital التكلفة لكل MW (USD)
capital_cost_per_mw.helper: Total installed التكلفة لكل MW, including turbine, foundation, grid connection, and logistics.

opex_per_mwh.label: Oلكلating Expenditure (USD/MWh)
opex_per_mwh.helper: Annual oلكلations and maintenance التكلفة لكل MWh geneالمعدلd (includes scheduled and unscheduled maintenance).

electricity_price.label: Electricity Selling السعر (USD/MWh)
electricity_price.helper: القدرة purchase agreement السعر or wholesale market السعر لكل MWh.

discount_rate.label: Discount المعدل (%)
discount_rate.helper: الوزنed average التكلفة of capital (WACC) المستخدم for صافي present القيمة calculation.

project_lifetime.label: Project Lifetime (السنوات)
project_lifetime.helper: Expected oلكلational life من wind farm (typically 20-25 السنوات).

degradation_rate.label: Annual Degradation المعدل (%)
degradation_rate.helper: Expected annual reduction in الطاقة production due to blade wear, gearbox aging, and other factors.

incentive_tax_credit.label: Production Tax Credit (USD/MWh)
incentive_tax_credit.helper: Government incentive لكل MWh geneالمعدلd (e.g., US PTC).

grid_availability.label: Grid التوفر (%)
grid_availability.helper: لكلcentage of الوقت the grid is available to accept القدرة (curtailment factor).

turbine_type.label: Turbine Type
turbine_type.helper: Technology classification affecting O&M التكلفة profiles and reliability (ISO 61400-4).

maintenance_strategy.label: Maintenance Stالمعدلgy
maintenance_strategy.helper: Maintenance approach aligned with Lean/Six Sigma principles to minimize downtime and التكلفة.

material_thickness.label: المادة السماكة (mm)
material_thickness.helper: السماكة من base metal to be welded, measured in millimeters.

carbon_equivalent.label: Carbon Equivalent (CE)
carbon_equivalent.helper: Carbon equivalent القيمة calculated from المادة composition (IIW formula).

hydrogen_level.label: Hydrogen Level (ml/100g weld metal)
hydrogen_level.helper: Diffusible hydrogen content من welding consumable, لكل ISO 3690.

heat_input.label: Heat إدخال (kJ/mm)
heat_input.helper: Arc الطاقة لكل unit الطول of weld, calculated from voltage, التيار, and travel speed.

joint_restraint.label: Joint Restraint Factor
joint_restraint.helper: Degree of mechanical restraint on the weld joint, affecting crack susceptibility.

preheat_method.label: Preheat Method
preheat_method.helper: Method المستخدم to apply preheat, influences heating المعدل and uniformity.

sectorFooter.tagline: حاسبات قطاعية لقرارات الإنتاج والصناعة وإدارة الأعمال.
sectorFooter.noteBody: الحاسبات للمراجعة الأولية ودعم القرار. تحقق من بياناتك قبل القرارات التجارية الحاسمة.

inputGuide.title: دليل الإدخال
inputGuide.description: يوضح هذا المخطط أي قياس أو قيمة يقابل كل حقل إدخال.

standard.title: Usage agreement
standard.body: This calculation Provides a preliminary assessment based on your inputs and حتمي methodology. Results do not replace quotes, investment, المحركering, tax, legal, or safety قرارs. For حرج قرارs, verify with your own data, qualified exلكلts, and applicable regulations.

elevated.title: Important usage notice
elevated.body: This tool models commercial or compliance-sensitive exposure. المخرجاتs are indicative only and must be validated against your contracts, payroll records, and local rules before إجراء.

engineering.title: المحركering reference notice
engineering.body: This tool Provides standard-referenced pre-calculation only. Final design, safety, and conformity قرارs require authorized المحركering review.

standards.selectorNote: Default follows المنطقة; you may switch reference systems for comparison.
standards.engineeringWarning: This tool Provides standard-referenced pre-calculation only. Final design, safety, and conformity قرارs require authorized المحركering review.
